name: Tim
subject: Well, that was pretty awful
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=3407%2E3611125%2EJ7QJIq ][IMG]

Folks, I wasn’t expecting Trump to come to Ohio and play nice,
but wow—that rally really was a special kind of awful, wasn’t it?

Moments ago Donald Trump attacked me personally, saying Republicans "can't
take a chance" when it comes to running against me.

Trump knows how important winning Ohio is. His wading into our race means
more attack ads, more dark money, and a tougher environment in an already
competitive race.

So I’m counting on this grassroots team to help me respond to the
far-right’s outlandish lies and baseless attacks. We need to bring in
$30,000 in the next 72 hours to compete with JD Vance and Trump’s MAGA
fundraising machine.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/11070?t=1014&amount=25&akid=3407%2E3611125%2EJ7QJIq ]Can I count on you to chip in $25 today to help us cut through the
noise and flip Ohio blue? There’s never been a more important time for you
to give:

If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/11070?t=1015&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=3407%2E3611125%2EJ7QJIq ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/11070?t=1016&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=3407%2E3611125%2EJ7QJIq ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/11070?t=1017&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=3407%2E3611125%2EJ7QJIq ]Donate $100 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/11070?t=1018&express_lane=true&amount=200&akid=3407%2E3611125%2EJ7QJIq ]Donate $200

Today’s rally really tells us everything we need to know about JD Vance.
If he wins we sure as hell know that it won’t be hardworking Ohioans in
the driver’s seat—it’ll be his rich far-right buddies.

But that doesn’t change our goal: we need to stay focused on talking to
folks all across the state and show them that there’s a better way
forward.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/11070?t=1021&amount=25&akid=3407%2E3611125%2EJ7QJIq ]But folks, getting our message in front of voters isn’t cheap. Will you
pitch in toward our fundraising goal so we can flip Ohio blue and FINALLY
cut workers in on the deal?

If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/11070?t=1008&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=3407%2E3611125%2EJ7QJIq ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/11070?t=1009&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=3407%2E3611125%2EJ7QJIq ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/11070?t=1010&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=3407%2E3611125%2EJ7QJIq ]Donate $100 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/11070?t=1011&express_lane=true&amount=200&akid=3407%2E3611125%2EJ7QJIq ]Donate $200
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/11070?t=1012&express_lane=true&amount=250&akid=3407%2E3611125%2EJ7QJIq ]Donate $250 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/11070?t=1013&express_lane=true&amount=30&akid=3407%2E3611125%2EJ7QJIq ]Other Amount

line, the stakes truly couldn’t be any higher.

Thanks for always being in my corner, folks.

Tim

body:
A recent poll shows Beto O'Rourke and Greg Abbott statistically tied.
#
We need to make sure that you've seen this:
**A recent poll found Beto O'Rourke and Greg Abbott statistically TIED.**
This is HUGE! Just read what Lawrence O'Donnell had to say about it on MSNBC:
_"Being in the low 40s, in a tie with Beto O'Rourke... is extremely bad news for the incumbent Republican governor."
— Lawrence O'Donnell, April 12, 2022_
[Beto can win this race, but we'll need the support of this entire grassroots team to make it happen. Please, will you chip in $3 or more now to make history and defeat Abbott?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/55690?refcode=ema20220423-186315&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=186315%2E444211%2EYu06c1)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/55690?refcode=ema20220423-186315&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=186315%2E444211%2EYu06c1)**
According to Lawrence O'Donnell, incumbents running below 50% — like Abbott! — are in trouble because undecided voters tend to break in favor of the challenger (Beto!).
His analysis confirms what we've been seeing on the ground in every part of this state: **Texans are ready for new leadership.**
Since Beto launched, Abbott's support has been slipping, and now we're within just two points of him. Abbott and his corporate mega-donors are going to launch attack after attack our way so we have no choice but to be prepared — and that takes real resources.
Please, we need to keep up this momentum. [Will you chip in $3 or more today to help us elect Beto and defeat Abbott once and for all?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/55690?refcode=ema20220423-186315&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=186315%2E444211%2EYu06c1)
Thank you,
Team Beto

| | Dear JOHN, Stupid and expensive. **That** should've been Biden's campaign slogan, because it seems that every single policy this administration proposes fits the description. _**The Biden Administration is now proposing to give free cellphones to people who are crossing the border illegally so they can 'check in with them'.**_ If you're breaking the law, do you think you're going to call the federal goverenment and let them know? Who does the Biden administration think they are kidding? Throwing money-in this case a lot of money- at a problem isn't the way to fix it. That money should be spent hiring **more** ICE agents and finishing the border wall, so people can't cross illegally in the first place. Everyone knows what the solution is here. But the Biden Administration and our liberal Congress are refusing to address it. We need to take back the House and put an end to this craziness. Support my campaign for Congress, and I promise you, I will NEVER support expensive, idiotic "solutions" like this. **Blake Harbin** **Candidate for US Congress, GA-06**

Throwing money-in this case a lot of money- at a problem isn't the way to fix it. That money should be spent hiring more ICE agents and finishing the border wall, so people can't cross illegally in the first place. Everyone knows what the solution is here. But the Biden Administration and our liberal Congress are refusing to address it. We need to take back the House and put an end to this craziness. Support my campaign for Congress, and I promise you, I will NEVER support expensive, idiotic "solutions" like this. Blake Harbin Candidate for US Congress, GA-06 | | | Paid for by Harbin for Georgia, Inc.

**Darin Harbick for US Senate
New Press Release from National Republican Party** Good Afternoon, Please see the breaking news shared below from the National Republican Senatorial Committee (NRSC). This is the year when Oregon shares in the national Red Wave to remove the radical left from their perches of power and replace them with leaders who will return our state and nation to the values we all share. Never has there been an election as critical as this one. Never have the odds been so stacked in our favor. We will win this election with your help. Please consider making as generous a contribution as you can today and helping us win on May 17th and then again in November. [https://www.efundraisingconnections.com/c/Harbick/](https://harbickforussenate.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3dd8e7fd3b4e92c0bcc1988f&id=c28b19c94e&e=97f786938b) We have all the momentum on our side. Thanks for believing in our greater cause and in me. Gratefully, Darin P.S. I encourage you to also click the link to the poll in the release below. There is a lot of encouraging data there.
**Ron Wyden Underwater with Oregon Voters** **Washington, D.C. **– New [poll numbers](https://harbickforussenate.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3dd8e7fd3b4e92c0bcc1988f&id=dd3e14d1fb&e=97f786938b) came out in Oregon and it’s NOT looking good for Democrats.
* 35% of Oregonians approve of Joe Biden’s job performance, a number below the national average, while 63% disapprove.
* 39% of Oregonians approve of their U.S. Senator Ron Wyden, while 49% disapprove.

Senate Democrats have [already begun](https://harbickforussenate.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3dd8e7fd3b4e92c0bcc1988f&id=27962962ef&e=97f786938b) to run from Biden’s unpopularity, but it looks like it has already taken Ron Wyden underwater. He probably should’ve thought twice before fully supporting Biden’s radical, unpopular agenda. Too late. **Statement from NRSC Spokeswoman Lizzie Litzow:** “Ron Wyden is 10 points underwater in Oregon. You know things are bad for Democrats when they aren’t even popular in the Pacific Northwest. Oregonians want a change and Ron Wyden is not their answer.”
Thanks again for your ongoing support. I am so grateful for your help!

Your contribution of $50, $100, $500 or more will go a long way to continue our campaign leading up to the Oregon primaries. You can donate directly here - [https://www.efundraisingconnections.com/c/Harbick](https://harbickforussenate.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3dd8e7fd3b4e92c0bcc1988f&id=3d996ef6c7&e=97f786938b)
Yours for freedom, Darin Harbick

# A LOT OF EXCITING THINGS
Wow, lots of exciting things happening in our campaing. We have some exciting endorcments to announce. So far we are endorced by The California College Republican Club, LEXIT, Che Ahn Harvest Rock, Rob McCoy God Speak Calvary Chapel, and many more exciting endorsments coming up this week.
I was able to speak at the CA GOP meeting this week and shared how I felt they are falling short. You can watch the video below. You can also watch my new commercial. Another video below is with James P. Bradley who ran for my district in 2020 and is now running for Senate. We address the subject of Abortion.
I have a shameless ask of my followers and friends. The primary is right around the corner and if we lose it is only because of money. We do not have a massive budget like other campaigns, but what I have is very very hard work and commitment to fight for a righteous cause. We are handing out 1,000 postcards every time we go out. We must do this to get my name out to the 760,000 voters in my district. To make a long story short, we are out of material. I need to order another 60,000 cards asap. 60K cards are $2,000 plus taxes. I need to raise $2,500 to cover taxes and shipping. The mail-out ballets come out in 2 weeks, I don't have time to waste. name: Team Schmidt
subject: Team Schmidt earns more support every day!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC
body:
Kansans are tired of Laura Kelly vetoing commonsense legislation - just last week she blocked bills that would: Friend, Kansans are tired of Laura Kelly vetoing commonsense legislation - just last week she blocked bills that would: ❌ Preserve fairness in women’s sports ❌ Protect parents’ rights when it comes to their children’s education ❌ Prevent hard-working taxpayers from subsidizing those who could be working but choose not to Huge majorities of Kansans support these commonsense measures. Laura Kelly sided with the left wing of her party instead. **Kansans know Derek will be a Governor who listens to the people.** That’s why Derek continues to win the endorsement of so many great people and organizations - see for yourself! [**JOIN TEAM SCHMIDT**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=8ff3f883aed94e5ca82d085d3a882750&_e=mdyFyBhUwx1M8LZWsZVT0kHqyQ25y38WhA9sa1aWUnS2cLMM8moJFvr9144HUl2e2Oc7dSM4gPy80nzT759sVmCOr8ONlyXdcZup2DLtCqpgNsaB7hYbYaeWWLLFtetIAZ7BRvSgWHHUTrYrBvt6UM4ITd93eWfV26O3L5_99X9L8NPrDecZ_GJJCbWbTKBubJQGyY9Gm2w03UfqVrVqt04wEjN19pXoZNUwBjQ5RaX9SDq-9Lv1sn-eXkFjwjv-qEKLcFBrSFoIUe4n_v0x0spbU2NHt8fMcQe-jCtKo5Yz_7N9eZPqPYzXz-u2C2NX0Rwf-YvlJC_5c1nXBSXS3CxoTZ-d3LY7Uil21nJ7-T82ixcAyxnsCxcxi_dPcERCRIkcepRk3ICrz7XX5d2abu0Yc20uXw3GjmwAFYQAynp3rZjgWxFj9rP-nrrD3WeuE2rtTJL2M-yqt-kJhk-G7i1F_8hVKlYjJ55GIfWlr8Y%3D) Check out each of our recent endorsements below: _“The Leavenworth County Republican Party was proud to endorse Derek Schmidt for Governor at our annual Free State Dinner on April 9th. Derek Schmidt is an impressive, proven, and committed leader who has always worked hard to improve the lives and opportunities of Kansans. He shares our values and he fights every day for us, particularly when the Biden administration constantly overreaches and intrudes into our lives. His track record speaks for itself, and we wholly believe that he will continue to serve Kansans very well as our Governor. Laura Kelly and Joe Biden’s reckless policies and failed leadership have made life harder for Americans. Their liberal agenda has led to rocketing inflation, rising crime rates, a historic border crisis, and an unprecedented attack on our freedoms through COVID-19 lockdowns and mandates. We are grateful that the Schmidt family has taken on this mission to save Kansas, and we hope that voters in Leavenworth County and across Kansas will join us in supporting Derek Schmidt for Governor.”_ **Leavenworth County Republican Party** _“I met Derek Schmidt when I was interning at the Capital 12 years ago. He treated me with as much respect as an intern as when I then later served in our State Senate. That’s how he lives his life. He cares about the people of Kansas. During my time on the Senate Judiciary Committee, I watched him successfully lead efforts to toughen penalties against those that defraud our seniors and strengthen our laws against human trafficking. He stands up for Kansans at all stages of life, including our most vulnerable, the unborn. As a farmer, I’m thankful for his willingness to be a voice for Kansas farmers and ranchers at the state and national levels, when challenging burdensome regulations that have come from the Obama & Biden Administrations. I’m also thankful for his willingness to serve our state as its next governor and he has my full support.”_ **Former State Senator Garrett Love** _“The Finney County Republican Party Central Committee has endorsed Attorney General Derek Schmidt for Governor of Kansas. Kansas needs Derek Schmidt to get us back on track after now more than three years of failures and ineffectiveness in the governor’s office. In contrast, Derek has a strong track record at the attorney general’s office. He’s always backed the blue, preserved law and order, fought for individual liberty, and scored many victories against both the Obama and Biden administrations when they overreached. Finney County knows Derek Schmidt because he prioritizes visiting with us and listening to our concerns. Laura Kelly has been bad for Kansas families, schools, jobs, and businesses. To put it plainly, we cannot afford four more years with her in office. We hope all Republicans, and all Kansans, will join us and support Derek Schmidt for Governor and his positive visions for the future of our state.”_ **Finney County Republican Party** _"I want to publicly endorse Attorney General Derek Schmidt for the Office of Governor for the State of Kansas. Over the past several years, I worked as a Detective for the Woodson County Sheriff's Office and worked closely with the Office of the Attorney General of Kansas on many criminal cases. General Schmidt conducts his office in a manner that assists all law enforcement agencies. I am certain that he will carry this same professionalism into the Office of Governor of the State of Kansas."_ **Woodson County Sheriff Jeffery A. McCullough** We sincerely appreciate all of the support. –Team Schmidt | |
---

clean_body: Kansans are tired of Laura Kelly vetoing commonsense legislation - just last week she blocked bills that would: Friend, Kansans are tired of Laura Kelly vetoing commonsense legislation - just last week she blocked bills that would: ❌ Preserve fairness in women’s sports ❌ Protect parents’ rights when it comes to their children’s education ❌ Prevent hard-working taxpayers from subsidizing those who could be working but choose not to Huge majorities of Kansans support these commonsense measures. Laura Kelly sided with the left wing of her party instead. Kansans know Derek will be a Governor who listens to the people. That’s why Derek continues to win the endorsement of so many great people and organizations - see for yourself! Check out each of our recent endorsements below: “The Leavenworth County Republican Party was proud to endorse Derek Schmidt for Governor at our annual Free State Dinner on April 9th. Derek Schmidt is an impressive, proven, and committed leader who has always worked hard to improve the lives and opportunities of Kansans. He shares our values and he fights every day for us, particularly when the Biden administration constantly overreaches and intrudes into our lives. His track record speaks for itself, and we wholly believe that he will continue to serve Kansans very well as our Governor. Laura Kelly and Joe Biden’s reckless policies and failed leadership have made life harder for Americans. Their liberal agenda has led to rocketing inflation, rising crime rates, a historic border crisis, and an unprecedented attack on our freedoms through COVID-19 lockdowns and mandates. We are grateful that the Schmidt family has taken on this mission to save Kansas, and we hope that voters in Leavenworth County and across Kansas will join us in supporting Derek Schmidt for Governor.” Leavenworth County Republican Party “I met Derek Schmidt when I was interning at the Capital 12 years ago. He treated me with as much respect as an intern as when I then later served in our State Senate. That’s how he lives his life. He cares about the people of Kansas. During my time on the Senate Judiciary Committee, I watched him successfully lead efforts to toughen penalties against those that defraud our seniors and strengthen our laws against human trafficking. He stands up for Kansans at all stages of life, including our most vulnerable, the unborn. As a farmer, I’m thankful for his willingness to be a voice for Kansas farmers and ranchers at the state and national levels, when challenging burdensome regulations that have come from the Obama & Biden Administrations. I’m also thankful for his willingness to serve our state as its next governor and he has my full support.” Former State Senator Garrett Love “The Finney County Republican Party Central Committee has endorsed Attorney General Derek Schmidt for Governor of Kansas. Kansas needs Derek Schmidt to get us back on track after now more than three years of failures and ineffectiveness in the governor’s office. In contrast, Derek has a strong track record at the attorney general’s office. He’s always backed the blue, preserved law and order, fought for individual liberty, and scored many victories against both the Obama and Biden administrations when they overreached. Finney County knows Derek Schmidt because he prioritizes visiting with us and listening to our concerns. Laura Kelly has been bad for Kansas families, schools, jobs, and businesses. To put it plainly, we cannot afford four more years with her in office. We hope all Republicans, and all Kansans, will join us and support Derek Schmidt for Governor and his positive visions for the future of our state.” Finney County Republican Party "I want to publicly endorse Attorney General Derek Schmidt for the Office of Governor for the State of Kansas. Over the past several years, I worked as a Detective for the Woodson County Sheriff's Office and worked closely with the Office of the Attorney General of Kansas on many criminal cases. General Schmidt conducts his office in a manner that assists all law enforcement agencies. I am certain that he will carry this same professionalism into the Office of Governor of the State of Kansas." Woodson County Sheriff Jeffery A. McCullough We sincerely appreciate all of the support. –Team Schmidt | | PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC., KELLY ARNOLD, TREASURER. | | | ---|---|---

body:

| | | **Take Our Trump Priorities Survey**
Did you know that your response to our Trump Priorities survey is currently **INCOMPLETE!**

**[We are compiling the results tomorrow, so if you want your voice to be heard, I'm asking you to take the survey by 11:59 pm.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60219566:6PZjBwosN:m:1:3317145305:2B54D31C5B54602ED3080A1CB294E744:r "We are compiling the results tomorrow, so if you want your voice to be heard, I’m asking
you to take the survey by 11:59 pm.")**

As House Conservatives develop our strategy to take back the House, we are asking a select group of grassroots supporters to share their thoughts with Conservative Leaders. _**It is only a few questions and takes just a minute, but your opinions will be crucial to shaping our plans to fire Nancy Pelosi and restore an American First agenda in Congress. **_

Thank you for your support,

Sherry, Survey Coordinator (via ROL)

subject: Trump just got off the stage here in Ohio

body:
We’ve got to stop his momentum and fight for working people across America.
| | | [](https://go.dscc.org/go/7515?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20220423-TimRyan-PostTrumpRally-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20220423-TimRyan-PostTrumpRally-Pros-sl1&akid=3941%2E9716520%2EXMWvB0)
| | [DONATE $5](https://go.dscc.org/go/7515?amount=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20220423-TimRyan-PostTrumpRally-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20220423-TimRyan-PostTrumpRally-Pros-sl1&akid=3941%2E9716520%2EXMWvB0)
---
Your contribution will be split between Tim Ryan for Senate and the DSCC to flip Ohio and keep the Senate blue.
Friend -- I’m Tim Ryan, and I'm running in Ohio for the chance to fight like hell for America’s working families in the U.S. Senate.

But to get there, I'll need to beat the out-of-touch millionaire who Donald Trump is throwing his weight behind, and **Trump just walked off stage after a HUGE rally where he took _direct aim_ at this race. So I need to ask you personally:**

[**Will you split a $5 donation between my campaign and the DSCC to flip Ohio blue and expand our Senate majority?**](https://go.dscc.org/go/7515?amount=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20220423-TimRyan-PostTrumpRally-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20220423-TimRyan-PostTrumpRally-Pros-sl1&akid=3941%2E9716520%2EXMWvB0)

**Ohio is a battleground state, and _the winner of our race this November could decide the Senate majority._** Republicans are wising up to the fact that they’re in for a challenge, and they're spending _millions_ to beat me.

But they aren't stopping there. They just brought in Trump _himself_ to boost my eventual opponent, **and if we don't fight back, we could lose our chance to flip this Republican-held seat and expand our Democratic majority.**

That’s why I’m coming to you today. **We set an _urgent_ $25,000 grassroots fundraising goal, and Trump's rally tonight makes that goal even more crucial.** With the deadline just hours away, it’s now or never.

**[Please split a donation of $5 or more between my campaign and the DSCC to help us turn Ohio blue and expand our Democratic majority so we can deliver for working people:](https://go.dscc.org/go/7515?amount=5&t=9&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20220423-TimRyan-PostTrumpRally-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20220423-TimRyan-PostTrumpRally-Pros-sl1&akid=3941%2E9716520%2EXMWvB0)**
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately and be split between Tim Ryan for Senate and the DSCC.

| [Donate $5](https://go.dscc.org/go/7515?amount=5&t=10&amount=5&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20220423-TimRyan-PostTrumpRally-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20220423-TimRyan-PostTrumpRally-Pros-sl1&akid=3941%2E9716520%2EXMWvB0)

---
| [Donate $25](https://go.dscc.org/go/7515?amount=5&t=12&amount=25&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20220423-TimRyan-PostTrumpRally-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20220423-TimRyan-PostTrumpRally-Pros-sl1&akid=3941%2E9716520%2EXMWvB0)

I'm grateful for your help. Thank you.

\--Tim

Tim Ryan
U.S. Representative, Ohio's 13th District

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/7515?amount=5&t=14&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20220423-TimRyan-PostTrumpRally-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20220423-TimRyan-PostTrumpRally-Pros-sl1&akid=3941%2E9716520%2EXMWvB0)

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: Hollywoke Punches Florida
body:
[****](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60215371:6eqK9woJN:m:1:3253819041:EBBB71C14FAC60DF68D04B7496080D4E:r)

Peter,
On Sunday, Florida was again the Left's favorite punching bag as out-of-touch Hollywood elites continued their smears against me.
But I can tell you this, if Hollywood is attacking you, you must be doing something right.
I wish I could say I was surprised to see spoiled Hollywood hypocrites lecture parents about what is best for their children, but sadly their willingness to lie, distort and distract is par for the course. _**Their dishonesty knows no bounds. **_
_**If the same Hollywood elites who upheld degenerates like Harvey Weinstein now oppose our efforts to protect parental rights, I wear that like a badge of honor. **_
Rest assured - I'm not worried about what out of touch "entertainers" have to say, and I'm certainly not going to be intimidated by people who don't live in reality. **And the chances of me backing down to Disney-owned ABC or the low-rated Oscars is precisely zero. No amount of sloganeering from the liberal machine will change that.**
Despite these baseless charges from Hollywoke and the legacy media, I was proud to sign the Parental Rights in Education Bill to ensure that children K - 3 are not taught R-rated content in their G-rated years.
Peter, I will always stand up for parents and families and for what's right. **I 'm not backing down.**
**[Can you help me to punch back and continue to fight against the radical Left and the dishonest corporate media? Rush in $50, $25, or $15 now>>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60215371:6eqK9woJN:m:1:3253819041:EBBB71C14FAC60DF68D04B7496080D4E:r "https://secure.winred.com/rondesantis/hollywoke-punches-florida-hf")**
Sincerely,
Ron DeSantis

[DONATE NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60215371:6eqK9woJN:m:1:3253819041:EBBB71C14FAC60DF68D04B7496080D4E:r)
---

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: Hollywoke Punches Florida
body:
[****](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60218939:6RNy_wooN:m:1:3317145305:2DE7AB122E99A54C40D0C3B3B9118325:r)

Peter,
On Sunday, Florida was again the Left's favorite punching bag as out-of-touch Hollywood elites continued their smears against me.
But I can tell you this, if Hollywood is attacking you, you must be doing something right.
I wish I could say I was surprised to see spoiled Hollywood hypocrites lecture parents about what is best for their children, but sadly their willingness to lie, distort and distract is par for the course. _**Their dishonesty knows no bounds. **_
_**If the same Hollywood elites who upheld degenerates like Harvey Weinstein now oppose our efforts to protect parental rights, I wear that like a badge of honor. **_
Rest assured - I'm not worried about what out of touch "entertainers" have to say, and I'm certainly not going to be intimidated by people who don't live in reality. **And the chances of me backing down to Disney-owned ABC or the low-rated Oscars is precisely zero. No amount of sloganeering from the liberal machine will change that.**
Despite these baseless charges from Hollywoke and the legacy media, I was proud to sign the Parental Rights in Education Bill to ensure that children K - 3 are not taught R-rated content in their G-rated years.
Peter, I will always stand up for parents and families and for what's right. **I 'm not backing down.**
**[Can you help me to punch back and continue to fight against the radical Left and the dishonest corporate media? Rush in $50, $25, or $15 now>>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60218939:6RNy_wooN:m:1:3317145305:2DE7AB122E99A54C40D0C3B3B9118325:r "https://secure.winred.com/rondesantis/hollywoke-punches-florida-hf")**
Sincerely,
Ron DeSantis

[DONATE NOW](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60218939:6RNy_wooN:m:1:3317145305:2DE7AB122E99A54C40D0C3B3B9118325:r)

body:
New viewer added>>> [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6898%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=2pAoDe18Ac0XICL99s2udw&sysid=1)
New viewer added>>> Friends, Tax day has come and gone. When you were filing, did you notice a new set of eyes on your bank account? **_It was probably the IRS!_** [_**Keep the IRS Out of Your Bank Account**_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c60007%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XavkAwTjY%2fDXCbvyVxtSkg&sysid=1) **Joe Biden has encouraged the IRS to look through anyone’s bank account who has more than $600**. _Biden’s radical spending spree has to be paid for somehow, and he wants to make sure the IRS gets every penny it can from hardworking taxpayers._ We think this is an atrocious display of government overreach and a step down a dangerous path. **House Republicans want to nip this government overreach in the bud, but we need a majority!**
We can’t help keep the IRS out of your bank account without first taking back the House. **Friends, will you help take back the House and keep eyes off your bank account with a small donation TODAY?** [_**Chip in Any Amount**_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c60008%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BcwuTWICIAZZZo92J%2bOEnw&sysid=1) [_**Chip in $10**_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c60009%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=V6a2qMTw2mSS9hPngp54zA&sysid=1) [_**Chip in $25**_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c60000%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FmXW6WSoNYRGQUI2cwXJsQ&sysid=1) [_**Chip in $35**_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c60001%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=uPNUhoJsgMyqo8weXvco%2bg&sysid=1) [_**Chip in $50**_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c60002%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RrOS0Vc3riLo51e3I3Ujmg&sysid=1) This Biden Administration is out of control, and this privacy violation is just the latest example. name: ICYMI News
subject: Future generations are counting on your response
body:
Please take time right now to review and complete Hillsdale College’s RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z13ulcmov0s9lonmck2mrg3k34in6vdr9v3r38qo_rp22sh2s8i66pb0ctie2ob5c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq9dhkumqb7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65t3m61o76o3im9rr9d7362pj8ppncsqmcclj6dir5d9n6kq39dpnm3ie6c9jegoefkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1p30phheiqj4pti6lj39o5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zespfiq0sc1352vvanebhkp1vct2rielf816ck6o_rp22sh2s8i66pb0ctie2ob5c9h2bs) Dear Fellow American, Can you do me a favor? Please take time right now to review and complete Hillsdale College’s [**RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey**.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zllr7hkjj4nfp1d6tunm06dbblu1ggn8guo9l4eo_rp22sh2s8i66pb0ctie2ob5c9h2bs) My name is Bill Gray, and I’m the associate vice president of national donor outreach at Hillsdale College. It’s my responsibility to invite like-minded conservatives (like you!) to support Hillsdale. **I don’t use the word “battle” lightly, but with the stakes so high one must be blunt.** It’s clear to me that we are in a fight for the future of our nation—a fight against progressives who are targeting our youngest citizens. These so-called “progressives” seek to undermine traditional patriotism and ultimately transform American government and society. _The New York Times’_ recent “1619 Project” is the prime example of this effort to inject into the minds of our youngest citizens a biased distortion of our nation’s history. If you haven’t heard, the “1619 Project” places the founding of America in 1619, when the first slave arrived in Jamestown, rather than in 1776 when the Declaration of Independence proclaimed that “all men are created equal” and endowed by God with “unalienable rights.” **“Our democracy’s founding ideals,” the “1619 Project” proclaims, “were false when they were written.”** Outrageous! _The New York Times’_ stated goal with the “1619 Project” is to influence the curricula of K-12 schools nationwide. They teach young people that slavery—not freedom—is and always will be the central and defining idea of the American experience, making our country irredeemable. This project has garnered universal acclaim from the news media. In fact, the lead essayist just won a Pulitzer Prize! There are even talks about making the “1619 Project” into a feature film. **Given popular and widespread efforts like these, we should not be surprised that there is a decreasing sense of patriotism among younger Americans—and an increasing tendency to embrace socialism and other liberty-destroying ideas.** Education has become a battleground, and reviving a proper understanding of American history and government, especially among younger citizens, must be our** _most urgent priority._** Hillsdale College is at the forefront of this effort. **We are actively engaging the Left on the battlefield of education. And I need your help to make this effort even more effective.** Hillsdale is America’s most powerful advocate for intelligent and informed patriotism—our best defense against the loss of our liberty and insidious beliefs like socialism. We do this on our Michigan campus, with an undergraduate and graduate student body of over 1,500, and through education that reaches and teaches millions of citizens each year on behalf of liberty. And in response to new efforts such as the media-driven “1619 Project” that seek to turn the next generation of citizens against the principles of the Declaration of Independence and the U.S. Constitution, Hillsdale must expand this critical work—especially in 2020. As I said before, to fight and win this battle, Hillsdale needs your help right away. The FIRST step I need you to take right now is to complete the **RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY! Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey**. This national project seeks to make it clear that people in your state and nationwide still revere our founding principles of liberty, and refuse to let them be corrupted by those who hold America in contempt. **As _The New York Times’_ efforts make clear, powerful forces vehemently oppose this view of America, and their assault on our glorious history is taking place before our very eyes. ** _Our ongoing response, rooted in genuine learning, and proven to reach millions of citizens, must be escalated as quickly as possible._ And if, upon completing your Battle Plan, you feel a strong connection to Hillsdale’s work, then I urge you to please consider including a generous tax-deductible gift in support of expanding these efforts on behalf of liberty. Based on the costs of Hillsdale’s multiple educational programs—which I will outline fo**r you shortly—it has been determined that to fully implement this[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zk1q1utsagcn2g791on17u9adroqpb3ktju0jkrg_rp22sh2s8i66pb0ctie2ob5c9h2bs)** for maximum impact, Hillsdale College must raise at least $1,016,700 within the next month. And unlike most colleges and universities that rely on federal funding and subsidies, EVERY PENNY of funding for Hillsdale’s educational outreach comes from the voluntary support of intelligent patriots like you. This is because Hillsdale College refuses EVEN ONE PENNY of state or federal taxpayer funding—even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. That’s so important, I need to say it again—Hillsdale College refuses EVERY PENNY of government funding! **In this way, Hillsdale remains truly independent, avoiding unconstitutional regulations that would violate the College’s educational mission.** Hillsdale has built national support from hundreds of thousands of citizens. These intelligent patriots know that liberty in America is in trouble thanks to progressive control of our schools and institutions. And these citizens are determined to preserve our liberty—as I believe you are. These supporters give what they can, when they can—gifts of $25 or $50 or more, sometimes much more ... because they understand that every dollar given goes to reaching and teaching millions of people—including our nation’s youth—with genuine learning about liberty and the Constitution. The gift you choose to give today will determine whether Hillsdale can activate each component of the **[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0gdf3omfcnq24bs42h5gpfkm3mrq6oth80p5rh8_rp22sh2s8i66pb0ctie2ob5c9h2bs)** And this entire plan is tied to Hillsdale’s proven programs and publications that are educating millions of Americans right now. Here are the key aspects of Hillsdale’s plan for your review and feedback: **BATTLE PLAN POINT #1: Identify the Critical Concerns of Everyday Americans** I mentioned that our network of supporters that is hundreds of thousands of patriots strong—such a broad base of support gives us invaluable public-opinion data on what Americans are MOST concerned about given the current state of our nation. We are always eager to add new perspectives (like yours) that can make our work the most relevant and timely possible. **Your participation today will allow Hillsdale to strengthen our educational outreach efforts by targeting them where they’re needed most, on the areas of concern that matter most to the American people.** You were selected to be part of this effort based on your record of involvement in causes that strengthen America, AND because of Hillsdale’s confidence that you will respond quickly and honestly, lending your voice to our efforts to restore the Constitution. I’m counting on and very much looking forward to your survey response! **BATTLE PLAN POINT #2: Counter Progressive Teaching in America’s Schools** In this section we dig deep into Hillsdale’s proven educational outreach, and give you a sense of how we lead important conversations surrounding America’s history and founding principles—AND ask what YOU think about these efforts. And make no mistake—Hillsdale is uniquely qualified to drive this effort. Did you know that Hillsdale is one of only a few American colleges and universities that requires each student, regardless of major, to complete a one-semester course on the Constitution? This fact has earned the support of so many Americans who did not attend the College, and who have never even set foot on our campus—they understand that what we teach in our classrooms radiates all over America. Is this important to you? In 2012, Hillsdale began offering online courses _free of charge_ , because we see it as an effective way promote intelligent patriotism and civic virtue. We market the courses on social media and online to reach large audiences, especially younger Americans. The response has been tremendous—over 2.3 million citizens have taken one or more of our online courses. Do you think this is an effective means of reaching and teaching millions of Americans on behalf of liberty? We even have an online course that directly counters _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project.” This free course is called **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** and presents an unbiased and complete account of America’s past. To me this is a great example of why these free courses are needed: They safeguard the country, through education, against the damage to liberty inflicted by the Left. And what do you think about sending a free monthly digest of liberty, to millions of people? This newsletter is called _Imprimis_ , and it features speeches delivered at Hillsdale events by prominent scholars, journalists, and policymakers, focused on political, economic, historic, and cultural topics from a constitutional viewpoint. _Imprimis_ is America’s most widely-circulated publication in support of liberty, reaching more households and businesses than either the _Wall Street Journal_ or the “fake news” _New York Times_. Issues covering topics such as “Rediscovering the Wisdom of American History” and “Shall We Defend our Common History?” set _Imprimis_ apart. The publication is as a powerful counterbalance to the biased media outlets that pursue narrow, ideologically driven distortions of history. (If you’re not yet an _Imprimis_ subscriber, we’ll be happy to sign you up as soon as we hear from you.) **BATTLE PLAN POINT #3: Restore Excellence to K-12 Schools** In this section we explore how Hillsdale College is reshaping American K-12 education, especially through our Barney Charter School Initiative, which helps launch and guide classical K-12 charter schools nationwide, teaching thousands of K-12 students. These schools all have a strong civics curriculum. The curriculum provides young Americans with a solid grounding in our nation’s history, our limited constitutional government, and economics. In doing so, Hillsdale provides communities with a practical model of how schools can best serve students and the country. **Sustained by our supporters, Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative has assisted in the founding of more than 20 classical K-12 charter schools in 11 states, with approximately 12,000 students enrolled. And more of these K-12 schools are opening each year.** Do you support this effort to set a new standard for K-12 education and give young Americans a proper education? Hillsdale also launched a new initiative to send pocket Constitutions to thousands of elementary and junior high schools. We ship them with a promise to send as many pocket Constitutions as their schools need. **The response has been astounding.** We’ve now sent out more than 500,000 pocket Constitutions across the country, and we receive more requests every week. Does this effort to restore the Constitution to K-12 schools sound like a good idea to you? As you select your answers, I believe you will find that Hillsdale’s educational outreach is a powerful way to confront and ultimately overcome the progressive forces that seek to instill in young people the ruinous idea that America stands for slavery, not freedom. I know you love this country, and I hope you will partner with Hillsdale in defending America through education—education aimed at citizens of all ages nationwide. The first step is getting your thoughts on our **[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zmjqu8dk5nfnb2cpnr5b7in5fn48tqceo26qpnk8_rp22sh2s8i66pb0ctie2ob5c9h2bs)**
With your response you will represent your state as part of a major sampling of citizen opinion that can help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views and concerns of mainstream Americans—views that we can make available to policymakers and opinion leaders when we discuss the Left’s agenda, and use to strengthen our educational outreach efforts. What Hillsdale needs now is YOU—your thoughtful input on the work we’re doing, and your generous support to expand our work. **So please complete the[Battle Plan Survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zgamckq2aadh86orvevfqnsbcf6n8qoeq6kln4so_rp22sh2s8i66pb0ctie2ob5c9h2bs) today.**
When you give to Hillsdale and share your opinions, you will join a dedicated and growing team of intelligent patriots, who always step up when the time comes to defend America against the progressives’ attack on American history and liberty. Thank you for your commitment to liberty in America. Warm regards,
Bill Gray
Assoc. Vice President of National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 **P.S**. We are in a battle for the future of America, because the Left is determined to transform our country ... by fundamentally changing how history is taught to young people. Education is the battlefield, and Hillsdale College urgently needs you standing with us to support and sustain our efforts. With your help, we can continue to reach and teach millions of citizens of all ages, especially the youngest Americans, with the principles of liberty underlying the Constitution. Please complete **[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY! Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2thv3tq2gecu08ii9ul20pfd719atfsof16ctog_rp22sh2s8i66pb0ctie2ob5c9h2bs)** to shape Hillsdale College’s defense of America against the progressive assault on history. clean_body: Please take time right now to review and complete Hillsdale College’s RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, Can you do me a favor? Please take time right now to review and complete Hillsdale College’s My name is Bill Gray, and I’m the associate vice president of national donor outreach at Hillsdale College. It’s my responsibility to invite like-minded conservatives (like you!) to support Hillsdale. I don’t use the word “battle” lightly, but with the stakes so high one must be blunt. It’s clear to me that we are in a fight for the future of our nation—a fight against progressives who are targeting our youngest citizens. These so-called “progressives” seek to undermine traditional patriotism and ultimately transform American government and society. The New York Times’ recent “1619 Project” is the prime example of this effort to inject into the minds of our youngest citizens a biased distortion of our nation’s history. If you haven’t heard, the “1619 Project” places the founding of America in 1619, when the first slave arrived in Jamestown, rather than in 1776 when the Declaration of Independence proclaimed that “all men are created equal” and endowed by God with “unalienable rights.” “Our democracy’s founding ideals,” the “1619 Project” proclaims, “were false when they were written.” Outrageous! The New York Times’ stated goal with the “1619 Project” is to influence the curricula of K-12 schools nationwide. They teach young people that slavery—not freedom—is and always will be the central and defining idea of the American experience, making our country irredeemable. This project has garnered universal acclaim from the news media. In fact, the lead essayist just won a Pulitzer Prize! There are even talks about making the “1619 Project” into a feature film. Given popular and widespread efforts like these, we should not be surprised that there is a decreasing sense of patriotism among younger Americans—and an increasing tendency to embrace socialism and other liberty-destroying ideas. Education has become a battleground, and reviving a proper understanding of American history and government, especially among younger citizens, must be our most urgent priority. Hillsdale College is at the forefront of this effort. We are actively engaging the Left on the battlefield of education. And I need your help to make this effort even more effective. Hillsdale is America’s most powerful advocate for intelligent and informed patriotism—our best defense against the loss of our liberty and insidious beliefs like socialism. We do this on our Michigan campus, with an undergraduate and graduate student body of over 1,500, and through education that reaches and teaches millions of citizens each year on behalf of liberty. And in response to new efforts such as the media-driven “1619 Project” that seek to turn the next generation of citizens against the principles of the Declaration of Independence and the U.S. Constitution, Hillsdale must expand this critical work—especially in 2020. As I said before, to fight and win this battle, Hillsdale needs your help right away. The FIRST step I need you to take right now is to complete the RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY! Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey. This national project seeks to make it clear that people in your state and nationwide still revere our founding principles of liberty, and refuse to let them be corrupted by those who hold America in contempt. As The New York Times’ efforts make clear, powerful forces vehemently oppose this view of America, and their assault on our glorious history is taking place before our very eyes. Our ongoing response, rooted in genuine learning, and proven to reach millions of citizens, must be escalated as quickly as possible. And if, upon completing your Battle Plan, you feel a strong connection to Hillsdale’s work, then I urge you to please consider including a generous tax-deductible gift in support of expanding these efforts on behalf of liberty. Based on the costs of Hillsdale’s multiple educational programs—which I will outline for you shortly—it has been determined that to fully implement this for maximum impact, Hillsdale College must raise at least $1,016,700 within the next month. And unlike most colleges and universities that rely on federal funding and subsidies, EVERY PENNY of funding for Hillsdale’s educational outreach comes from the voluntary support of intelligent patriots like you. This is because Hillsdale College refuses EVEN ONE PENNY of state or federal taxpayer funding—even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. That’s so important, I need to say it again—Hillsdale College refuses EVERY PENNY of government funding! In this way, Hillsdale remains truly independent, avoiding unconstitutional regulations that would violate the College’s educational mission. Hillsdale has built national support from hundreds of thousands of citizens. These intelligent patriots know that liberty in America is in trouble thanks to progressive control of our schools and institutions. And these citizens are determined to preserve our liberty—as I believe you are. These supporters give what they can, when they can—gifts of $25 or $50 or more, sometimes much more ... because they understand that every dollar given goes to reaching and teaching millions of people—including our nation’s youth—with genuine learning about liberty and the Constitution. The gift you choose to give today will determine whether Hillsdale can activate each component of the And this entire plan is tied to Hillsdale’s proven programs and publications that are educating millions of Americans right now. Here are the key aspects of Hillsdale’s plan for your review and feedback: BATTLE PLAN POINT #1: Identify the Critical Concerns of Everyday Americans I mentioned that our network of supporters that is hundreds of thousands of patriots strong—such a broad base of support gives us invaluable public-opinion data on what Americans are MOST concerned about given the current state of our nation. We are always eager to add new perspectives (like yours) that can make our work the most relevant and timely possible. Your participation today will allow Hillsdale to strengthen our educational outreach efforts by targeting them where they’re needed most, on the areas of concern that matter most to the American people. You were selected to be part of this effort based on your record of involvement in causes that strengthen America, AND because of Hillsdale’s confidence that you will respond quickly and honestly, lending your voice to our efforts to restore the Constitution. I’m counting on and very much looking forward to your survey response! BATTLE PLAN POINT #2: Counter Progressive Teaching in America’s Schools In this section we dig deep into Hillsdale’s proven educational outreach, and give you a sense of how we lead important conversations surrounding America’s history and founding principles—AND ask what YOU think about these efforts. And make no mistake—Hillsdale is uniquely qualified to drive this effort. Did you know that Hillsdale is one of only a few American colleges and universities that requires each student, regardless of major, to complete a one-semester course on the Constitution? This fact has earned the support of so many Americans who did not attend the College, and who have never even set foot on our campus—they understand that what we teach in our classrooms radiates all over America. Is this important to you? In 2012, Hillsdale began offering online courses free of charge , because we see it as an effective way promote intelligent patriotism and civic virtue. We market the courses on social media and online to reach large audiences, especially younger Americans. The response has been tremendous—over 2.3 million citizens have taken one or more of our online courses. Do you think this is an effective means of reaching and teaching millions of Americans on behalf of liberty? We even have an online course that directly counters The New York Times’ “1619 Project.” This free course is called “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope” and presents an unbiased and complete account of America’s past. To me this is a great example of why these free courses are needed: They safeguard the country, through education, against the damage to liberty inflicted by the Left. And what do you think about sending a free monthly digest of liberty, to millions of people? This newsletter is called Imprimis , and it features speeches delivered at Hillsdale events by prominent scholars, journalists, and policymakers, focused on political, economic, historic, and cultural topics from a constitutional viewpoint. Imprimis is America’s most widely-circulated publication in support of liberty, reaching more households and businesses than either the Wall Street Journal or the “fake news” New York Times. Issues covering topics such as “Rediscovering the Wisdom of American History” and “Shall We Defend our Common History?” set Imprimis apart. The publication is as a powerful counterbalance to the biased media outlets that pursue narrow, ideologically driven distortions of history. (If you’re not yet an Imprimis subscriber, we’ll be happy to sign you up as soon as we hear from you.) BATTLE PLAN POINT #3: Restore Excellence to K-12 Schools In this section we explore how Hillsdale College is reshaping American K-12 education, especially through our Barney Charter School Initiative, which helps launch and guide classical K-12 charter schools nationwide, teaching thousands of K-12 students. These schools all have a strong civics curriculum. The curriculum provides young Americans with a solid grounding in our nation’s history, our limited constitutional government, and economics. In doing so, Hillsdale provides communities with a practical model of how schools can best serve students and the country. Sustained by our supporters, Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative has assisted in the founding of more than 20 classical K-12 charter schools in 11 states, with approximately 12,000 students enrolled. And more of these K-12 schools are opening each year. Do you support this effort to set a new standard for K-12 education and give young Americans a proper education? Hillsdale also launched a new initiative to send pocket Constitutions to thousands of elementary and junior high schools. We ship them with a promise to send as many pocket Constitutions as their schools need. The response has been astounding. We’ve now sent out more than 500,000 pocket Constitutions across the country, and we receive more requests every week. Does this effort to restore the Constitution to K-12 schools sound like a good idea to you? As you select your answers, I believe you will find that Hillsdale’s educational outreach is a powerful way to confront and ultimately overcome the progressive forces that seek to instill in young people the ruinous idea that America stands for slavery, not freedom. I know you love this country, and I hope you will partner with Hillsdale in defending America through education—education aimed at citizens of all ages nationwide. The first step is getting your thoughts on our With your response you will represent your state as part of a major sampling of citizen opinion that can help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views and concerns of mainstream Americans—views that we can make available to policymakers and opinion leaders when we discuss the Left’s agenda, and use to strengthen our educational outreach efforts. What Hillsdale needs now is YOU—your thoughtful input on the work we’re doing, and your generous support to expand our work. So please complete the today. When you give to Hillsdale and share your opinions, you will join a dedicated and growing team of intelligent patriots, who always step up when the time comes to defend America against the progressives’ attack on American history and liberty. Thank you for your commitment to liberty in America. Warm regards, Bill Gray Assoc. Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 P.S. We are in a battle for the future of America, because the Left is determined to transform our country ... by fundamentally changing how history is taught to young people. Education is the battlefield, and Hillsdale College urgently needs you standing with us to support and sustain our efforts. With your help, we can continue to reach and teach millions of citizens of all ages, especially the youngest Americans, with the principles of liberty underlying the Constitution. Please complete to shape Hillsdale College’s defense of America against the progressive assault on history. Your response is needed within five days so we can finalize plans to expand our educational outreach on behalf of liberty. name: Ron Johnson
subject: DECISION MADE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc
body:
This is a longer email than usual but for the past months, I have become the #1 target of the Left, the liberal biased media, an
[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2za5mfno8gu9kog4b9l1lj01k5vpscb02g4qp6q00_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk4qj4ttkumqn4s9nmorb79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onnmuqj1o9n6hojad9jmlg6dddkccr71p3nmgr74sdi6ioe6c3he8r32c7661qr0puie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdg74c3665qbacj7m8q6cdb0m9j61o5lcdge1d9h66qj3dbi46h22sh2s8i66pb0ctie2ob1c5h2bs)

| |
---
| | | Friend,

This is a longer email than usual but for the past months, I have become the #1 target of the Left, the liberal biased media, and Big Tech giants like Facebook, Twitter, and YouTube.

I have been smeared again and again by media companies like The New York Times, Washington Post, and the Milwaukee Journal Sentinel where they distort my comments, twist them through a liberal prism, and omit most of what I actually say.

I have been silenced, censored, and suspended by the social media oligarchs because I tell the truth, and oftentimes, it is the truth the liberal mainstream media does not want to hear. It counters their narrative, and they refuse to allow it. So they silence free speech.

Yet, despite all of this unconstitutional collusion between these far-Left parties working for political gain at the expense of the American people, I will not give up. They will not deter me.
And that is why I decided to run for re-election.

I am running for a third term for the simple reason that I believe I am the best person for the job. I believe that I am the best candidate to address the national debt, work to lower inflation, secure the border, and fight for America First policies. I believe I am the best candidate to put an end to the Biden administration's constant record of misinformation and their continued lack of transparency with Congress, the press, and you, Friend. I believe I am the best candidate for Wisconsin because I tell the truth and speak for the minority, even when the majority is doing everything they can to silence me.

Now that I have announced, the Left will seize every opportunity to destroy me politically. They will continue to write manipulative hit pieces and orchestrate smear campaigns across all mediums. They will attack and distort my record of success, my record of searching for the truth, and my record of fighting for the people of Wisconsin in any way they can. The Democrats even placed a $2M ad buy just moments after I announced my campaign for re-election.

And that's why I need your help.

_**[Any help you can provide will make an enormous difference and will be greatly appreciated. $5, $10, $25, or even $35 will help me respond to these hit pieces and smear campaigns. It will take all of us working together to defeat the Left and their dishonest tactics.

Can I count on you to chip in? We need to start working right now.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z06tf07n3vsc7cqb8rppkuc3naoqhj4u9623vgqo_rp22sh2s8i66pb0ctie2ob1c5h2bs "Any help you can provide will make an enormous difference and will be greatly appreciated. $5, $10, $25, or even $35 will help me respond to these hit pieces and smear campaigns. It will take all of us working together to defeat the Left and their dishonest tactics.Can I count on you to chip in? We need to start working right now.")**_

Ron Johnson
---
| | | [Fight for Freedom](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zdr617282qikeau5pun8fql2srti6ck035uomjvo_rp22sh2s8i66pb0ctie2ob1c5h2bs "Fight for Freedom")
---
| |
* * *
---
| | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zvbiajkdt8q3gje4q2il3bf4bjmtb8m6a6bgqbgg_rp22sh2s8i66pb0ctie2ob1c5h2bs "RonJon Announcement")
---
| Friend, It’s Ron Johnson.

I have just announced my campaign for re-election to the U.S. Senate.

I never could have imagined our country would be where it is today. From out of control spending to reckless liberal mandates, America is on the precipice of disaster.

This will not be an easy win but I am ready to fight to **SAVE AMERICA** from the Democrats.

**[Can I count on you to join me?](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zanj1mlr813dj5h4hb56h6sfbdi8sqm8fij2fc6g_rp22sh2s8i66pb0ctie2ob1c5h2bs "Please click here to donate now")**
---
| | | [DONATE TODAY](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z50kkg0as35rv28vbcac3qbcltqh5ap2f21iftmo_rp22sh2s8i66pb0ctie2ob1c5h2bs "SAVE THE SENATE")
---
| | Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc.
---

Oshkosh, WI 54903-1159

name: American Update
subject: Learn from Victor Davis Hanson
body:
World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9958%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=GDVBsuoY6o7qgL7izgq3Bw&sysid=1)
| | | This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c29353%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JtMiQjIBnNwMfgDu6uT%2bOQ&sysid=1)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. As we lose more and more of these courageous soldiers, we also lose the living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---
| | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled [“](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c29354%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=aHu%2fPhQvZnnR4BYgOpkYog&sysid=1)**[The Second World Wars.”](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c29365%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XyXS%2fKqMVP1aPlgQmL%2f%2bzw&sysid=1) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian **Victor Davis Hanson** of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c29366%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mkibH9v2qtQctD9Hhh%2fQSg&sysid=1)
---
| | Simply use this secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD today: _[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c29367%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QfrNpaGONgHyKbeigJBr2w&sysid=1)_ Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9958%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=GDVBsuoY6o7qgL7izgq3Bw&sysid=1)_

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zh486ifpt0f6b0v788pjctm61l4fcgho9j22mteo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk1p7fcdkmcqjas3h6gonact66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2ulr72dble4oj2o3gslin9d9ks1qr4sdncprjfc5gsdjj3dtkm2r33c74e5p62s77q9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphhmspmac3nc1j78p5jckrr1db5e8gq48bi4bh28or5c1jm9o70chjm49fg)
This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zvv7684pd35bb1krtt7uc9rg0klsj036ngl6s6lg_rp22sh2s8i66pb0ctie1o34cth2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z8bgvn3lonbgeb2fojnosr3ucrlu11k9sgj841q0_rp22sh2s8i66pb0ctie1o34cth2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zq1dhbe58bv0q2ki6el7pcl19t6djde8cju0si80_rp22sh2s8i66pb0ctie1o34cth2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z2jane790nr7sak30t7fst8611idej3abf4kove0_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or5c1jm9o70chjm49fg)

body:
Have you ever heard of 1st Lieutenant Clint Lorance? He was once a decorated soldier...until he was wrongly accused of murde
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z2pb9r3rbqs0o7adqp6vnb4tvj2do7i11fvn73ag_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c3g68or4c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65t9lehrr7c5gmjg7apbnmir3bdbm6qp38djnclj68sble1pm6pjieqrr4tbl69oefkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj33dpjchjrcob664qb6ob7m2qmash5u)
| | | [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zceusmj8jjfrn8rsd3leg2m8ofag805303gffigo_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c3g68or4c9h2bs)
---
Fellow patriot, Have you ever heard of 1st Lieutenant Clint Lorance? He was once a decorated soldier...until he was wrongly accused of murder while defending our country. But with the help of our team he was able to get a Presidential pardon. _**[Now, Lieutenant Lorance has an important message he wants you to see. >>>](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z613jquu6tq5fg4gaqg0bh5je3esrlkvb11r0qqg_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c3g68or4c9h2bs)**_
---
[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zv6fssk044sk6l9b4sdl8fhel9hnv72jlu46tsto_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c3g68or4c9h2bs)
---
| | [**WATCH THE VIDEO**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zh5vmj9p7iqhcrp5epa5n60lec41903vhmr8l7kg_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c3g68or4c9h2bs)
---
Despite the pardon, Lieutenant Lorance is still working with UAP to officially clear his name and tackle the costs and hurdles associated with such legal battles._ _ We fight to destroy obstacles standing in the way of war heroes like 1LT Lorance so they can FINALLY get the justice they deserve. _ _ And our efforts are funded by generous grassroots patriots. People like YOU who hear these gut wrenching stories about how our Defenders are being treated and want to do something to help. _ _ **With your support, UAP is able to help these Warriors fight unjust charges, clear their names, and reunite with their families. ** As you are reading this email, some of America’s best and bravest Warriors are being heinously punished for crimes they didn’t even commit**.** Now, they are fighting tooth and nail to clear their names. **But, Fellow patriot, you can help them get their lives back.** _ _ _**[Donate now to help us clear the names of innocent war Heroes like Clint Lorance. >>>](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zsfvot6b9mf8mlf3rifprjqa0dv02dsppgu60eu0_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c3g68or4c9h2bs)**__[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zlq7t8filjan4ehmbsqklkogqnhbshtgan6l8ch8_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c3g68or4c9h2bs)_
---
[**DONATE NOW**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zec218lb2v0gulu99391g71ildsfa1eklfe0f97o_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c3g68or4c9h2bs)
---
Semper Fi’
---
[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zde12dtl5959i2k4k1knp5e2d6tqaoi53prb1rio_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c3g68or4c9h2bs)
---
[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zsn8vdb75k5aktu5tkp5uiqhtapnjaq892pt6hng_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c3g68or4c9h2bs)
---
David “Bull” GurfeinLtCol., USMCR (Ret.)CEO, United American Patriots
---
|
---
| | United American Patriots is a grassroots organization that helps provide financial support to our nation’s Warriors who have been wrongly accused, prosecuted, or imprisoned for crimes they did not commit. We rely on donations from our network of patriots to help these American heroes and their families. _If you want to help support our mission, you can make a donation to our Warrior Fund today._
