name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: We're suing Twitter and we need your help
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60218976:JEskUwoBN:m:1:3317145305:9FE7EEA7571F6AB313F17DEF303E15C4:r) Dear Peter, I'm not going to beat around the bush, we are living in a dystopian, tyrannical state. You may have seen that, just a few days ago, the Babylon Bee, a popular conservative news satire publication was suspended indefinitely for calling Rachel Levine, Joe Biden's transgender Assistant Secretary for Health, the "Man of the Year." This is the post in question: [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60218976:JEskUwoBN:m:1:3317145305:9FE7EEA7571F6AB313F17DEF303E15C4:r) This hypocrisy is so rich. Twitter banned the Babylon Bee for satire. ... **While The Taliban, a terrorist organization, is allowed to stay on Twitter.** What's worse is my team at the Center for American Liberty has discovered that powerful elected politicians are colluding with Big Tech corporations like Facebook and Twitter to de-platform and silence conservatives like you and me. **In other words, we've caught big government using tax-payer funding to silence their political opponents.** And if someone does not immediately stand up against this, the freedoms enshrined in our Constitution will become nothing more than meaningless words on a piece of paper. ** ** **That's why we launched a lawsuit against Twitter, U.S. Senator Alex Padilla, and a handful of liberal elected officials for their state-sponsored plot to eliminate our First Amendment liberties,****and we need your help to win.** [**Will you join us in our lawsuit against Twitter and Sen. Padilla and help defend the First Amendment?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60218976:JEskUwoBN:m:1:3317145305:9FE7EEA7571F6AB313F17DEF303E15C4:r) Let me explain. Like millions of Americans after the 2020 presidential election, conservative activist Rogan O'Handley took to Twitter to express his concerns over the dubious election procedures and skepticism of the results. [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60218976:JEskUwoBN:m:1:3317145305:9FE7EEA7571F6AB313F17DEF303E15C4:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60218976:JEskUwoBN:m:1:3317145305:9FE7EEA7571F6AB313F17DEF303E15C4:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60218976:JEskUwoBN:m:1:3317145305:9FE7EEA7571F6AB313F17DEF303E15C4:r) Shortly after the election, many of Rogan's tweets were removed by Twitter and his account was permanently suspended for "violating the government's rules about election integrity." _In other words, Rogan was censored for his political beliefs. _ But it gets much worse. When Rogan tried to figure out why he was censored, he found that bureaucrats working for then-California Secretary of State, Alex Padilla, had explicitly instructed officials at Twitter to remove his tweets/posts. You see, Alex Padilla was being considered to fill Kamala Harris' vacated seat in the U.S. Senate, and you and I both know that Rogan's tweets would hurt his image and chances of being appointed. **So, the office of Alex Padilla immediately instructed Twitter to shut Rogan up.** **From:** California Secretary of State Communications Department **To:** Twitter **Date:** Tuesday, November 17th, 2020 at 12:31 PM Hi, We wanted to flag this Twitter post: [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60218976:JEskUwoBN:m:1:3317145305:9FE7EEA7571F6AB313F17DEF303E15C4:r) From user @DC_Draino. In this post user claims California of being a culprit of voter fraud, and ignores the fact that we do audit votes. This is a blatant disregard to how our voting process works and creates disinformation and distrust among the general public. Twitter then flagged the post as misinformation, deleted it, and -- a few weeks later -- permanently banned Rogan from the their site. [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60218976:JEskUwoBN:m:1:3317145305:9FE7EEA7571F6AB313F17DEF303E15C4:r) That's why my team and I at the Center for America Liberty are suing Twitter, now-Senator Alex Padilla, California Secretary of State Shirly Weber, and a handful of other leftists for their involvement in this blatant assault on the First Amendment. But the only way we can take on the deep pockets and deep connections of these tyrants is with the help of patriotic Americans like you. [**Will you help us fund this critical lawsuit by sending a generous, tax-deductible contribution of just $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60218976:JEskUwoBN:m:1:3317145305:9FE7EEA7571F6AB313F17DEF303E15C4:r) What makes all of this so much worse is that Rogan is not the only victim of this blatant viewpoint censorship. The New York Post was censored when it posted factual information about Hunter Biden's laptop just weeks before the 2020 election. The Babylon Bee was shut down for a satirical post about Rachel Levine being a man. And Rogan O'Handley has been banned for spreading "misinformation," while Twitter allows Vladimir Putin and the Kremlin remain on the platform. At this point, we know that these bans are nothing more than a corrupt, bad faith attempt to control the information available to the American people, and to protect leftists inside of our government. **That's why the Center for American Liberty needs your help to sue Twitter today. This battle won't be cheap, and we are running out of time to raise the funds needed to keep this case alive before filing this case at the Ninth Circuit Court of Appeals. Would you please chip in $25 or more today**? But let me take a step back and introduce myself. My name is Harmeet Dhillon. Just over two years ago, I founded the Center for American Liberty with the purpose of protecting our First Amendment freedoms and civil liberties from being destroyed. We've taken on Governor Gavin Newsom in California when he unconstitutionally shut down small businesses, criminalized going to church, and kept millions of children locked up in their homes, out of school, during the pandemic. We've taken on Antifa for viciously attacking and nearly killing journalist Ando Ngo, who exposed Antifa's vile, anarchic plot to destroy the United States and turn it into a socialist utopia. **And now, we're taking on Twitter, Sen. Alex Padilla, and others for colluding to eliminate Rogan O'Handley's freedom of speech. ** But as a non-profit organization, everything we do to defend our civil liberties is with the generous help of like-minded conservative patriots like you. And this massive lawsuit is expected to cost us over $1,000,000. _After all, we are taking a multi-billion-dollar company, the state of California, and a handful of well-connected politicians. _ [**So, can I count on you to help us stand up to Twitter and Senator Alex Padilla by making a tax-deductible contribution of $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60218976:JEskUwoBN:m:1:3317145305:9FE7EEA7571F6AB313F17DEF303E15C4:r) I'm not exaggerating when I say that this may be the legal battle that will define our generation, and the future of our country. Will we sit back and allow elitist politicians, billion-dollar corporations, and faceless government agencies to continue to trample our constitutional freedoms? Or will we prove that WE, the American people, are still in control of our own lives? **Please join us in this critical fight to defend the First Amendment by contributing $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today.** Sincerely, Harmeet K. Dhillon P.S. For four years, leftist politicians and mainstream media figures would not let go of the bogus and unproven accusation that President Trump colluded with Russia to "steal" the 2016 election. But now that there is clear evidence that a California elected official colluded with big tech to censor conservatives who wanted to comment on the 2020 election those same leftists are dead-silent. I am absolutely fed up with left's hypocrisy, double-standards, and blatantly unconstitutional behavior. [**That's why I'm urgently asking you to contribute $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty to help us fund our lawsuit against Twitter and Senator Alex Padilla. **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60218976:JEskUwoBN:m:1:3317145305:9FE7EEA7571F6AB313F17DEF303E15C4:r) [**DONATE**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60218976:JEskUwoBN:m:1:3317145305:9FE7EEA7571F6AB313F17DEF303E15C4:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60218976:JEskUwoBN:m:1:3317145305:9FE7EEA7571F6AB313F17DEF303E15C4:r) [Please consider supporting our efforts to defend our Constitution with a donation today.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60218976:JEskUwoBN:m:1:3317145305:9FE7EEA7571F6AB313F17DEF303E15C4:r) The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends.
Â(C) The Center for American Liberty | [www.libertycenter.org](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60218977:JEskUwoBN:m:1:3317145305:9FE7EEA7571F6AB313F17DEF303E15C4:r) PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177 Click here to [unsubscribe.]({{unsubscribeUrl}})
---

subject: Special election in two months: Will you support Sarah Palin?

body:
I am running for Congress because I am sick and tired of what’s happening in D.C.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zd0mvh8qviqqdr6psc5vkk1dj5p5brf5j26k8u00_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2ugor2phkmgor6sr46gp34slkepqeadj6msqr9ornm2oj5d74ear72sjm6epm4s77q9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhm0shgcor6ecr46upb4phge2p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8gq48bi4bh28or5c1ge0pb2c9j649fg)

| | | Friend,

I am running for Congress because I am sick and tired of what's happening in D.C. My special election is in less than 2 months, and I'm facing 47 other candidates!

Yes, you read that right...47 other candidates!

That's why I'm reaching out to you right now. I need your help; I need your family's help; I need your neighbor's help. I've seen firsthand the power of grassroots support, and that's why I'm reaching out to you today. _**[I'm not afraid to put up a fight. Are you?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z55qklgd2arjj5d5tqsm1it29h3343pvjmue05sg_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c3g6aoj2cph2bs "I’m not afraid to put up a fight. Are you?")**_

---
| | | [Join My Team](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zeo35fcsh80ge4p63ct4jem5qvdi63t7kgnisddo_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c3g6aoj2cph2bs)
---

If I win, I am ready to roll up my sleeves on day one and get to work slashing budgets, cutting taxes, standing up to liberal special interests, and standing up for the American people. However, I need every single person reading this to immediately step up and take action to make this possible.

We have less than 2 months until my election, which is why your immediate support is especially important. _**[I'm ready to fight for you and I need your help.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2nff1uhvu4m8absqliqhov1dol7fvk5mnica638_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c3g6aoj2cph2bs "I’m ready to fight for you and I need your help.")**_

---
| | | [Donate Now](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0r5vltdlnhnp6vbuqa624pr3oupsdr2h85es56o_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c3g6aoj2cph2bs)
---

Washington D.C. is full of out-of-touch politicians who want to tax and spend their way out of every problem.

With skyrocketing inflation, out-of-control spending, and crippling national debt, our country can't afford two more years of Democrats controlling DC.

That's why I'm running for Congress.

I'm ready to fight for America by slashing budgets, cutting taxes, and standing up for ALL people.

Washington will never change if we keep sending the same big-spending, status quo politicians to Congress. I'm ready to bring commonsense policies and actions to Washington, but I can't do it without you.

_**[So I have just one question: Will you join me?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpfkamj16irot7estokl4qaq8s34mb8ntf2jd0uo_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c3g6aoj2cph2bs "So I have just one question: Will you join me?")**_

Thank you and God Bless America,

Sarah Palin

name: Democratic Poll via DASS
subject: do you support the Electoral College?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=emailheader&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=emailheader&amount=25]
Hello Team, we have a quick question for you:
Do you support abolishing the Electoral College? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-poll-yes?amount=10&refcode=EM_POLL_042422_B1_AC_30D]
YES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-poll-yes?amount=10&refcode=EM_POLL_042422_B1_AC_30D] NO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-poll-no?amount=10&refcode=EM_POLL_042422_B1_AC_30D]
Every Republican president since 1988 has been elected without winning the popular vote, all thanks to the Electoral College. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-poll-yes?amount=10&refcode=EM_POLL_042422_B1_AC_30D]
It’s the reason Trump took office, and it let him nearly stage a coup in 2021.
It suppresses the vote just as much as the GOP’s latest restrictive laws.
In short, it has to go if we want to save our democracy. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-poll-yes?amount=10&refcode=EM_POLL_042422_B1_AC_30D]
We’re looking for 34 respondents in Ohio to complete our poll before midnight. Take the next 10 seconds to let us know if you support abolishing the Electoral College.
Do you support abolishing the Electoral College? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-poll-yes?amount=10&refcode=EM_POLL_042422_B1_AC_30D]
YES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-poll-yes?amount=10&refcode=EM_POLL_042422_B1_AC_30D] NO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-poll-no?amount=10&refcode=EM_POLL_042422_B1_AC_30D]
DASS is a national organization supporting the election of Democratic Secretaries of State who are committed to protecting and preserving voting rights and ballot access for all Americans through fair, honest, open, and accurate elections.
Help us fight back against the GOP's voter suppression agenda by pitching in today!
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=footer-button&amount=25]

subject: Isn't this a crime?

body:
Dear Peter,

**Hillary Clinton** got caught!

Again!

And this time, even the liberal Federal Election Commission is making her pay.

name: Ron Johnson
subject: DECISION MADE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc
body:
| |
---
| | | Friend,

This is a longer email than usual but for the past months, I have become the #1 target of the Left, the liberal biased media, and Big Tech giants like Facebook, Twitter, and YouTube.

I have been smeared again and again by media companies like The New York Times, Washington Post, and the Milwaukee Journal Sentinel where they distort my comments, twist them through a liberal prism, and omit most of what I actually say.

I have been silenced, censored, and suspended by the social media oligarchs because I tell the truth, and oftentimes, it is the truth the liberal mainstream media does not want to hear. It counters their narrative, and they refuse to allow it. So they silence free speech.

Yet, despite all of this unconstitutional collusion between these far-Left parties working for political gain at the expense of the American people, I will not give up. They will not deter me.
And that is why I decided to run for re-election.

I am running for a third term for the simple reason that I believe I am the best person for the job. I believe that I am the best candidate to address the national debt, work to lower inflation, secure the border, and fight for America First policies. I believe I am the best candidate to put an end to the Biden administration's constant record of misinformation and their continued lack of transparency with Congress, the press, and you, Friend. I believe I am the best candidate for Wisconsin because I tell the truth and speak for the minority, even when the majority is doing everything they can to silence me.

Now that I have announced, the Left will seize every opportunity to destroy me politically. They will continue to write manipulative hit pieces and orchestrate smear campaigns across all mediums. They will attack and distort my record of success, my record of searching for the truth, and my record of fighting for the people of Wisconsin in any way they can. The Democrats even placed a $2M ad buy just moments after I announced my campaign for re-election.

And that's why I need your help.

_**[Any help you can provide will make an enormous difference and will be greatly appreciated. $5, $10, $25, or even $35 will help me respond to these hit pieces and smear campaigns. It will take all of us working together to defeat the Left and their dishonest tactics.

Can I count on you to chip in? We need to start working right now.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c60011%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8s%2bCnDghk%2bRdX02ZQ7su5w&sysid=1 "Any help you can provide will make an
enormous difference and will be greatly appreciated. $5, $10, $25, or even $35
will help me respond to these hit pieces and smear campaigns. It will take all of
us working together to defeat the Left and their dishonest tactics.Can I count on
you to chip in? We need to start working right now.")**_

Ron Johnson
---
| | | [Fight for Freedom](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c60012%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=532aQNSqjV%2bkMdPxm%2fY%2fdw&sysid=1 "Fight for Freedom")
---
| |
* * *
---
| | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c60013%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=x6R%2bau5yps1xv3fMBl%2fEyQ&sysid=1 "RonJon Announcement")
---
| Friend, It’s Ron Johnson.

I have just announced my campaign for re-election to the U.S. Senate.

I never could have imagined our country would be where it is today. From out of control spending to reckless liberal mandates, America is on the precipice of disaster.

This will not be an easy win but I am ready to fight to **SAVE AMERICA** from the Democrats.

**[Can I count on you to join me?](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c60014%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9VftIxodqU4uoiLAyxkp9g&sysid=1 "Please click here to
donate now")**
---
| | | [DONATE TODAY](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c60025%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TRCut8doYPJIn7r%2fD1f09Q&sysid=1 "SAVE THE SENATE")
---
| Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc.
---

Oshkosh, WI 54903-1159

body:

Friend,

I’m running for U.S. Senate in Ohio to expand the Democratic Senate majority and finally deliver meaningful change for America’s working families. **But Donald Trump just came to Ohio to rally his right-wing base, boost my potential GOP opponent, and attack me.**
Republicans are already spending over $80 million to keep Ohio red and take back the Senate for Mitch McConnell. Trump’s visit brought a new wave of money and attacks, and I need your urgent help to fight back.

**Nevada is the most important race for control of the Senate. There is absolutely no doubt that I’m Mitch McConnell’s #1 target. The GOP has already spent over $4 MILLION smearing me with attack ads and it’s putting this Senate seat and our majority in severe jeopardy of flipping from blue to red.**

body:

Friend,

We are **less than one month** until the primary, and this is our last end of month deadline -- **the one that will count the most.**

Momentum is on our side, with endorsements coming in from across Pennsylvania. We're talking to voters all across the state, and we've had people like you, friend, contribute _so much_ to our campaign.

From pitching in $1 or spending valuable time from your weekend helping us knock on doors and talk to voters, **grassroots supporters** have been key to our campaign's success so far. We're almost to the finish line — and at this point, we're _all gas, no brakes_.

We know that if Conor wins this race, he **will win the general election and show up for all Pennsyvlanians in the Senate. But we still need your help to make sure Conor wins.[Will you chip in $5 or whatever you can before our last end-of-month deadline of the primary?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44493950/341852994/124576002?refcode=em22_220424_eom1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzg5ZmEwOC1kYmMzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t4LGrtNGfaWTuY-fRTAI8zYakCB0N2t55Xcj2gEEYys=)** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44493951/341852995/124576002?refcode=em22_220424_eom1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzg5ZmEwOC1kYmMzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t4LGrtNGfaWTuY-fRTAI8zYakCB0N2t55Xcj2gEEYys=)
Thank you for your support,

Team Lamb

subject: A work of unsurpassed beauty
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vW6GKoOHcN

While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who
slew the giant, they likely don't know his full story-especially
the tragedies that

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oW6GKoOHcN

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear
Friend,

While
many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew
the giant, they likely don't know his full story-especially the
tragedies that befall his family and his beautiful turn to
repentance. In fact, at its heart, the story of David is about
fathers and sons.

King
David's momentous story provides profound insights into many of
life's most important questions, including: What are my
responsibilities to God? What do I owe my fellow man? How do I
lead my family? How do I turn away from sin? What is the best way
to lead others?

Taught by
Hillsdale College Professor of English Justin Jackson, "The David
Story: Shepherd, Father, King" examines the Old Testament books
of First and Second Samuel. This eight-lesson course explores
David's character and the consequences of his choices on his
family and the people of Israel.

This is
why we've produced our online course, "The David Story: Shepherd,
Father, King," which is now available on DVD. And you can reserve
your copy using this secure link:

https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd

By
viewing the course, you'll learn more about the nature of God,
family, leadership, sin, and repentance; in short, you'll learn
more about what truly matters in life.

I hope
you'll reserve your DVD today and share its abiding lessons with
your family and friends. The DVD is perfect for a Bible study or
homeschool curriculum.

Let's
learn what truly matters in life by studying "The David Story."

Best
regards,

Kyle
Murnen, '09
Director
of Online Learning
Hillsdale
College

P.S. If
you'd like to secure a DVD box set of "The David Story" while
they're available, you can have one shipped directly to your home
for any gift of $100 or more in support of reaching and teaching
millions on behalf of liberty.

Reserve
your DVD box set using the secure link below:

https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd

body:
Barack Obama provided the roadmap for winning in Florida
| | |
---

Friend,

name: Team Nikki
subject: DeSantis is playing a dangerous game
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Peter —

Apparently, DeSantis’ brilliant new political strategy is to hold a cartoon mouse hostage.

During the special legislative session, he directed his GOP puppets to strip Disney of its special tax status in retaliation for Disney’s (lukewarm) stance against his bigoted “Don’t Say Gay” bill.

DeSantis is playing a dangerous game, Peter — and if he pushes this charade far enough, Floridians will lose their jobs. Taxes will go up. And our economy will suffer a hit like we’ve never seen before. All so DeSantis can keep playing dictator and catering to his far-right mega-donors.

If you’re sick and tired of watching DeSantis throw juvenile tantrums, make a mess of our state, and hurt Florida families for his own political gain, you’re not alone.

That’s why Nikki’s running for Governor — to end DeSantis’ authoritarian dictatorship, clean up the mess he’s made, and bring something new to Florida. If you’re with her, click here to chip in $5 today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-apr-2022?refcode=423disney]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.
Express Donate $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-apr-2022?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=423disney]

DeSantis’ latest political tantrum is telling major companies one thing: if you’re going to do business in Florida, you’ll have to submit to his authoritarian agenda, or else.

And that begs the question: what good is any of this doing for Floridians?

While DeSantis has been putting our economy at risk by extorting a global corporation, Nikki’s been touring the state talking about her plan to lower our costs and raise our standards of living.

Because at the end of the day, Floridians don’t care about DeSantis’ manufactured culture war. They care about keeping a roof over their heads, putting food on the table, and keeping their jobs. And Nikki is the ONLY candidate who will help them do it. Can you chip in $5 to support her campaign? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-apr-2022?refcode=423disney]

Thank you for standing with us.

— Team Nikki

clean_body: Peter — Apparently, DeSantis’ brilliant new political strategy is to hold a cartoon mouse hostage. During the special legislative session, he directed his GOP puppets to strip Disney of its special tax status in retaliation for Disney’s (lukewarm) stance against his bigoted “Don’t Say Gay” bill. DeSantis is playing a dangerous game, Peter — and if he pushes this charade far enough, Floridians will lose their jobs. Taxes will go up. And our economy will suffer a hit like we’ve never seen before. All so DeSantis can keep playing dictator and catering to his far-right mega-donors. If you’re sick and tired of watching DeSantis throw juvenile tantrums, make a mess of our state, and hurt Florida families for his own political gain, you’re not alone. That’s why Nikki’s running for Governor — to end DeSantis’ authoritarian dictatorship, clean up the mess he’s made, and bring something new to Florida. If you’re with her, click here to chip in $5 today. [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. Express Donate $5 [] DeSantis’ latest political tantrum is telling major companies one thing: if you’re going to do business in Florida, you’ll have to submit to his authoritarian agenda, or else. And that begs the question: what good is any of this doing for Floridians? While DeSantis has been putting our economy at risk by extorting a global corporation, Nikki’s been touring the state talking about her plan to lower our costs and raise our standards of living. Because at the end of the day, Floridians don’t care about DeSantis’ manufactured culture war. They care about keeping a roof over their heads, putting food on the table, and keeping their jobs. And Nikki is the ONLY candidate who will help them do it. Can you chip in $5 to support her campaign? body:
The most extreme Republican Party of our lifetimes is on the precipice of taking back both the Senate and the House!
| | |
---

| | _Kathryn Grody and Mandy Patinkin are actors and activists who have been married for almost 42 years. Patinkin is most known for his roles in Homeland and The Princess Bride. Grody wrote and acted in an autobiographical play called Mom's Life. During the 2020 election, Grody and Patinkin gathered a large social media following for their viral videos encouraging people to vote. _
---
Hi there –
For as long as we've been married (and it's been a long time), we've worked together – and worked ourselves up – getting out the vote and electing Democrats up and down the ballot. Because we know, as you know, how important every election is.
And this election is no different. The most extreme Republican Party of our lifetimes is on the precipice of taking back both the Senate and the House! If Mitch McConnell regains power in the Senate, he'll work to undo everything that Democrats have accomplished so far – affecting everything from health care protections to reproductive rights.
But instead of rolling on the floor, despondent and shaking, we decided to do something. And that something is helping reelect Senator Maggie Hassan in New Hampshire. Control of the Senate hinges on this seat, and we need all hands on deck.
Maggie Hassan has been a powerful voice in the fight to protect our democracy. She, like us, believes that no matter what your political affiliation is, every American's sacred right to vote should be protected. With our democracy at stake, we can't afford to lose Maggie's leadership.
But here's the issue: There are a lot of Republicans across the country who will do whatever and spend whatever it takes to defeat Maggie and take back the Senate.
That's why we’re asking for your help, friend. subject: Piers Morgan is FAKE NEWS!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
President's team just released clear evidence it was a TOTAL LIE: [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9966%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=iQgsuw05mOm1Rj93%2fwMvOQ&sysid=1)
President Trump's team just released clear evidence it was a TOTAL LIE:
Piers Morgan just released a teaser of his highly anticipated interview with President Trump -- he called it **"the most explosive interview of the year!"** His teaser tried to embarrass Trump for storming out of an interview after a few questions. _It was an anti-Trump feeding frenzy for the Liberal Media._
There was just one problem: **IT WAS 100% FAKE NEWS!**
Within a few short hours, President Trump's team released clear evidence it was a TOTAL LIE. A political hatchet job designed to generate the press' attention. The Trump-hating Media will do ANYTHING to destroy the legacy of our favorite President.
[**But we won't let them if it's the last thing we do. We're asking ALL LOYAL TRUMP SUPPORTERS to stand with him now and help set the record straight.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c29360%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=13jHyCCAfpryNp1ZpsrU7A&sysid=1)
**[GO ON THE RECORD:
I STAND WITH TRUMP](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c29361%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9wijS%2b8MWK7W4fZtjum2dw&sysid=1)**
Piers Morgan pulled this stunt because he thinks there won't be much blowback... Well he's wrong.
**That's where you come in.**
[**We need AT LEAST 10,000 Loyal Trump Supporters to go on the record within the first 48 hours of this Fake News hit piece. If you have Trump's back, we really need your help with this.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c29362%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XvxGX%2f9L8wqoEJYrWBqylw&sysid=1)
Thank you,
Breaking Trump News

name: Ron Johnson
subject: DECISION MADE!!!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc
body:
|

---
| | | Peter,

This is a longer email than usual but for the past months, I have become the #1 target of the Left, the liberal biased media, and Big Tech giants like Facebook, Twitter, and YouTube.

I have been smeared again and again by media companies like The New York Times, Washington Post, and the Milwaukee Journal Sentinel where they distort my comments, twist them through a liberal prism, and omit most of what I actually say.

I have been silenced, censored, and suspended by the social media oligarchs because I tell the truth, and oftentimes, it is the truth the liberal mainstream media does not want to hear. It counters their narrative, and they refuse to allow it. So they silence free speech.

Yet, despite all of this unconstitutional collusion between these far-Left parties working for political gain at the expense of the American people, I will not give up. They will not deter me.
And that is why I decided to run for re-election.

I am running for a third term for the simple reason that I believe I am the best person for the job. I believe that I am the best candidate to address the national debt, work to lower inflation, secure the border, and fight for America First policies. I believe I am the best candidate to put an end to the Biden administration's constant record of misinformation and their continued lack of transparency with Congress, the press, and you, Peter. I believe I am the best candidate for Wisconsin because I tell the truth and speak for the minority, even when the majority is doing everything they can to silence me.

Now that I have announced, the Left will seize every opportunity to destroy me politically. They will continue to write manipulative hit pieces and orchestrate smear campaigns across all mediums. They will attack and distort my record of success, my record of searching for the truth, and my record of fighting for the people of Wisconsin in any way they can. The Democrats even placed a $2M ad buy just moments after I announced my campaign for re-election.

And that's why I need your help.

_**[Any help you can provide will make an enormous difference and will be greatly appreciated. $5, $10, $25, or even $35 will help me respond to these hit pieces and smear campaigns. It will take all of us working together to defeat the Left and their dishonest tactics.

Can I count on you to chip in? We need to start working right now.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60219102:JPl5NvoTN:m:1:3317145305:33D71DDE0D9DBAFE353BD44B121F824F:r "Any help you can provide will make
an enormous difference and will be greatly appreciated. $5, $10, $25, or even $35 will help me respond to these hit pieces and smear campaigns. It
will take all of us working together to defeat the Left and their dishonest tactics.Can I count on you to chip in? We need to start working right
now.")**_

Ron Johnson
---
| | | [Fight for Freedom](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60219102:JPl5NvoTN:m:1:3317145305:33D71DDE0D9DBAFE353BD44B121F824F:r "Fight for Freedom")

| Peter, It's Ron Johnson.

I have just announced my campaign for re-election to the U.S. Senate.

I never could have imagined our country would be where it is today. From out of control spending to reckless liberal mandates, America is on the precipice of disaster.

This will not be an easy win but I am ready to fight to **SAVE AMERICA** from the Democrats.

**[Can I count on you to join me?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60219102:JPl5NvoTN:m:1:3317145305:33D71DDE0D9DBAFE353BD44B121F824F:r "Please click

body:
In Congress, Deb will advocate for everyone to have a voice in our government.

| Peter,

This nation was founded on a simple premise: that government is derived from the consent of its citizens.

Generations of activists have fought and died to fulfill that promise and ensure that disenfranchised groups like women and people of color have full access to the ballot box.

It’s a struggle that continues to this day, as GOP-controlled state legislatures pass disturbingly restrictive, anti-voter legislation. **[If you agree that voting rights are fundamental and support efforts to secure access to the ballot box once and for all, please add your name here>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44499564/341867585/836148416?refcode=ea.ad514c99-e7c3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.ad514c99-e7c3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDUxNGM5OS1lN2MzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=omzdicGP5x0bciwCahsQVz3ISRU0Nfe0myhEx2U1dT0=&emci=c1d164bb-cdc1-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=ad514c99-e7c3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=5944225)**

Peter, in Congress, Deb will advocate for everyone to have a voice in our government. She’ll support policies to make it more convenient for voters to cast their ballot and ensure elections are fair and secure - and that their outcomes are respected.

Some in the GOP are determined to hold onto power by choosing who is able to vote and who is shut out from the democratic process. **Many have given so much to protect our rights, and we cannot let legislators take us backward for their own political gain.**

**[Please, add your name here to say you support efforts to secure voting rights once and for all>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44499569/341867595/836148416?refcode=ea.ad514c99-e7c3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.ad514c99-e7c3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDUxNGM5OS1lN2MzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=omzdicGP5x0bciwCahsQVz3ISRU0Nfe0myhEx2U1dT0=&emci=c1d164bb-cdc1-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=ad514c99-e7c3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=5944225)** | ****[SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44499572/341867600/836148416?refcode=ea.ad514c99-e7c3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.ad514c99-e7c3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDUxNGM5OS1lN2MzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=omzdicGP5x0bciwCahsQVz3ISRU0Nfe0myhEx2U1dT0=&emci=c1d164bb-cdc1-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=ad514c99-e7c3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=5944225)****

clean_body: In Congress, Deb will advocate for everyone to have a voice in our government. | Peter, This nation was founded on a simple premise: that government is derived from the consent of its citizens. Generations of activists have fought and died to fulfill that promise and ensure that disenfranchised groups like women and people of color have full access to the ballot box. It’s a struggle that continues to this day, as GOP-controlled state legislatures pass disturbingly restrictive, anti-voter legislation. Peter, in Congress, Deb will advocate for everyone to have a voice in our government. She’ll support policies to make it more convenient for voters to cast their ballot and ensure elections are fair and secure - and that their outcomes are respected. Some in the GOP are determined to hold onto power by choosing who is able to vote and who is shut out from the democratic process. Many have given so much to protect our rights, and we cannot let legislators take us backward for their own political gain. | ** Thank you for standing up for our democratic rights, Team McGrath | Deb McGrath is an Army Veteran, former CIA officer, and mother of three running for Congress in WI-03. She’s fighting for affordable health care, good-paying jobs, and common prosperity. Deb served our country for over four decades from all over the world. Now she’s being called to serve her hometown and western Wisconsin in Congress. This campaign runs on the support from folks like you. = | **=** **=** Learn more at: Follow along: | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- | PAID FOR BY DEB MCGRATH FOR CONGRESS DEB MCGRATH FOR CONGRESS PO BOX 41, Menomonie, WI 54751 Use of Deb McGrath's military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform (or that of others) does not imply endorsement by the Department of Defense, the Central Intelligence Agency, or any other branch of government. I’ve set an ambitious goal -- 1,000 gifts before midnight -- to prove my campaign has what it takes to flip this seat for Democrats. But if you don’t have the time to read my whole email, can I count on your $15 right away? >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44501017/341874487/1092196856?refcode=20220424_em_fr_b1_greg_30_op_rs&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjhkZWNjNy1lYmMzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b7NhAShY-dQphE3ra20iE_r9PAd5ILjSaNNjjnacGxI=)_**
* * *
This run for Congress is personal.

**[I’m running for my mom.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44501018/341874488/1092196856?refcode=20220424_em_fr_b1_greg_30_op_rs&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjhkZWNjNy1lYmMzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b7NhAShY-dQphE3ra20iE_r9PAd5ILjSaNNjjnacGxI=)**

She taught special education in public schools for decades.

She believed in her core that every young person had God-given talents -- and that it was up to the adults to identify and lift up those talents.

Her students were being forced into one-size-fits-all testing that wasn’t serving them at all.

So she decided to take a bold step and turned her entire classroom into a cafe where her students would learn skills that would benefit them for the rest of their lives.

Through my career in education and public service, I’ve always kept my mom’s determination to take on tough odds and make a difference for families struggling to get by.

**_[But I’ve watched Republican Congressman Chabot fight against us every step of the way. We need a voice in Washington who will fight to increase funding for public schools -- not fight to stop the funds we needed to reopen schools safely. Can I count on your $15 before my deadline to help me fully fund my campaign and defeat Steve Chabot? >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44501019/341874489/1092196856?refcode=20220424_em_fr_b1_greg_30_op_rs&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjhkZWNjNy1lYmMzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b7NhAShY-dQphE3ra20iE_r9PAd5ILjSaNNjjnacGxI=)_** **[I’m running for every child and family that Chabot has left behind.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44501020/341874490/1092196856?refcode=20220424_em_fr_b1_greg_30_op_rs&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjhkZWNjNy1lYmMzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b7NhAShY-dQphE3ra20iE_r9PAd5ILjSaNNjjnacGxI=)**

I’ve spent my career fighting for families.

I helped lead the Preschool Promise to provide two years of quality preschool for our 3 and 4 year olds.

It has helped thousands of children and families, as well as our schools and small business preschool providers succeed.

But instead of working to support our district’s hardworking families, Congressman Chabot voted **[AGAINST](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44501022/341874492/1092196856?refcode=20220424_em_fr_b1_greg_30_op_rs&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjhkZWNjNy1lYmMzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b7NhAShY-dQphE3ra20iE_r9PAd5ILjSaNNjjnacGxI=)** making childcare and seniorcare more affordable.

**_[I believe the people of this district deserve a Representative who will make life easier for families, instead of harder. But to unseat Chabot, I need your urgent help to close the budget gap before midnight. >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44501024/341874494/1092196856?refcode=20220424_em_fr_b1_greg_30_op_rs&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjhkZWNjNy1lYmMzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b7NhAShY-dQphE3ra20iE_r9PAd5ILjSaNNjjnacGxI=)_** **[And finally, I’m running for hardworking people like you.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44501026/341874496/1092196856?refcode=20220424_em_fr_b1_greg_30_op_rs&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjhkZWNjNy1lYmMzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b7NhAShY-dQphE3ra20iE_r9PAd5ILjSaNNjjnacGxI=)**

The anxiety and uncertainty we’re all feeling is a direct result of the choices made by folks like Congressman Chabot.

But if you want something better for you and your family...

If you want someone who will deliver for the big issues our community faces...

**[_Then I’m going to need your help._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44501028/341874498/1092196856?refcode=20220424_em_fr_b1_greg_30_op_rs&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjhkZWNjNy1lYmMzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b7NhAShY-dQphE3ra20iE_r9PAd5ILjSaNNjjnacGxI=)**

Because I promise you that as your Congressman, I will never stop fighting for our families.

**_[I know I can defeat Congressman Steve Chabot. But he has countless big donors chomping at the bit to destroy our unprecedented chance to flip this seat blue. Which is why I just set an ambitious goal -- 1,000 gifts before midnight -- to prove our campaign has what it takes to compete. Can I count on your $15 right away? >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44501030/341874500/1092196856?refcode=20220424_em_fr_b1_greg_30_op_rs&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjhkZWNjNy1lYmMzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b7NhAShY-dQphE3ra20iE_r9PAd5ILjSaNNjjnacGxI=)_** | | [**Chip in $15 now >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44501032/341874502/1092196856?refcode=20220424_em_fr_b1_greg_30_op_rs&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjhkZWNjNy1lYmMzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b7NhAShY-dQphE3ra20iE_r9PAd5ILjSaNNjjnacGxI=)

name: Marisa Wood
subject: Kevin McCarthy is a liar. Plain and simple.
body:
All McCarthy cares about is power -- even if it comes at the cost of the truth, country, and our democracy. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44501081/341874723/883924314?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OWViZGIzMi1lY2MzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2PR3qs-L2ALgyNaBoo1kZ8VSZSvkYB5sucJ8IPAFx8I=)
Friend,

In a moment, I'm going to ask you for a donation of **[$3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44501082/341874724/-674430938?refcode=em-4.24.22-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OWViZGIzMi1lY2MzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2PR3qs-L2ALgyNaBoo1kZ8VSZSvkYB5sucJ8IPAFx8I=)** to oust Kevin McCarthy from the halls of Congress forever. McCarthy has been on the hot seat this week, so I hope you'll let me explain why this request is so urgent.

Let's recap:

As you know, Kevin McCarthy has long defended Trump's actions after Jan 6th. He called the Democrats' investigation a witch hunt, and tried to shut it down at every turn.

**This week, reports emerge that McCarthy privately planned to call on Trump to RESIGN after Jan. 6th. He (of course) denied the allegations, but the audio recordings tell exactly what he said to colleagues – _“My recommendation is that he should resign.”_**

body:
After the devastating attack on the Capitol on January 6, led by Trump-fueled insurrectionists, the articles of impeachment were passed by the House of Representatives and delivered to the Senate. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44502195/341880547/-2023352048?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMyNjMxODEyLWYyYzMtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=xSYCqN2pNXt5T14EbRIJ2K8m6VeGrnaSAI4E27s_99w=&emci=f3112d12-f1c3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=c2631812-f2c3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=16335001) Team,

After the devastating attack on the Capitol on January 6, led by Trump-fueled insurrectionists, the articles of impeachment were passed by the House of Representatives and delivered to the Senate.

At the conclusion of the trial, Donald Trump was acquitted, with only seven Republicans choosing country over party and the rest condoning a direct attack on our democracy. **But new reports have come out that prominent Republican party leaders initially condemned the insurrection and placed full blame on Donald Trump.**

Check it out – here are just a few of the conversations that recently came to light:
* Kevin McCarthy, the Republican leader in the House, was recorded saying, **“I had it with this guy. What he did is unacceptable. Nobody can defend that, and nobody should defend it.”** In the months after this statement was made, he proceeded to defend Donald Trump's actions and response concerning January 6.
* Mitch McConnell himself, the corrupt and spineless Republican leader in the Senate, was quoted as saying, **“The Democrats are going to take care of the son of a bitch for us,”** in reference to the Democrat's efforts to impeach Donald Trump after the insurrection. They tried Mitch... they tried.

We knew that justice would be served if Donald Trump was impeached for inciting January 6, and now, it's apparent that Republicans knew too. But they chose Donald Trump and American fascism over democracy. We believe that elected leaders should place their country over their party, but now we need to know what you think: | **[Should Kevin McCarthy and Mitch McConnell be held accountable for being dishonest to the American people?](https://action.neveragainpac.com/a/napac-mcconnell-mccarthy-fp?ms=em22_220424_HFP_e1srv_gq_act___NAPAC_ettx&refcode=em22_220424_HFP_e1srv_gq_act___NAPAC_ettx&source=em22_220424_HFP_e1srv_gq_act___NAPAC_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220424_HFP_e1srv_gq_act___NAPAC_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=YAR2Eoky0Z5CHXjsQzw%2FGyW8hQQUajf2PUHN5wGDWa33S38zzjxp2bsTyl72ItvZh4B5bHbUlhpmcgA%2B58JjxpCJEfZ1weSRSIs3HHgNB%2F%2BmskCNYI0WHIzI4oRACVycvpnrQyTU2GHoabYWggYRmw%3D%3D)** | [YES](https://action.neveragainpac.com/a/napac-mcconnell-mccarthy-fp?ms=em22_220424_HFP_e1srv_gq_act___NAPAC_ettx&refcode=em22_220424_HFP_e1srv_gq_act___NAPAC_ettx&source=em22_220424_HFP_e1srv_gq_act___NAPAC_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220424_HFP_e1srv_gq_act___NAPAC_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=YAR2Eoky0Z5CHXjsQzw%2FGyW8hQQUajf2PUHN5wGDWa33S38zzjxp2bsTyl72ItvZh4B5bHbUlhpmcgA%2B58JjxpCJEfZ1weSRSIs3HHgNB%2F%2BmskCNYI0WHIzI4oRACVycvpnrQyTU2GHoabYWggYRmw%3D%3D)

clean_body: After the devastating attack on the Capitol on January 6, led by Trump-fueled insurrectionists, the articles of impeachment were passed by the House of Representatives and delivered to the Senate. Team, After the devastating attack on the Capitol on January 6, led by Trump-fueled insurrectionists, the articles of impeachment were passed by the House of Representatives and delivered to the Senate. At the conclusion of the trial, Donald Trump was acquitted, with only seven Republicans choosing country over party and the rest condoning a direct attack on our democracy. But new reports have come out that prominent Republican party leaders initially condemned the insurrection and placed full blame on Donald Trump. Check it out – here are just a few of the conversations that recently came to light: Kevin McCarthy, the Republican leader in the House, was recorded saying, “I had it with this guy. What he did is unacceptable. Nobody can defend that, and nobody should defend it.” In the months after this statement was made, he proceeded to defend Donald Trump's actions and response concerning January 6. Mitch McConnell himself, the corrupt and spineless Republican leader in the Senate, was quoted as saying, “The Democrats are going to take care of the son of a bitch for us,” in reference to the Democrat's efforts to impeach Donald Trump after the insurrection. They tried Mitch... they tried. We knew that justice would be served if Donald Trump was impeached for inciting January 6, and now, it's apparent that Republicans knew too. But they chose Donald Trump and American fascism over democracy. We believe that elected leaders should place their country over their party, but now we need to know what you think: | | | Thanks, Team Never Again Marjorie Taylor Greene, Paul Gosar, Lauren Boebert, Madison Cawthorn, Mo Brooks, Andy Biggs. Those are just a few of the Republicans in Congress that Never Again PAC is working to defend our democracy from. Help us hold them accountable by chipping in $5 or more today. Thank you for supporting Never Again PAC as we continue our fight against American fascism and corruption. We are building a war chest to vote out the nation's most dangerous elected officials and hold them accountable for their acts of treason. = Never Again PAC will hold these most dangerous and radical elected officials accountable by building a war chest to support ongoing rapid response efforts in 2022 and beyond. Through advertising, grassroots & digital organizing in targeted members’ districts, at a time in the cycle when other political organizations have historically not spent resources, will ensure our resources will in fact go further, our message will be heard more clearly, and our targets will feel the pressure immediately. = For generations people have risked everything seeking refuge on American shores to escape the very same sorts of political violence that took place at the U.S. Capitol on January 6th –– and every generation has an opportunity to make investments to protect this democracy –– it is time to do our part. = PAID FOR BY NEVER AGAIN PAC Never Again PAC PO Box 2153 Purcellville, VA 20134 United States

subject: Ron DeSantis is giving 71% of FL congressional districts to the GOP
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee
body:
|
---

---
With the election just over six months away, Republicans are _still_ trying to draw the most gerrymandered districts they possibly can. | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44502396/341881471/864698770?&amount=20&refcode=20220424.1r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc5OGFiOTJkLWY0YzMtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=iaP3K8QX6-t0XGmiL4LAO-9tBTBLM-Dkr_iiL8aFiVc=)
---
Here's the latest:

In an unprecedented move, Florida legislative Republicans gave in to Gov. Ron DeSantis and let him draw his own gerrymandered maps that could give the GOP control over 71% of the state's congressional districts. Now, DeSantis has signed his preferred congressional maps.

And in Ohio, the state supreme court just had to strike down Republicans' gerrymandered maps for the FOURTH TIME (they continually refuse to draw fair ones!).
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44502397/341881472/864698770?&amount=20&refcode=20220424.1r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc5OGFiOTJkLWY0YzMtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=iaP3K8QX6-t0XGmiL4LAO-9tBTBLM-Dkr_iiL8aFiVc=)
---

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: Re: Need your feedback on this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
Friend, I'm following up to make sure you saw the survey I sent around. Now that we're officially in the full swing of the election year our campaign is scaling up our operation, which is why I need all hands on deck. **However, I 'm still looking for another 47 members of this grassroots team to share their input before my upcoming meeting tomorrow - and your response is missing.** Hearing what's on YOUR mind will help my campaign build a strategy that delivers progress for the American people and protects Democratic control of the Senate. [So please, with my next strategy meeting coming up, can you please make sure you've submitted your feedback? Click here to take our election-year focus group (it only takes about a minute!) right now.**](https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-march-prio-2022?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1166-su-nd) Thanks so much for taking the time to share your input. I truly appreciate your support. Dick
---
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Richard Blumenthal**
Date: Thur, Apr 14, 2022
Subject: Need your feedback on this

[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=iGQDAoAt5x8jPf7360ayWe7j22t99zqk&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend,
I was proud to cast a vote to confirm Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson to the highest court in our land. Her brilliance, perseverance, unwavering commitment to the law, and deep understanding of the justice system's impact on people's lives will all make her a superb justice.
Judge Jackson's confirmation will not only make the Supreme Court look more like America but also think more like America. Yet, while this confirmation was a joyous and glass-shattering outcome, I couldn't help but be appalled by the behavior of some of my Republican colleagues on the Senate Committee on the Judiciary during Judge Jackson's confirmation hearings.
They interrupted her. They berated her. They accused her of things that were blatantly untrue and incendiary. They cared less about the health and future of the Court and our nation than about their own Twitter feeds and public posturing.
If Republicans flip even a single Senate seat in this election, they will be back in control of the chamber - and back in a position to stop all future Biden nominees in their tracks.**That 's why I'm writing to you today to get your feedback on the issues that are important to you. Your feedback is critical to ensuring I can protect my Democratic seat and keep Democrats in control of the Senate.**
**[My team and I put together this brand-new priorities survey for April. Will you click here to let me know what's top of mind for you as we approach this must-win election?](https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-march-prio-2022?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1166-su-nd)**
This election is absolutely crucial, and winning hinges on having a strategy that's connected to grassroots supporters - people like you. Thanks so much for taking the time to leave your input.
Dick
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Blumenthal for Connecticut email list, please click here.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=5082zEWJ8cIluCkaOJFx0%2B7j22t99zqk&url=http%3A%2F%2Faction.richardblumenthal.com%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2Findex.sjs%3Funsubscribe_page_KEY%3D550%26Email%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)
Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut

[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

If Republicans flip even a single Senate seat in this election, they will be back in control of the chamber - and back in a position to stop all future Biden nominees in their tracks.That 's why I'm writing to you today to get your feedback on the issues that are important to you. Your feedback is critical to ensuring I can protect my Democratic seat and keep Democrats in control of the Senate. This election is absolutely crucial, and winning hinges on having a strategy that's connected to grassroots supporters - people like you. Thanks so much for taking the time to leave your input. Dick

**Meet Mark:** Reverend Mark Holland is a fourth generation Kansan and a third generation United Methodist Pastor. He has dedicated his life to the service of others, as a father, pastor, community leader, elected official, and non-profit leader. Mark is the co-founder and executive director of Mainstream UMC, a global advocacy organization dedicated to greater inclusion in the church. He has served the Church in Kansas for over 25 years, most recently as the Senior Pastor of Trinity Community Church in Kansas City, Kansas for 19 years.

Hello,
Former Senator Claire McCaskill just issued a dire warning on MSNBC: **Senate Democrats must URGENTLY act on voting rights – _now_.**
Republicans tried to steal the election in 2020, even encouraging an armed insurrection at the capitol. Since then, they’ve been gerrymandering districts, suppressing voters, and enacting laws that everyone from President Joe Biden to Stacey Abrams are calling Jim Crow 2.0
We have a razor-thin 50-50 majority in the Senate. Only one seat would give control back to Mitch McConnell and the Republicans. **That’s why Admiral Mike Franken’s campaign against Chuck Grassley in Iowa is so important.**
Senate control will likely be decided in Iowa and the polls are showing an extremely close race. **But if Mike Franken is going to defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate, we’re counting on grassroots donors like you now.**
**We need to raise another $25,000 to fight back against Grassley’s corporate PAC money and McConnell’s Super PACs, but right now we’re still $9,535 short with time running out:**

name: Team Abby
subject: who should the USPS serve?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
| | |
---
**Peter: Under the leadership of Trump-appointed Postmaster General Louis DeJoy, a massive corporation with a yearly revenue of more than $7.7 BILLION is trying to cut corners by manufacturing U.S. Postal Service trucks WITHOUT union labor!**
After signing a major contract with the USPS to manufacture their trucks, Oshkosh Defense announced that these jobs will be outsourced to factories that they've never used before in anti-union South Carolina! **This is a blatant and disgraceful attempt to avoid paying workers appropriately for their labor – and it goes against the very foundation of the Postal Service.**
The USPS was created to serve the American people – especially those of us living in rural areas. It's a lifeline for rural Americans: for goods and services, for lifesaving medications and for staying connected regardless of ZIP code. **The USPS was never supposed to be a political tool to make corporations richer and drive shareholders' earnings, and we need Congress to stop acting like it is.**
This is just the latest in attacks on our USPS and on our unions: corrupt Postmaster General Louis DeJoy has spent the last two years wreaking havoc on this foundational public institution by slashing services and intentionally increasing delivery times.
**It's never been more important that we fight corporate interests and stand up for our Postal Service and for working families – and that starts with making our voices heard. We need another 108 activists to demand change before our live poll closes at 11:59 p.m. **So please, respond ASAP and tell us:
**Who should the USPS serve?**

name: Ron Johnson
subject: DECISION MADE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc
body:
This is a longer email than usual but for the past months, I have become the #1 target of the Left, the liberal biased media, an
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zasvdh186qibo7cql448g5698jc7e5dpdivbp008_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c3h6coj4clh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq9dhkumqb7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65t9gegqjcdj0ckp36pthmjirfddk6lh3at5l65hj5d1kcdp68s9mc9ij4pjim9o6fkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1p30phmc2pmcdtim5j33c5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)

| |
---
| | | Friend,

This is a longer email than usual but for the past months, I have become the #1 target of the Left, the liberal biased media, and Big Tech giants like Facebook, Twitter, and YouTube.

I have been smeared again and again by media companies like The New York Times, Washington Post, and the Milwaukee Journal Sentinel where they distort my comments, twist them through a liberal prism, and omit most of what I actually say.

I have been silenced, censored, and suspended by the social media oligarchs because I tell the truth, and oftentimes, it is the truth the liberal mainstream media does not want to hear. It counters their narrative, and they refuse to allow it. So they silence free speech.

Yet, despite all of this unconstitutional collusion between these far-Left parties working for political gain at the expense of the American people, I will not give up. They will not deter me.
And that is why I decided to run for re-election.

I am running for a third term for the simple reason that I believe I am the best person for the job. I believe that I am the best candidate to address the national debt, work to lower inflation, secure the border, and fight for America First policies. I believe I am the best candidate to put an end to the Biden administration's constant record of misinformation and their continued lack of transparency with Congress, the press, and you, Friend. I believe I am the best candidate for Wisconsin because I tell the truth and speak for the minority, even when the majority is doing everything they can to silence me.

Now that I have announced, the Left will seize every opportunity to destroy me politically. They will continue to write manipulative hit pieces and orchestrate smear campaigns across all mediums. They will attack and distort my record of success, my record of searching for the truth, and my record of fighting for the people of Wisconsin in any way they can. The Democrats even placed a $2M ad buy just moments after I announced my campaign for re-election.

And that's why I need your help.

_**[Any help you can provide will make an enormous difference and will be greatly appreciated. $5, $10, $25, or even $35 will help me respond to these hit pieces and smear campaigns. It will take all of us working together to defeat the Left and their dishonest tactics.

Can I count on you to chip in? We need to start working right now.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4g9g62qs9pov246l1otqsck7ufa6ddots173rjg_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c3h6coj4clh2bs)**_

Ron Johnson
---
| | | [Fight for Freedom](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zqvb95atur8aamsb4bu4qfoeoc05e9lmd0ka5aeg_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c3h6coj4clh2bs)
---
| |
* * *
---
| | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ze3coab5801p4abgppocof7gr1dbcm31prso0ap0_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c3h6coj4clh2bs)
---
| Friend, It’s Ron Johnson.

I have just announced my campaign for re-election to the U.S. Senate.

I never could have imagined our country would be where it is today. From out of control spending to reckless liberal mandates, America is on the precipice of disaster.

This will not be an easy win but I am ready to fight to **SAVE AMERICA** from the Democrats.

**[Can I count on you to join me?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zstu76idb7iapq0vicid88se95d2a6k225shipn8_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c3h6coj4clh2bs)**

---
| | Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc.

Oshkosh, WI 54903-1159

Friend, I’m reaching out to you today with an URGENT MESSAGE.
**We’re now JUST 30 DAYS AWAY from the 2022 Republican Primary. And we need all hands on deck to finish strong and defeat RINO John Boozman.** Boozman has corporate donors and super PACs on his side, but we’re relying on conservative patriots like you. [**Please chip****in $5, $10, $25, $50, or $100 TODAY to help us ramp up our get-out-the-vote operations in the final days of this campaign!**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8fef6bc01533e51d9c32df07ccef91c9/38553/7226f599409459b4/b8e6d1fbf15b32a0c3d6b838967d376c/38553)**

For decades, career politician John Boozman has failed our state time and again. He voted to increase our nation’s debt limit. He supported a higher tax burden on Arkansas families. And he back-stabbed President Trump behind closed doors.

Unlike Boozman, I will ALWAYS stand proudly for our America First values, _but I need your help to win this race and fight for you in the U.S. Senate!_

**[I hope you’ll make a CRITICAL final push contribution today.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8fef6bc01533e51d9c32df07ccef91c9/38553/7226f599409459b4/a4a29ecde53cb461c3d6b838967d376c/38553) **

Thank you for your critical support,

Jake Bequette [**THE 30-DAY COUNTDOWN IS ON – RUSH YOUR SUPPORT!__ >>>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8fef6bc01533e51d9c32df07ccef91c9/38553/7226f599409459b4/d837982e197f01bcc3d6b838967d376c/38553)

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: Hollywoke Punches Florida
body:
[****](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60218957:6v3u6vorN:m:1:3299561967:6F4E68733936B3E76A990ED110CF5B80:r)

Patriot,
Florida was again the Left's favorite punching bag as out-of-touch Hollywood elites continued their smears against me.
But I can tell you this, if Hollywood is attacking you, you must be doing something right.
I wish I could say I was surprised to see spoiled Hollywood hypocrites lecture parents about what is best for their children, but sadly their willingness to lie, distort and distract is par for the course. _**Their dishonesty knows no bounds. **_
_**If the same Hollywood elites who upheld degenerates like Harvey Weinstein now oppose our efforts to protect parental rights, I wear that like a badge of honor. **_
Rest assured - I'm not worried about what out-of-touch "entertainers" have to say, and I'm certainly not going to be intimidated by people who don't live in reality. **And the chances of me backing down to Disney-owned ABC or the low-rated Oscars is precisely zero. No amount of sloganeering from the liberal machine will change that.**
Despite these baseless charges from Hollywoke and the legacy media, I was proud to sign the Parental Rights in Education Bill to ensure that children K - 3 are not taught R-rated content in their G-rated years.
Patriot, I will always stand up for parents and families and for what's right. **I 'm not backing down.**
**[Can you help me to punch back and continue to fight against the radical Left and the dishonest corporate media? Their dishonesty knows no bounds. If the same Hollywood elites who upheld degenerates like Harvey Weinstein now oppose our efforts to protect parental rights, I wear that like a badge of honor. Rest assured - I'm not worried about what out-of-touch "entertainers" have to say, and I'm certainly not going to be intimidated by people who don't live in reality. And the chances of me backing down to Disney-owned ABC or the low-rated Oscars is precisely zero. No amount of sloganeering from the liberal machine will change that. name: Mark Kelly
subject: Tough Times
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
I’m thankful I’ve always had a support system around me to help me through.
#

[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-apr22?refcode=em220424-1-7&refcode2=2646.6688874.LK4J0g&t=1&akid=2646%2E6688874%2ELK4J0g)
---
_Gabby and me during her recovery_
Friends —
When I think about the toughest times in my life, I’m thankful I’ve always had a support system around me to help me through.
Being raised by two working parents who sometimes struggled to make ends meet wasn’t always easy.
Flying combat missions in Desert Storm wasn’t easy.
Supporting Gabby in her recovery in the days, weeks, and months after her shooting wasn’t easy.
Running for the U.S. Senate and having Donald Trump and National Republicans relentlessly attack me personally, that hasn’t been easy either.
But as a kid, I had my brother Scott.
In combat, I had my wingmen.
With Gabby, we had a whole country offering support.
And in these campaigns, I have you.
I could not do this without you. And while I can see you haven’t made a donation to my campaign yet, there is no better time than right now as we’re approaching this April fundraising deadline.
[**Please, can you make your first $3 contribution to my re-election campaign before our April fundraising deadline ends? Together, we can take on the corporate special interests who want to defeat us and win.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-apr22?refcode=em220424-1-7&t=2&refcode2=2646_6688874_LK4J0g&akid=2646%2E6688874%2ELK4J0g)

clean_body: Jessica Cisneros is one month from her run-off election and she needs our support. | | | Hey Peter, You may remember that we’ve reached out to you before about Texas’ 28th district race. Now, Jessica Cisneros is a month away from election day in her run-off against Rep. Henry Cuellar. Why does this matter? Because it’s no exaggeration to say Rep. Henry Cuellar is the Kyrsten Sinema of the U.S. House. He’s literally that bad. The similarities are astounding when we take a look, Peter. Henry Cuellar also self-identifies as a Democrat — but he’s really one of the most conservative Democrats in Congress and has helped Republicans block progress under President Biden, just like Sinema. Not to mention he’s also funded by huge checks from Big Pharma, Big Oil, and even Republican billionaires. Just. Like. Sinema. And just like Kyrsten Sinema, we’re going to make sure that Henry Cuellar doesn’t get away with putting corporate checks above his constituents' interests.**** Peter, we see this Texas run-off as a vital “trial run” for primarying Sinema. We’re counting on our nationwide grassroots movement to support the Cisneros campaign. That’s because Henry Cuellar, Kyrsten Sinema, and any other member of Congress who puts their biggest donors and self-interest ahead of their constituents has got to go. Plus, the more progressive champions like Jessica Cisneros we can elect, the more we can expand our razor-thin Democratic majority, hopefully to the point that Sinema’s votes won’t be enough to block critical progress anymore. That’s big. Onwards, Primary Sinema Project | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options: PAID FOR BY CHANGE FOR ARIZONA 2024 PAC** | | Sent via . name: VoteVets
subject: Marco Rubio
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
He had tough words when running against Donald Trump for president, but did his bidding day after day after day when he won the race.
#
Derek —
Marco Rubio lacks courage.
He had tough words when running against Donald Trump for president, but did his bidding day after day after day when he won the race.
He has tough words for Joe Biden on Ukraine, but voted against impeaching Trump for threatening to withhold aid from Zelenskyy.
Rubio is up for re-election this year, and he’s a top target nationally.
VoteVets was one of the largest outside spenders in the last Florida Senate election, and our ads are one of the biggest reasons we closed the gap against Rick Scott when the race was a blowout.

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Please let me explain
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
April is a difficult month for those of us who care deeply about the issue of gun violence prevention.
#

Friends -
In just a moment, I am going to ask you to make a contribution to Giffords PAC. Please give me a chance to explain why this request—especially today—is so important.
Here’s the truth:
April is a difficult month for those of us who care deeply about the issue of gun violence prevention.
April marks the day a minority of Senators blocked commonsense background checks legislation after the tragedy at Sandy Hook Elementary School.
April also marks the day of the shooting at Virginia Tech. At the time, it was the worst mass shooting in modern American history.
Day after day, the month is filled with reminders from the past—and sadly, the present—of how much work remains to be done.
I know these reminders, of shootings past and present, can cause some despair. I know that feeling well.
But we must keep moving forward. The stakes are too high. The work is too important.
We are looking for an impressive number of donations before our April fundraising drive ends, and as of right now we are short of our goals. So please. Here’s where I ask:
[**Can you please use this link to make a $3 contribution to Giffords PAC before our April fundraising drive comes to a close? The majority of our donations come in response to emails like this one. So please. This is so important.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-apr22?refcode=em220424-1-30&t=1&refcode2=1866_3935704_c5It-c&akid=1866%2E3935704%2Ec5It-c)
