body:
We’re going to win if we can build on the momentum from the primary. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wDJSxiYwIObpoERRcxDTs8R7Pd64c4gzFd01MYfYP5LR-ub1Ks_Aqk9-Fd-ejyFQk56A38KwPLIJv7BQE-9SA1mnYXq2pkEVdtuPVFE39zlnVTa05W9DkmdVdjGGz3D4lbxs0r2HGk5NVDjJU-d_6umPwArJ4J9ldbM6gJguVuHZ84f5_fX5XpVlcWqJWW725Rc7c2mU5Rz9_HqcwaEcuACwWtHQZyJgj1_h4oPGEVF_B0MOI0-IrxEU1ZXMXzDWLvVX3J7SIsXzSnmJjd9JCRgCOhwv3ZI2KX3UB9mnCwhQ/3lh/umAsNk_XQ_e8zOC-ktMJwA/h0/C1QCorgikXEUJ_ZJ7v3HvJsFFSeHnSA7CGEK_y7m2xM) **Peter, it’s official: we’re just one month away from the TX-28 Runoff Election.**

For far too long, Henry Cuellar has put special interests before his own constituents. Before I ran for Congress the first time, Cuellar sided with Donald Trump on nearly 70% of his votes. His campaign was, and still is, bankrolled by the private prison industry and corporate PACs.

We’re going to win if we can build on the momentum from the primary. But I need your help as we get closer to the runoff election.

[_**Will you help bring bold, progressive change to South Texas by contributing to my campaign today? It’s absolutely critical for us to raise as much money as possible before the runoff.**_](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zAq9BM_Xlfm-G9JMYK5BQCgIeBvh5Z4_yOz6ebgFa4gMJ5lfctrPibHwTfp0NHcolkn_Rf2FI6Sfg7_kWg_4_Mhb5P5IXfLYGx8Q41Lm_13BZ-5cIWqOjYivIETHTZuVkkx0PrA5lw8uneJUlMbXNZKLmSxwCiW1Izxc08omVCxI0osAWVdsIGQBp7vjOsh_I2YRSwsIiEljF0N4e7NE0kcWaFFcQc4IEFnEVaAu1GB3wsC44Awk4NfBxKLZAPuXUUmHHxagUy39S_OtN1wSkokwEJp6oy0ilmPw29Ytnyhqqyu78hnVi35RPFK9b7N0o/3lh/umAsNk_XQ_e8zOC-ktMJwA/h1/B8DwrZM9YhG8xwOc401GwdNCYCC5ts-r9pEsAsOJLUg) [Contribute »](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zAq9BM_Xlfm-G9JMYK5BQCgIeBvh5Z4_yOz6ebgFa4gMJ5lfctrPibHwTfp0NHcon4ObPKPds2z-J38L7sOflv1M7d3usmffoD9z7QE8WMHZ0Q6GQVSTMDXT_nHBu1_sKFXE5hMLgt6cS-5bPVVJrsiY54g7-f6NxXdVb_354ook25fpSWAeyUKmy-s8EUabAPlvSX_2Wrk1k4vv6pWVBNqqXTvvjtbEreoT-eCW91qFzFLv9MaEKQ3ldJpapmt5emYeVMh2GOPKNBcaOC8KCPEnw8QS5C93JFETDSbUB0PvKGKB4lgLD2HwoDZN6CjYM/3lh/umAsNk_XQ_e8zOC-ktMJwA/h2/alSoL3tTHMDzIZseHBeaWXbfAYDo_U5sSTjckE820Wo) This campaign is about much more than defeating Cuellar. It’s about sending representation to Congress that will fight tooth and nail for working people, for immigrant communities, for all of my neighbors in South Texas who have been ignored, neglected, and disenfranchised.

Texas’s 28th District is what some people call a “blue seat.” But our representative, Henry Cuellar, hasn’t acted like a Democrat in Congress. Instead, he’s catering to his corporate donors, the NRA, Big Oil, private prison companies, and big banks.

I’m running because we need a representative who’ll fight for a path to citizenship, Medicare for All, and a Green New Deal that creates good-paying union jobs.

I’m running because we need to get big money out of politics and stop letting corporate donors stack the deck in D.C.

I’m running because this moment, in the wake of a devastating pandemic, requires Democrats in Congress who will actually get things done, not stand in the way.

Despite everything stacked against us, we defied expectations by barely losing our primary in 2020. But it was just the beginning.

Together, this time, we are going to prove that a big grassroots movement can take on the machine and win. But, I can’t do it without you, so please help us out in the final stretch.

[_**Please, make the best contribution you can to join our movement to bring bold, progressive change to South Texas. clean_body: We’re going to win if we can build on the momentum from the primary. | | | Peter, it’s official: we’re just one month away from the TX-28 Runoff Election. For far too long, Henry Cuellar has put special interests before his own constituents. Before I ran for Congress the first time, Cuellar sided with Donald Trump on nearly 70% of his votes. His campaign was, and still is, bankrolled by the private prison industry and corporate PACs. We’re going to win if we can build on the momentum from the primary. But I need your help as we get closer to the runoff election. This campaign is about much more than defeating Cuellar. It’s about sending representation to Congress that will fight tooth and nail for working people, for immigrant communities, for all of my neighbors in South Texas who have been ignored, neglected, and disenfranchised. Texas’s 28th District is what some people call a “blue seat.” But our representative, Henry Cuellar, hasn’t acted like a Democrat in Congress. Instead, he’s catering to his corporate donors, the NRA, Big Oil, private prison companies, and big banks. I’m running because we need a representative who’ll fight for a path to citizenship, Medicare for All, and a Green New Deal that creates good-paying union jobs. I’m running because we need to get big money out of politics and stop letting corporate donors stack the deck in D.C. I’m running because this moment, in the wake of a devastating pandemic, requires Democrats in Congress who will actually get things done, not stand in the way. Despite everything stacked against us, we defied expectations by barely losing our primary in 2020. But it was just the beginning. Together, this time, we are going to prove that a big grassroots movement can take on the machine and win. But, I can’t do it without you, so please help us out in the final stretch. From the bottom of my heart, thank you to everyone who supported us last time, and who is stepping out to support us as we get closer to the runoff. In solidarity, Jessica Cisneros | To give by check: PO Box 660 Laredo, TX 78042

_ Peter,

Happy Sunday, I hope you’re getting some rest. My apologies for reaching out to you on the weekend, but truth be told we’re running out of time before our primary to raise the cash we need to win the nomination and turn our focus to winning the general election.

**On Friday afternoon I sent out an email calling for 200 donors to make a contribution of any amount to our primary day election fund.** Yet, we’re falling short. Yesterday just 56 conservatives on my email list answered the call.

I never want to shame anyone into doing ANYTHING, but if there were a moment, I might consider it, today would be it. **[I desperately want to reach our goal of raising $30,000 by our primary on May 17th,](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=201d30db4bbb4bf9aa6d676e90317c92&_e=Yjmg7DpQirWegVlu0OgWCpQHVKxsyPM2BXp6Mzpijt-WsN-FGEwr-Q7HIqR2eVZnqix4WsVG9jDlBKcURuYetBneyIB-iqG92ZRvQNBDH_Zs5etxUyWU81gG5BzwoTN9YSk9myzsDQsInDkQThDmrV4HvT_h0GOgbOsRKO4GFpXIOLLvkLlHVOs73AS19XFd892KKMM4BOKfJAXIg9EXkBogEAeHtHUnyj09HgS6cx5x_gKQWEDMCBOtVBjlEhi3HPLUxAfu2Akr2CQP7zNuJf0mRLl-8wTK8n9x2t4acZjwRpY3uAuCN8_82Od-CM98qXRsBYlhMwmPa9p0gF-qbUfMLn04YwKzODDujoeEUbITzCLWlCkGyVbgygsZjXvgKq20w_7C7XemzUd8xSGA9qXkKDEqUBh0Kw1UgmhCN5ydRiIJGjd94e6foeI1250GG3PSTB1vFp6MgX9ogqPAgQ%3D%3D) but we’re running out of time to do so...**

name: Ron Johnson
subject: DECISION MADE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc
body:
This is a longer email than usual but for the past months, I have become the #1 target of the Left, the liberal biased media, an
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsv3ch9knvc42h2t29f7je2hobbg1cdaeqi3atoo_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c3h66o72c3h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf1pjgcpgb4pj46aor2d1ke8or6srm65qb0sphelqe1ddmc5ij3d75mdgeadhjcurt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or0e8o6cdj0mdhmfdr2cor61cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn49fg)

| |
---
| | | Friend,

This is a longer email than usual but for the past months, I have become the #1 target of the Left, the liberal biased media, and Big Tech giants like Facebook, Twitter, and YouTube.

I have been smeared again and again by media companies like The New York Times, Washington Post, and the Milwaukee Journal Sentinel where they distort my comments, twist them through a liberal prism, and omit most of what I actually say.

I have been silenced, censored, and suspended by the social media oligarchs because I tell the truth, and oftentimes, it is the truth the liberal mainstream media does not want to hear. It counters their narrative, and they refuse to allow it. So they silence free speech.

Yet, despite all of this unconstitutional collusion between these far-Left parties working for political gain at the expense of the American people, I will not give up. They will not deter me.
And that is why I decided to run for re-election.

I am running for a third term for the simple reason that I believe I am the best person for the job. I believe that I am the best candidate to address the national debt, work to lower inflation, secure the border, and fight for America First policies. I believe I am the best candidate to put an end to the Biden administration's constant record of misinformation and their continued lack of transparency with Congress, the press, and you, Friend. I believe I am the best candidate for Wisconsin because I tell the truth and speak for the minority, even when the majority is doing everything they can to silence me.

Now that I have announced, the Left will seize every opportunity to destroy me politically. They will continue to write manipulative hit pieces and orchestrate smear campaigns across all mediums. They will attack and distort my record of success, my record of searching for the truth, and my record of fighting for the people of Wisconsin in any way they can. The Democrats even placed a $2M ad buy just moments after I announced my campaign for re-election.

And that's why I need your help.

_**[Any help you can provide will make an enormous difference and will be greatly appreciated. $5, $10, $25, or even $35 will help me respond to these hit pieces and smear campaigns. It will take all of us working together to defeat the Left and their dishonest tactics.

Can I count on you to chip in? We need to start working right now.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zk4det7u0giv2m7167ke3u9qql12tcqos43p3oc0_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c3h66o72c3h2bs "Any help you can provide will make an enormous difference and will be greatly appreciated. $5, $10, $25, or even $35 will help me respond to these hit pieces and smear campaigns. It will take all of us working together to defeat the Left and their dishonest tactics.Can I count on you to chip in? We need to start working right now.")**_

Ron Johnson
---
| | | [Fight for Freedom](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zedo381efir73bkj2io9cn9mbgqtq6gr2kp8it18_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c3h66o72c3h2bs "Fight for Freedom")
---
| |
* * *
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zik4jsdas7k0os708devigcmoe73e1vtblsvpq7o_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c3h66o72c3h2bs "RonJon Announcement")
---
| Friend, It’s Ron Johnson.

I have just announced my campaign for re-election to the U.S. Senate.

I never could have imagined our country would be where it is today. From out of control spending to reckless liberal mandates, America is on the precipice of disaster.

This will not be an easy win but I am ready to fight to **SAVE AMERICA** from the Democrats.

**[Can I count on you to join me?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zoftvjel7vimj67391kv0mjrkqrt08po5cd3ge20_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c3h66o72c3h2bs "Please click here to donate now")**

body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=3432%2E3611125%2ER4lV1m ][IMG]

Folks, I wasn’t expecting Trump to come to Ohio and play nice,
but wow—that rally really was a special kind of awful, wasn’t it?

Last night, Donald Trump attacked me personally, saying Republicans "can't
take a chance" when it comes to running against me.

Trump knows how important winning Ohio is. His wading into our race means
more attack ads, more dark money, and a tougher environment in an already
competitive race.

So I’m counting on this grassroots team to help me respond to the
far-right’s outlandish lies and baseless attacks. We need to bring in
$30,000 in the next 2 days to compete with JD Vance and Trump’s MAGA
fundraising machine.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/11119?t=1014&amount=25&akid=3432%2E3611125%2ER4lV1m ]Can I count on you to chip in $25 today to help us cut through the
noise and flip Ohio blue? There’s never been a more important time for you
to give:

If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately.

Today’s rally really tells us everything we need to know about JD Vance.
If he wins we sure as hell know that it won’t be hardworking Ohioans in
the driver’s seat—it’ll be his rich far-right buddies.

But that doesn’t change our goal: we need to stay focused on talking to
folks all across the state and show them that there’s a better way
forward.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/11119?t=1021&amount=25&akid=3432%2E3611125%2ER4lV1m ]But folks, getting our message in front of voters isn’t cheap. Will you
pitch in toward our fundraising goal so we can flip Ohio blue and FINALLY

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/11119?t=1012&express_lane=true&amount=250&akid=3432%2E3611125%2ER4lV1m ]Donate $250 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/11119?t=1013&express_lane=true&amount=30&akid=3432%2E3611125%2ER4lV1m ]Other Amount

name: Great America Update
subject: Future generations are counting on your response
body:
Please take time right now to review and complete Hillsdale College’s RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6802%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=rR0Gx1RopVHj%2fRPtnCzRsw&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c60029%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7vC7cXetoqbsTnj2lJlzIQ&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, Can you do me a favor? Please take time right now to review and complete Hillsdale College’s [**RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey**.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c60020%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=i6bldG%2fJgYR55HFb0LtuJw&sysid=1) My name is Bill Gray, and I’m the associate vice president of national donor outreach at Hillsdale College. It’s my responsibility to invite like-minded conservatives (like you!) to support Hillsdale. **I don’t use the word “battle” lightly, but with the stakes so high one must be blunt.** It’s clear to me that we are in a fight for the future of our nation--a fight against progressives who are targeting our youngest citizens. These so-called “progressives” seek to undermine traditional patriotism and ultimately transform American government and society. _The New York Times’_ recent “1619 Project” is the prime example of this effort to inject into the minds of our youngest citizens a biased distortion of our nation’s history. If you haven’t heard, the “1619 Project” places the founding of America in 1619, when the first slave arrived in Jamestown, rather than in 1776 when the Declaration of Independence proclaimed that “all men are created equal” and endowed by God with “unalienable rights.” **“Our democracy’s founding ideals,” the “1619 Project” proclaims, “were false when they were written.”** Outrageous! _The New York Times’_ stated goal with the “1619 Project” is to influence the curricula of K-12 schools nationwide. They teach young people that slavery--not freedom--is and always will be the central and defining idea of the American experience, making our country irredeemable. This project has garnered universal acclaim from the news media. In fact, the lead essayist just won a Pulitzer Prize! There are even talks about making the “1619 Project” into a feature film. **Given popular and widespread efforts like these, we should not be surprised that there is a decreasing sense of patriotism among younger Americans --and an increasing tendency to embrace socialism and other liberty-destroying ideas.** Education has become a battleground, and reviving a proper understanding of American history and government, especially among younger citizens, must be our** _most urgent priority._** Hillsdale College is at the forefront of this effort. **We are actively engaging the Left on the battlefield of education. And I need your help to make this effort even more effective.** Hillsdale is America’s most powerful advocate for intelligent and informed patriotism--our best defense against the loss of our liberty and insidious beliefs like socialism. We do this on our Michigan campus, with an undergraduate and graduate student body of over 1,500, and through education that reaches and teaches millions of citizens each year on behalf of liberty. And in response to new efforts such as the media-driven “1619 Project” that seek to turn the next generation of citizens against the principles of the Declaration of Independence and the U.S. Constitution, Hillsdale must expand this critical work--especially in 2020. As I said before, to fight and win this battle, Hillsdale needs your help right away. The FIRST step I need you to take right now is to complete the **RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY! Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey**. This national project seeks to make it clear that people in your state and nationwide still revere our founding principles of liberty, and refuse to let them be corrupted by those who hold America in contempt. **As _The New York Times’_ efforts make clear, powerful forces vehemently oppose this view of America, and their assault on our glorious history is taking place before our very eyes. ** _Our ongoing response, rooted in genuine learning, and proven to reach millions of citizens, must be escalated as quickly as possible._ And if, upon completing your Battle Plan, you feel a strong connection to Hillsdale’s work, then I urge you to please consider including a generous tax-deductible gift in support of expanding these efforts on behalf of liberty. Based on the costs of Hillsdale’s multiple educational programs--which I will outline fo**r you shortly --it has been determined that to fully implement this [RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c60021%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=oMCrIP8HDoitt1RoN2z3kQ&sysid=1)** for maximum impact, Hillsdale College must raise at least $1,016,700 within the next month. And unlike most colleges and universities that rely on federal funding and subsidies, EVERY PENNY of funding for Hillsdale’s educational outreach comes from the voluntary support of intelligent patriots like you. This is because Hillsdale College refuses EVEN ONE PENNY of state or federal taxpayer funding--even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. That’s so important, I need to say it again--Hillsdale College refuses EVERY PENNY of government funding! **In this way, Hillsdale remains truly independent, avoiding unconstitutional regulations that would violate the College’s educational mission.** Hillsdale has built national support from hundreds of thousands of citizens. These intelligent patriots know that liberty in America is in trouble thanks to progressive control of our schools and institutions. And these citizens are determined to preserve our liberty--as I believe you are. These supporters give what they can, when they can--gifts of $25 or $50 or more, sometimes much more ... because they understand that every dollar given goes to reaching and teaching millions of people--including our nation’s youth--with genuine learning about liberty and the Constitution. The gift you choose to give today will determine whether Hillsdale can activate each component of the **[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c60022%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YyrBFDH0UGrxA2X44ogQmQ&sysid=1)** And this entire plan is tied to Hillsdale’s proven programs and publications that are educating millions of Americans right now. Here are the key aspects of Hillsdale’s plan for your review and feedback: **BATTLE PLAN POINT #1: Identify the Critical Concerns of Everyday Americans** I mentioned that our network of supporters that is hundreds of thousands of patriots strong--such a broad base of support gives us invaluable public-opinion data on what Americans are MOST concerned about given the current state of our nation. We are always eager to add new perspectives (like yours) that can make our work the most relevant and timely possible. **Your participation today will allow Hillsdale to strengthen our educational outreach efforts by targeting them where they’re needed most, on the areas of concern that matter most to the American people.** You were selected to be part of this effort based on your record of involvement in causes that strengthen America, AND because of Hillsdale’s confidence that you will respond quickly and honestly, lending your voice to our efforts to restore the Constitution. I’m counting on and very much looking forward to your survey response! **BATTLE PLAN POINT #2: Counter Progressive Teaching in America’s Schools** In this section we dig deep into Hillsdale’s proven educational outreach, and give you a sense of how we lead important conversations surrounding America’s history and founding principles--AND ask what YOU think about these efforts. And make no mistake--Hillsdale is uniquely qualified to drive this effort. Did you know that Hillsdale is one of only a few American colleges and universities that requires each student, regardless of major, to complete a one-semester course on the Constitution? This fact has earned the support of so many Americans who did not attend the College, and who have never even set foot on our campus--they understand that what we teach in our classrooms radiates all over America. Is this important to you? In 2012, Hillsdale began offering online courses _free of charge_ , because we see it as an effective way promote intelligent patriotism and civic virtue. We market the courses on social media and online to reach large audiences, especially younger Americans. The response has been tremendous--over 2.3 million citizens have taken one or more of our online courses. Do you think this is an effective means of reaching and teaching millions of Americans on behalf of liberty? We even have an online course that directly counters _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project.” This free course is called **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** and presents an unbiased and complete account of America’s past. To me this is a great example of why these free courses are needed: They safeguard the country, through education, against the damage to liberty inflicted by the Left. And what do you think about sending a free monthly digest of liberty, to millions of people? This newsletter is called _Imprimis_ , and it features speeches delivered at Hillsdale events by prominent scholars, journalists, and policymakers, focused on political, economic, historic, and cultural topics from a constitutional viewpoint. _Imprimis_ is America’s most widely-circulated publication in support of liberty, reaching more households and businesses than either the _Wall Street Journal_ or the “fake news” _New York Times_. Issues covering topics such as “Rediscovering the Wisdom of American History” and “Shall We Defend our Common History?” set _Imprimis_ apart. The publication is as a powerful counterbalance to the biased media outlets that pursue narrow, ideologically driven distortions of history. (If you’re not yet an _Imprimis_ subscriber, we’ll be happy to sign you up as soon as we hear from you.) **BATTLE PLAN POINT #3: Restore Excellence to K-12 Schools** In this section we explore how Hillsdale College is reshaping American K-12 education, especially through our Barney Charter School Initiative, which helps launch and guide classical K-12 charter schools nationwide, teaching thousands of K-12 students. These schools all have a strong civics curriculum. The curriculum provides young Americans with a solid grounding in our nation’s history, our limited constitutional government, and economics. In doing so, Hillsdale provides communities with a practical model of how schools can best serve students and the country. **Sustained by our supporters, Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative has assisted in the founding of more than 20 classical K-12 charter schools in 11 states, with approximately 12,000 students enrolled. And more of these K-12 schools are opening each year.** Do you support this effort to set a new standard for K-12 education and give young Americans a proper education? Hillsdale also launched a new initiative to send pocket Constitutions to thousands of elementary and junior high schools. We ship them with a promise to send as many pocket Constitutions as their schools need. **The response has been astounding.** We’ve now sent out more than 500,000 pocket Constitutions across the country, and we receive more requests every week. Does this effort to restore the Constitution to K-12 schools sound like a good idea to you? As you select your answers, I believe you will find that Hillsdale’s educational outreach is a powerful way to confront and ultimately overcome the progressive forces that seek to instill in young people the ruinous idea that America stands for slavery, not freedom. I know you love this country, and I hope you will partner with Hillsdale in defending America through education--education aimed at citizens of all ages nationwide. The first step is getting your thoughts on our **[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c60022%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YyrBFDH0UGrxA2X44ogQmQ&sysid=1)**
With your response you will represent your state as part of a major sampling of citizen opinion that can help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views and concerns of mainstream Americans--views that we can make available to policymakers and opinion leaders when we discuss the Left’s agenda, and use to strengthen our educational outreach efforts. What Hillsdale needs now is YOU--your thoughtful input on the work we’re doing, and your generous support to expand our work. **So please complete the[Battle Plan Survey](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c60023%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4YfvxOOC9LUDWKaVIOhA2Q&sysid=1) today.** When you give to Hillsdale and share your opinions, you will join a dedicated and growing team of intelligent patriots, who always step up when the time comes to defend America against the progressives’ attack on American history and liberty. Thank you for your commitment to liberty in America. Warm regards,
Bill Gray
Assoc. Vice President of National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 **P.S**. We are in a battle for the future of America, because the Left is determined to transform our country ... by fundamentally changing how history is taught to young people. Education is the battlefield, and Hillsdale College urgently needs you standing with us to support and sustain our efforts. With your help, we can continue to reach and teach millions of citizens of all ages, especially the youngest Americans, with the principles of liberty underlying the Constitution. Please complete **[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY! Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c60024%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tN3FHgJGYQGLKFWtDcoCYw&sysid=1)** to shape Hillsdale College’s defense of America against the progressive assault on history. Your response is needed within five days so we can finalize plans to expand our educational outreach on behalf of liberty.
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_

In 2016, I won this seat by only 1,017 votes – one of the closest margins in U.S. history. And once again, this race is shaping up to be one of the most competitive elections in the country.

body:
What if I told you that pundits almost universally agree Arizona is going to be one of the closest states in the 2022 election?
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/4bB1sxs_gpTHjxsYoV4QdNTiv3XTKsJC0qdLrTHLXIE=/UN8CsQLTIweSoQ_X2Z5NvY921aTn1Zkqmy95SyGORj4=)
Good morning, friend.
I am writing to ask if there is ANYTHING I can say to convince you to make a contribution to me and my friend Greg Stanton before our end-of-month fundraising deadline comes to an end in just a few days.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/4bB1sxs_gpTHjxsYoV4QdNTiv3XTKsJC0qdLrTHLXIE=/4wZ-JTn9ONUjvt-8_s26RgtB8mtjJtot0JYyv4uzQj8=?refcode=X_042422_EOM_A_Kelly)
---
What if I told you that pundits almost universally agree Arizona is going to be one of the closest states in the 2022 election?
What if I told you Arizona is also already one of the most expensive states to run in for the 2022 election -- and the cost will only get higher as we get closer to Election Day?
And what if I told you when our next quarterly deadline ends we're legally required to report what we've raised? Our opponents are too. Everyone will be watching to see the strength of our campaigns.
We're a bit behind where we need to be right now, and really need an absolutely HUGE 6 days before this deadline ends. So please:
_[**Can I count on you to make a $25 contribution to Greg and me before this critical end-of-month fundraising deadline comes to a close in just a few short days?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/4bB1sxs_gpTHjxsYoV4QdNTiv3XTKsJC0qdLrTHLXIE=/4wZ-JTn9ONUjvt-8_s26RgtB8mtjJtot0JYyv4uzQj8=?refcode=X_042422_EOM_A_Kelly&amount=25)_

subject: What if you knew the power of $3?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
Do you know the power of your $3 contribution to Cheri Beasley’s campaign?
#

Do you know the power of your $3 contribution to Cheri Beasley’s campaign?
Well what if you knew that nonpartisan analysts at both FiveThirtyEight and NBC said our race was one of the most likely to decide “control of the Senate” in 2022 — meaning we could control whether or not Democrats stop Mitch McConnell from becoming majority leader again?
What if you knew $3 donations like yours were our best chance to fight back against the $27 million ad buy McConnell’s super PAC just made in North Carolina?
What if your $3 contribution could guarantee we expanded our majority and made it possible to pass critical legislation being blocked by Washington gridlock — like climate action, voting rights, lower prescription drug prices and a living wage?
Knowing your donation today could have this power, doesn’t that seem worth $3?
[**If you agree and want to see real progress in the U.S. Senate, then please make that $3 donation before our official FEC deadline in 3 days. Every donation makes a difference. subject: We want YOU on our team
body:
Peter, You’ve been an outstanding patriot in our fight to take back America from the radical Left.

---
Donald Trump and this rest of his MAGA Republicans are _drooling_ over Ron DeSantis’ draconian and hateful “Don’t Say Gay” bill.

**We need to show a MASSIVE WAVE of disapproval for Ron’s anti-LGBTQ bill – _BEFORE other MAGA Governors follow his lead!_**

[**Friend, unless you actually APPROVE of Ron’s “Don’t Say Gay bill”, we need you to join 12,499 Democrats and sign our letter before MIDNIGHT TONIGHT »**](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/7855?t=7&akid=1049%2E564421%2EBhNcps)
[CHIP IN $1 TO ADD YOUR NAME AND DENOUNCE ‘DON’T SAY GAY’ »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/7855?t=9&akid=1049%2E564421%2EBhNcps)
---
_Dear Gov. Ron DeSantis,_

I don’t know how you sleep at night. Your “Don’t Say Gay” bill is a DISGRAGE – and Americans everywhere are furious.

body:

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44499677/341867855/-2042826227?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjUxNGM5OS1lN2MzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-lEhIyZJ1AJoYaWrId1RYKjAMJWdVFesEI0osLcluYk=)

Peter, I know you don’t always have the time to read a longer email like this one. But this is a really important one to me, all about labor rights, so I hope you’ll read the whole thing.

**[If you’re not able to, I hope you’ll consider chipping in $3 to my reelection campaign so I have the resources to keep fighting for working families »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44499678/341867856/653852622?amount=3&refcode=MTFC_20220424_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjUxNGM5OS1lN2MzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-lEhIyZJ1AJoYaWrId1RYKjAMJWdVFesEI0osLcluYk=)** | [$1,500 GOAL: CHIP IN $3 TO REELECT PROGRESSIVE MARK TAKANO »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44499679/341867857/653852622?amount=3&refcode=MTFC_20220424_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjUxNGM5OS1lN2MzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-lEhIyZJ1AJoYaWrId1RYKjAMJWdVFesEI0osLcluYk=)
---
**You may have heard but earlier this month, Amazon workers made history by organizing the first ever Amazon labor union in New York.**

This is a huge win, not just for the Amazon Labor Union, but for every single Amazon employee and every worker in our country.

**As a high school teacher for 20 years, I was a proud union member of the National Education Association** – _I know how critical unions are to supporting workers rights._

Workers are the backbone of America and we cannot “Build Back Better” without strong labor unions and guaranteed workers' rights. It’s why I introduced legislation to reduce the workweek to 4 days instead of 5, paying employees overtime for hours worked over 32 hours per week.

Unfortunately, Republicans couldn’t care less about working class Americans. They’re busy picking petty fights, spreading conspiracy theories, and spouting hate – _they’re being completely useless!_

**That’s why it would be so tragic if Democrats lose the House in 2022, like many pundits are predicting.**

Because the honest truth is, we’re on the precipice of instituting our progressive vision for America. We just need a little more time.

**[Peter, that’s why I’m humbly asking: Will you chip in $3 to help me keep my new Congressional district blue and save our House majority? I am committed to worker’s rights but I need your help to keep serving you. »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44499680/341867858/653852622?amount=3&refcode=MTFC_20220424_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjUxNGM5OS1lN2MzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-lEhIyZJ1AJoYaWrId1RYKjAMJWdVFesEI0osLcluYk=)**

name: Michelle Lujan Grisham
subject: $1,500 rebates
disclaimer_text: Paid for by New Mexicans for Michelle, John Wertheim, Treasurer
body:
There's still so much work to be done
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44500156/341870436/-2081290588?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODcwZTg0Yi1lOGMzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x16uf5PooWSZMjYSMZQXvg6XnbTojQNYE1VT-FKG_38=&emci=c257920d-7bbf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=a870e84b-e8c3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=24265352)
---
Peter,

I know New Mexicans are struggling with rising prices. That's why I called a special legislative session to deliver relief for working families.
Because of our work during this legislative session, more than 1 million households will receive up to $1,500 in rebates starting this spring to help them make ends meet.
**This is a massive accomplishment – but there's still so much work to be done, and I can't enact my progressive agenda without your help.**
I've faced two full fundraising blackouts this year due to regulations around legislative sessions. That means I'm behind on my fundraising goals – and meanwhile, the GOP is pushing harder than ever to replace me.
Altogether, I've only been able to fundraise for about _four weeks_ in 2022 – and I'm still in a fundraising blackout right now. I can fundraise again starting April 27, and I'm going to need you by my side to catch up.
You'll hear from me soon – but for now, I just want to thank you for joining this team and helping me support working families. All of my work is made possible by grassroots supporters like you.

Thank you,

Michelle Lujan Grisham
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/c257920d-7bbf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a/a870e84b-e8c3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODcwZTg0Yi1lOGMzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x16uf5PooWSZMjYSMZQXvg6XnbTojQNYE1VT-FKG_38=&id=127162320) | | Paid for by New Mexicans for Michelle, John Wertheim, Treasurer

name: Our Revolution
subject: Should Bernie run in 2024?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
| Peter Willis,

Rumors of **Bernie 2024** are circulating, but the truth is our movement is working with him right now to build worker power and forge a better present _and_ future for **all of us**.

**Today, Bernie is hitting the road!** And, we’re joining him in support as he rallies with Amazon workers in NY and Starbucks workers in Virginia fighting to unionize against oppressive corporate power.

**We are so excited to watch our movement advance in real time - and with motivation for the future.** Whether that’s Bernie 2024 or the resurgence of Labor in America, we are taking back power for the people.

Bernie lit the match and we are all carrying the torch. Do you think Bernie should lead the way once more with a presidential run in 2024?

| | [Yes](https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/Bernie_2024/?t=11&akid=2816%2E5885482%2EmrzDCd)
---
| [No](https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/Bernie_2024/?t=12&akid=2816%2E5885482%2EmrzDCd)
---

We fought so hard to elect Bernie because he is the first candidate in generations to run **a true bottom-up campaign** that took on big money in politics and inspired a multi-racial, multi-generational mass movement of working people.

**Bernie’s presidential campaigns were never about him — they were always about us.** The only path toward real justice for working people must be rooted in long-term mass mobilization and engagement in the political process, which is why Bernie founded **Our Revolution**.

While we respect whatever decision he makes about 2024, he needs to hear directly from you before he chooses his path. Should Bernie run?

| [Yes](https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/Bernie_2024/?t=13&akid=2816%2E5885482%2EmrzDCd)
---
| [No](https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/Bernie_2024/?t=14&akid=2816%2E5885482%2EmrzDCd)
---

Our struggle for justice continues.
Not me. Us.

In solidarity,

Our Revolution

* * *

[Facebook](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1&akid=2816%2E5885482%2EmrzDCd) | [Twitter](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=2&akid=2816%2E5885482%2EmrzDCd) | [Instagram](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=3&akid=2816%2E5885482%2EmrzDCd) | [Youtube](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=4&akid=2816%2E5885482%2EmrzDCd) | [Website](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=5&akid=2816%2E5885482%2EmrzDCd) | [Sign Up](https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/signup_2109/?t=6&akid=2816%2E5885482%2EmrzDCd)
---

****Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive group in America. Last year alone, we elected 74% of our 450 endorsed progressive candidates by mobilizing on the ground AND in the halls of power.

clean_body: | Peter Willis, Rumors of Bernie 2024 are circulating, but the truth is our movement is working with him right now to build worker power and forge a better present and future for all of us. Today, Bernie is hitting the road! And, we’re joining him in support as he rallies with Amazon workers in NY and Starbucks workers in Virginia fighting to unionize against oppressive corporate power. We are so excited to watch our movement advance in real time - and with motivation for the future. Whether that’s Bernie 2024 or the resurgence of Labor in America, we are taking back power for the people. Bernie lit the match and we are all carrying the torch. Do you think Bernie should lead the way once more with a presidential run in 2024? | | | We fought so hard to elect Bernie because he is the first candidate in generations to run a true bottom-up campaign that took on big money in politics and inspired a multi-racial, multi-generational mass movement of working people. Bernie’s presidential campaigns were never about him — they were always about us. The only path toward real justice for working people must be rooted in long-term mass mobilization and engagement in the political process, which is why Bernie founded Our Revolution. While we respect whatever decision he makes about 2024, he needs to hear directly from you before he chooses his path. Should Bernie run? | | Our struggle for justice continues. Not me. Us. In solidarity, Our Revolution | | | | | Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive group in America. name: Jason Lee, Beto for Texas
subject: We've got big plans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
We need the resources to assemble a talented campaign team full of folks who believe in our vision.
#
Hey — Jason here.
We've got big plans — from opening field offices to getting our message out online — but it's all going to come down to what we're able to raise from grassroots donors like you chipping in to emails like this one.
[Please, can Beto count on you to chip in $3 or more today to help build the campaign it'll take to reach every Texas voter and defeat Abbott? We're tracking behind on our fundraising goals for the month, so every dollar will make a huge impact.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/55674?refcode=ema20220424-186429&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=186429%2E444211%2EZf_i4b)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/55674?refcode=ema20220424-186429&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=186429%2E444211%2EZf_i4b)**
This race is going to be one of the closest elections in Texas history, and that means we need the resources to assemble a talented campaign team full of folks who believe in our vision.
Check out just a few of the positions your donation will help fund:
✔️ **Data Systems Engineer** to develop and maintain the systems necessary for large-scale volunteer recruitment and voter contact operations.
✔️ **Video Manager** to produce engaging, informative, and compelling video content for social media and a wide range of digital platforms.
✔️ **Organizing Operations Director** to run the operations of the largest organizing program in Texas history.
✔️ **Student Organizing Director** to lead and implement voter contact and registration efforts on college campuses across Texas.
✔️ **Organizers** to conduct regular direct voter contact across Texas with the folks who we need to reach to win this election.
We're scaling our campaign team to defeat Abbott right NOW because this race won't be won in November alone — it will be won in the daily actions we take starting right now.
[To elect Beto, we need to build the largest movement Texas has ever seen. Please, chip in today to play a critical role in this work.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/55674?refcode=ema20220424-186429&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=186429%2E444211%2EZf_i4b)
Thank you so much for your support,
Jason Lee
Deputy Campaign Manager, Beto for Texas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20220424-186429-footer&t=22&refcode2=186429_444211_Zf_i4b&akid=186429%2E444211%2EZf_i4b)**

| | Peter, The first election I ever got to cast my ballot in was all the way back in 2012. I was excited to be part of the democratic process – to vote for candidates who I thought would put their egos aside and fight on behalf of my community. But it hasn't always turned out that way. It seems like politicians are lying more than ever. Corruption abounds, even here in Nassau County. Worst of all, politicians are so focused on beating the other side that _nothing gets done_. I'm running for Congress to change all of that, Peter. And I need your help. Let's build a movement that's bigger than the partisan divide and will change Washington from the ground up. **[Chip in $18 to join our campaign today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44501131/341875107/924952270?refcode=2022-04-24-commonsense1&recurring=0&amount=18&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=a1472ce7-ecc3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTQ3MmNlNy1lY2MzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZOFEiKFs5u3W0gp0Q8w40HhclH5kDotYGj49onYK6gc=)** I appreciate rigorous debate as much as any other leader.**In fact, I relish it.** Listening to the other side is how we learn more about ourselves. But passionate debates have devolved into pointless schoolyard fights. No one is listening to one another. And the problems in our communities are piling up. Politics isn't about partisan squabbles. Politics is about keeping our neighborhoods and families safe. Politics is about making sure our future is secure through public education and job creation. In short, politics is about you and me and the people we love, Peter. **I'm never going to forget that. And in Congress, I'll make sure every one of my colleagues remembers that they're there to _serve,_ not grandstand.** **[So please, donate $18 today and remind politicians in Washington that their job is so much bigger than their petty disputes.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44501132/341875108/924952270?refcode=2022-04-24-commonsense1&recurring=0&amount=18&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=a1472ce7-ecc3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTQ3MmNlNy1lY2MzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZOFEiKFs5u3W0gp0Q8w40HhclH5kDotYGj49onYK6gc=)** It's about us, Peter. | | By now, I hope you know that my campaign is powered by grassroots donors. **Over 82% of my fundraising comes from small-dollar donors.** With 3 self-funders in the race who have given themselves hundreds of thousands of dollars and another candidate being bankrolled by a crypto billionaire,**I am so proud that my campaign is backed by everyday Oregonians giving what they can.** I count on people like _you_ to power my campaign. Not my personal fortune, not shady Super PACs, and _definitely_ not cryptocurrency billionaires trying to buy a seat in Congress. So, I have a favor to ask. **[Will you commit to becoming a weekly recurring donor through the Oregon primary? Even as little as $3 per week helps.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44501202/341875435/-502567250?refcode=2022-04-23-recurring&recurring=4&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=5da8b898-edc3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZGE4Yjg5OC1lZGMzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qUQylMGRzz0hvNU0EmwQQBKFCCsJjaXs3lytJl6aGNo=) ** All you need to do is check off that you'd like to make your contribution recurring. And voila! You're a recurring supporter! As we reach the final weeks of the campaign, your recurring donation helps my team have a better sense of how much money is coming in every day. And that means we can make smarter decisions! **We're using this money to get my message out to every voter in the Oregon Sixth.** **My opponents are outspending us, and they have a bottomless well of cash to keep dipping into. With just over three weeks until the primary,****your support is critical.** **[Will you chip in $3 per week in these final days?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44501203/341875436/-502567250?refcode=2022-04-23-recurring&recurring=4&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=5da8b898-edc3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZGE4Yjg5OC1lZGMzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qUQylMGRzz0hvNU0EmwQQBKFCCsJjaXs3lytJl6aGNo=)** clean_body: | | | By now, I hope you know that my campaign is powered by grassroots donors. Over 82% of my fundraising comes from small-dollar donors. With 3 self-funders in the race who have given themselves hundreds of thousands of dollars and another candidate being bankrolled by a crypto billionaire,I am so proud that my campaign is backed by everyday Oregonians giving what they can. I count on people like you to power my campaign. Not my personal fortune, not shady Super PACs, and definitely not cryptocurrency billionaires trying to buy a seat in Congress. So, I have a favor to ask. = All you need to do is check off that you'd like to make your contribution recurring. And voila! You're a recurring supporter! As we reach the final weeks of the campaign, your recurring donation helps my team have a better sense of how much money is coming in every day. And that means we can make smarter decisions! We're using this money to get my message out to every voter in the Oregon Sixth. My opponents are outspending us, and they have a bottomless well of cash to keep dipping into. Friend,

I hope you don’t mind me dropping into your inbox today — I’m Charlie Crist, and I’m running for governor to defeat Gov. Ron DeSantis. **[(If you’re already fired up to kick him out of office, you can click here to make a secure contribution today.)](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44505436/341898987/234651256?&amount=5&refcode=20220424_f_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDUyZTA2OC0wZmM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VLh0rJdNywF8A0xFNFM9uFv0-xkt9xHmpo4LmtcrAcM=)**

But I can’t do it alone. Gov. DeSantis has an army of far-right, billionaire donors at his beck and call, and they’ve already poured millions into his campaign coffers. Friend, here's the latest: National Republicans have already raised more than $143 MILLION to take back Senate control and defeat Democrats like myself, an advantage that could decide this race. On top of that, Marco Rubio himself is breaking GOP fundraising records, raising more than $6 MILLION in just the last few months.
From the bottom of my heart, please believe me when I say that this grassroots movement of ours is _working_ :__ CNN said Florida's Senate seat is one of the most likely to flip. But making all of that happen comes down to resources. We're building the momentum we need to win, but this race is going to come down to who has the resources they need to reach the most voters. That's why – right here, right now – I must raise another $10,000 before my midnight deadline.**

[Please, I wouldn't ask if it weren't so important to me. Can I count on you to rush a contribution of $5 or more right now to help me defeat Marco Rubio and protect our Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44505470/341899164/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3007-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTFiNGExZS0xMGM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CrPpcdWLxUAOC4Rf_tZAJgj6oC_q-8LxSeO4YXIDIqE=)**

name: Team Wendy
subject: Register to Vote – Last Chance!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wendy For US
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wdfcemail?refcode=4/24fr [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wdfcemail?refcode=4/24fr]

Peter
Tomorrow, Monday April 25 th is the LAST day to register to vote to be eligible to vote in the 2022 Georgia Democratic Primary. If you want to register online or if you want to check your current registration status, click here. [https://mvp.sos.ga.gov/]
Elections have huge consequences. When Georgia Democrats mobilize and show up to the polls, we get game-changing results. If you’ve seen any of Marjorie Taylor Greene’s testimony from Friday, you’ll have been reminded of just how much is at stake.
Wendy Davis is going to replace her in November, but first she needs to win in May. Will you please help remind folks that if they haven’t registered yet, today is their last chance? Together we can elect Wendy and finally get the representation we deserve!

Thank you,
Team Wendy

subject: TUNE IN: Tonight's WSB-TV Debate Between Perdue, Kemp
body:
Tonight, David Perdue will face off against Brian Kemp in the first of three gubernatorial primary debates. | | | |
---
| | | Tonight, David Perdue will face off against Brian Kemp in the first of three gubernatorial primary debates. **WHAT: GOP Gubernatorial Debate hosted by WSB-TV

WHEN: Sunday, April 24 at 7:00 p.m.

WHERE: WSB-TV Channel 2 and WSB Now**

We hope you’ll tune in to watch David discuss his positive vision for Georgia and hold Kemp accountable for selling us out.

**Two other debates will take place on:**
* Thursday, April 28 at 7:00 p.m., hosted by WTOC-TV
* Sunday, May 1 at 7:00 p.m., hosted by Georgia Public Broadcasting

**Please also mark your calendar for several key dates:**
* Monday, April 25: Last day to register or update your registration for the primary
* Monday, May 2: Early voting begins
* Tuesday, May 24: Primary election day

**_With your help and your vote, David Perdue will win the primary and defeat Abrams in November!_**

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Have you seen this?
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWv9IvOHN7

State of education

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWv9IvOHN7

From the
Desk of Dr. Ben Carson:
Hello,
I don't
believe the majority of the public really knows what is being
taught to our children and grandchildren.
They
assume they are taught the same lessons we learned growing
up-that America is a land of freedom and opportunity where anyone
has a chance at success.
From what
I've seen, this isn't always the case. However, I want to know
what you've seen.

Dr. Ben
Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute
I believe
that children as young as elementary age are being taught to
reject our American values.
They are
told that our Founding Fathers were massively flawed and that it
overshadows the nation they built. They hear that our
Constitution is "out of date" and needs to be "modernized."

Progressives are rewriting our nation's history and they are
doing it with our youngest and most vulnerable. We cannot let
this happen!
This year
I'm going to be meeting with political leaders and educational
"experts" across the country. I'm going to make sure people know
what is really happening in our schools.
I want to
be able to share with them the thoughts of people who are closest
to the issue. Specifically, I would like to include your
thoughts.
The
American Cornerstone Institute, a nonprofit I recently founded,
has created a unique survey. We're trying to gauge the state of
America's Educational System by surveying people like you.
I'd like
to ask you to give me 2 minutes of your time so we can better
understand the problems that exist in our educational system. You
can access the survey here...

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60011094:Wv9IvOHN7:m:3:2532013465:8F1C30A8E6D538A44E8D0E0E948D2BB4:r
Thank you
for your consideration.
Regards,

Dr. Ben
Carson
Founder &
Chairman American Cornerstone Institute

Your
donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and
preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our
country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods
to decrease the federal government's role in society and to
improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.

Copyright
© 2021 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved.

body:

It's an election year, friend, and the stakes are higher than EVER.

With extremist Republicans restricting the right to vote and spreading conspiracy theories like wildfire, it's clear that**if Democrats don't get their act together NOW, we could lose so much more than these elections – we might lose our democracy for GOOD. **
But unlike presidential elections, primaries and midterms often fly under the radar – that shouldn't be the case, because they determine SO MUCH! **With our razor-thin House and Senate majorities on the line, we want to make sure we’re nominating the very best Democratic candidates.**
**[That's why we're reaching out to top Democrats in your area to make sure you've got your i's dotted and t's crossed ahead of this critical election. Please, let us know before our official survey closes at midnight tonight:](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44505890/341901101/1503993332?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk818-su-aai&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU1ZDFjNzM2LTEyYzQtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=X_c9UgdGNY-Bpdxxmu25NX5mirGEM_fxF4p4W2KmCQY=&emci=3e0b85fa-90c2-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=55d1c736-12c4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=23124236)**

name: Team Nan
subject: re: our opponent’s new attack ad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Nan Whaley
body:
The story of Dayton and its people is the story of Ohio’s resilience.

Team,
One of our opponents has just released an ad attacking the city of Dayton – and we need your help to fight back.
**[With just over a week to go before the primary election, this is an especially critical time to show your support. Will you chip in $5 to fight this newest attack?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44505979/341901476/-1526808171?refcode=nw_em_220424_1_t2_a&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjA2OGFlOS0xMmM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7ChRMBA4hU15CafsUBNELp9TQbMkTAfOqmENl1I_IG0=)**
The story of Dayton and its people is the story of Ohio’s resilience in the face of hardship. But Ohio voters know better than to fall for self-serving attacks on our communities from a desperate millionaire who is focused on himself, not Ohio families.
Like so many communities across Ohio, Dayton has been hit with huge challenges in recent years – from a mass shooting to the COVID-19 pandemic to the opioid crisis. Through it all, Nan has led her community and they’ve come out stronger.
We need a leader like Nan who has experience tackling these issues and will fight for communities across Ohio that have been neglected and left behind by folks in charge at the state capital.
Nan is ready to build a government that works for all Ohioans. She has a plan to root out corruption, bring jobs to our communities, and raise wages. As the only non-millionaire in this race, Nan understands what Ohioans need – and she’s also counting on our support to fight back.
**[Will you pitch in $5 right now to counter this new attack and elect a leader from the working class who will fight for all Ohioans?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44505980/341901477/-1526808171?refcode=nw_em_220424_1_t2_a&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjA2OGFlOS0xMmM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7ChRMBA4hU15CafsUBNELp9TQbMkTAfOqmENl1I_IG0=)**
Thank you,

Team Nan

****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44505981/341901478/-1526808171?refcode=nw_em_220424_1_t2_a&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjA2OGFlOS0xMmM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7ChRMBA4hU15CafsUBNELp9TQbMkTAfOqmENl1I_IG0=)****

* * *
Paid for by Friends of Nan Whaley

# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44506002/341901723/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjFjNTE5Yy0xM2M0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SZ8Isf2SXJcSySLVNEjs9KhmJt9liXqLXw2-90pSHlw=)
Hey team, Michael said I could reach out. Our must-reach flash fundraising deadline is tonight at midnight and we’re just short of reaching it. If a few more supporters like you step up, I know we can get there in time. [**Protecting this seat and defending our Senate majority is going to be a team effort. Will you join ours? Split a $10 contribution now.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44506003/341901724/919226663?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_TAN_AC_20220424_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjFjNTE5Yy0xM2M0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SZ8Isf2SXJcSySLVNEjs9KhmJt9liXqLXw2-90pSHlw=) This is an important one. National Republicans around the country are feeling emboldened and ramping up their efforts to flip seats like this one here in Washington state – and we all know that if just one seat gets flipped, Mitch McConnell will take back the Senate and be able to enact his disastrous agenda. Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, we flipped the Senate last election. And with this razor thin majority, I’ve been fighting every day in the other Washington to lower costs for families on child care, health care, and so much more. clean_body: | = Hey team, Michael said I could reach out. Our must-reach flash fundraising deadline is tonight at midnight and we’re just short of reaching it. If a few more supporters like you step up, I know we can get there in time. = This is an important one. National Republicans around the country are feeling emboldened and ramping up their efforts to flip seats like this one here in Washington state – and we all know that if just one seat gets flipped, Mitch McConnell will take back the Senate and be able to enact his disastrous agenda. Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, we flipped the Senate last election. And with this razor thin majority, I’ve been fighting every day in the other Washington to lower costs for families on child care, health care, and so much more. We’re building a strong campaign that can defend this seat in November, but with the GOP setting their sights on defeating us, we can’t afford to miss meeting this $15,000 goal. = Thank you, Patty | Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

name: Garrett, NDRC
subject: I don't often quote Republicans, but you have to see this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee
body:
it's about state courts
|
---

---
| **"The next real election battlefield out there is the state supreme courts and state judicial races."**

– Adam Kincaid, president of the National Republican Redistricting Trust
---
Friend, I don't often quote Republicans, but I had to share this. Over the past few months, a number of state courts have overturned the GOP's manipulated maps for violating state law – and the GOP is not happy about it. So they're trying to **"neutralize" (AP) state supreme courts in the 2022 elections.**

[_Will you help us fight back against GOP’s efforts to gerrymander?_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44506219/341902703/820837603?amount=20&refcode=20220424.2r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQzMWExYmI1LTE1YzQtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9nFVQ1RVMqFkgkcs683eWSsrZ6Hxw9myPMz0Dzn2_K0=)
**“We can change those courts.”**

– Chris Christie, co-chair of the National Republican Redistricting Trust
---
I can't overstate the importance of state supreme courts in protecting voters from rampant map manipulation. From Pennsylvania to North Carolina to Ohio, Republican gerrymanders have been stopped short by state court decisions that protect voters’ rights, resulting in U.S. House maps will be _fairer_ in 2022 than they were in 2012.

So it's no wonder NBC News reported that **"Republicans eye state courts as next political battlegrounds."** Their tactics range from trying to stack the courts with pro-gerrymandering judges to trying to impeach justices who support fair maps. If we don't fight back, _we could lose a critical line of defense against gerrymandering._

**I’m not willing to let it happen – are you? Please, will you rush a donation TODAY to help us fight Republicans’ plans at the ballot box and in the states?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: it's about state courts | | "The next real election battlefield out there is the state supreme courts and state judicial races." – Adam Kincaid, president of the National Republican Redistricting Trust Friend, I don't often quote Republicans, but I had to share this. Over the past few months, a number of state courts have overturned the GOP's manipulated maps for violating state law – and the GOP is not happy about it. So they're trying to "neutralize" (AP) state supreme courts in the 2022 elections. = “We can change those courts.” – Chris Christie, co-chair of the National Republican Redistricting Trust I can't overstate the importance of state supreme courts in protecting voters from rampant map manipulation. From Pennsylvania to North Carolina to Ohio, Republican gerrymanders have been stopped short by state court decisions that protect voters’ rights, resulting in U.S. House maps will be fairer in 2022 than they were in 2012. So it's no wonder NBC News reported that "Republicans eye state courts as next political battlegrounds." Their tactics range from trying to stack the courts with pro-gerrymandering judges to trying to impeach justices who support fair maps. If we don't fight back, we could lose a critical line of defense against gerrymandering. I’m not willing to let it happen – are you? Please, will you rush a donation TODAY to help us fight Republicans’ plans at the ballot box and in the states? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Thanks, Garrett = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. name: Sen. Mallory =?iso-8859-1?q?McMorrow=A0?=
subject: Derek: We are the biggest threat to their hollow and hateful scheme.
body:
Hi, Derek, it’s Michigan state Senator Mallory McMorrow.
You may have seen me online or on TV this week. That’s because on Tuesday, after reading a fundraising email sent by a Republican colleague where I was accused of wanting to “groom and sexualize children” for defending LGBTQ+ rights, I took to the Michigan Senate floor to defend myself and the marginalized communities Republicans love attacking :
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgvadlcc?refcode=20220424_CGVA_DLCC [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgvadlcc?refcode=20220424_CGVA_DLCC]
I've had people reach out to thank me for speaking out, but this isn't about me , Derek. It's about us – and how if enough of us come together, speak out, and take action to hold Republicans accountable for their hollow, hateful scheme, it will fail. Period.
As a Michigan state Senator, I’ve seen just how far state Republicans are willing to go to pass their backward agenda , and I know that if we can elect more Democrats to our statehouses, we can stop them.
Will you stand with me and chip in a $25 split donation to the DLCC and the CommonGood? Your support will go right to work electing more Democrats to state legislatures and in races around the country who will fight for our values and stand up against Republicans’ hateful agenda. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgvadlcc?refcode=20220424_CGVA_DLCC]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgvadlcc?refcode=20220424_CGVA_DLCC&amount=25]
DONATE $35 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgvadlcc?refcode=20220424_CGVA_DLCC&amount=35]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgvadlcc?refcode=20220424_CGVA_DLCC&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgvadlcc?refcode=20220424_CGVA_DLCC&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgvadlcc?refcode=20220424_CGVA_DLCC&amount=250]
Donate ANY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgvadlcc?refcode=20220424_CGVA_DLCC]
Derek, hate will only win if people like us stand by and let it happen.
Throughout the country, state Republicans are waging war on our Democratic values, attacking the LGBTQ+ community, and passing legislation that blatantly denies the racism woven into our American story.
Electing Democrats to serve in state legislatures nationwide is the key to fighting back against state Republicans’ hateful crusade . But in Michigan, we’re already on edge – we have four special elections next month for critical seats in our state legislature. Electing Democrats to these seats is crucial to defending against a right-wing takeover.
We cannot stand by and let state Republicans continue their ruthless attacks – and we cannot let hate win.
Fighting back against hate starts with committed Democrats like you, [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgvadlcc?refcode=20220424_CGVA_DLCC] Derek. Will you split a $25 donation today between DLCC and CommonGood to support state Democrats in this year’s midterm elections? This is a critical moment for Democratic state legislators and for Democrats in close races across the country, so we can’t back down now. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgvadlcc?refcode=20220424_CGVA_DLCC]
Together,
Mallory McMorrow
Michigan State Senator
(This is a sponsored send hosted by CommonGood. CommonGood is dedicated to helping Democratic campaigns and organizations win critical races in Virginia and across the country.)

Common Good Virginia
PO Box 26112
Arlington, VA 22215
If you would like to opt-out of future emails from Common Good Virginia, click unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/22c8e7c5-29c3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a/ff4270dd-14c4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjQyNzBkZC0xNGM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VgeKvo2gBea9UYblbzH0CBBH2bpsoUHDfOXFT54Si3I=&id=108609855 .

body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44506290/341903247/-420428835?refcode=20220424_SA_RW&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OGYxZTlhMy0xOGM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=isepHS5Ik5QFN4w02b5ex0G_S4dwO8gRdWXP_hrw0EA=) Friend - I'm one of the most vulnerable incumbent Senate Democrats up for reelection this year, and I need your help: while I've spent my time in office providing pandemic relief to struggling families, fighting for voting rights and delivering on our progressive priorities, extremist Republicans are doing everything they can to attack me and smear my record. Here's why: experts at _POLITICO_ say that Democrats' chances of defending our razor-thin majority hinge on keeping Georgia blue. This race will decide Senate control – but while GOP megadonors and dark money groups have millions to spend to try and buy this seat, we're running a people-powered campaign that relies on grassroots support. **And unfortunately, with time running out before our crucial midnight fundraising deadline, we're falling incredibly short of our goal.** **So I'm personally reaching out to ask for your help today. I need to raise another $8,346 to fight back against GOP attacks and protect my seat – and I'm counting on you to help me get there:[ please, split $25 or more right now – as much as you can spare by midnight tonight – between my campaign and Seth Moulton's Serve America so we can win in Georgia and defend our Democratic Senate majority. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44506291/341903248/-392698372?refcode=20220424_SA_RW&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OGYxZTlhMy0xOGM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=isepHS5Ik5QFN4w02b5ex0G_S4dwO8gRdWXP_hrw0EA=)** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44506292/341903249/-420428835?refcode=20220424_SA_RW&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OGYxZTlhMy0xOGM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=isepHS5Ik5QFN4w02b5ex0G_S4dwO8gRdWXP_hrw0EA=)
As a kid who grew up in public housing, I know what it's like to be counted out before you even get started. But through hard work and the support of my family and community, I was able to graduate from college and went on to become the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church. Now, I'm proudly serving as the first Black senator in Georgia's history. But here's the deal: **with the Senate split 50-50, Republicans need to flip only one seat to retake control – and they're coming after me as a top target for defeat.** That's why we have to fight back _now_ – and it's why falling short of important goals like this isn't an option. Because if we fail to keep Georgia blue, Mitch McConnell will be back calling the shots and obstructing our Democratic agenda at every turn. **The battle for Senate control will be won or lost in Georgia, friend. So if you care about defending our Democratic Senate, I'm counting on you to rush your immediate grassroots support before it's too late:** [**Please, split a donation of $25 or more now between my campaign and Seth Moulton's Serve America PAC – before our crucial midnight deadline – to help us fight back against GOP attacks, keep Georgia blue and defend our Democratic Senate majority!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44506293/341903250/-392698372?refcode=20220424_SA_RW&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OGYxZTlhMy0xOGM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=isepHS5Ik5QFN4w02b5ex0G_S4dwO8gRdWXP_hrw0EA=) I appreciate it – thank you so much. – Raphael Warnock [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44506294/341903251/-420428835?refcode=20220424_SA_RW&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OGYxZTlhMy0xOGM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=isepHS5Ik5QFN4w02b5ex0G_S4dwO8gRdWXP_hrw0EA=)
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44506295/341903252/1848844371?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OGYxZTlhMy0xOGM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=isepHS5Ik5QFN4w02b5ex0G_S4dwO8gRdWXP_hrw0EA=&emci=bcd06c78-4bc2-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=88f1e9a3-18c4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=194769) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44506296/341903253/-1745464800?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OGYxZTlhMy0xOGM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=isepHS5Ik5QFN4w02b5ex0G_S4dwO8gRdWXP_hrw0EA=&emci=bcd06c78-4bc2-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=88f1e9a3-18c4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=194769) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44506297/341903254/341442065?hl=en&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OGYxZTlhMy0xOGM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=isepHS5Ik5QFN4w02b5ex0G_S4dwO8gRdWXP_hrw0EA=&emci=bcd06c78-4bc2-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=88f1e9a3-18c4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=194769) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44506298/341903255/-368236352?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OGYxZTlhMy0xOGM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=isepHS5Ik5QFN4w02b5ex0G_S4dwO8gRdWXP_hrw0EA=&emci=bcd06c78-4bc2-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=88f1e9a3-18c4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=194769)

subject: We must take back the Senate
body:
Peter, America is at a crossroads.

Every day, the radical Left gains more power over the media, our corporate boards, and our classrooms.

_If we wait too much longer to act, we may NEVER be able to take back our country._

**Our mission is clear: we MUST take back the Senate if we have any chance of saving our country from the socialists who want to destroy it.**
