name: Abby Finkenauer and Daniel Wasta
subject: writing to you from our home in Cedar Rapids
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44507038/341906909/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk827-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjUzMDJjOS0xZWM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J7HLOxXXT6-McefJygYFg_U47G1PM5Jf1kyc0V0Bngw=)
Peter – it's Abby and Daniel, writing to you from our home in Cedar Rapids. It turns out that if you marry your best friend like we did, you'll have a lot of things in common. For us, one of the biggest things that ties us together is our love for Iowa.
One of us (Abby) was born and raised in Sherrill – a one-of-a-kind small rural town in Dubuque County, while the other (Daniel) is from Cedar Rapids and feels most at home in Kinnick Stadium, watching a Hawkeye game. Both of us spend our time fighting for a better life for working families here in Iowa – which is why we're determined to defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley (R) and expand Democrats' majority in the Senate. **[(To help Abby defeat Sen. Grassley and continue this fight in the Senate, can you donate $5 right now?)](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44507039/341906910/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk827-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjUzMDJjOS0xZWM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J7HLOxXXT6-McefJygYFg_U47G1PM5Jf1kyc0V0Bngw=)**
When we decided we wanted to build a life together, we both knew we wanted to do that right here in our beautiful state. We even tied the knot in our backyard! **While we were planting roots here, however, so many of our friends were _leaving_ Iowa, looking for more opportunities and better-paying jobs.**
We love Iowa, but the thing is, leaders like Sen. Grassley are turning their backs on our incredible state. He's failing working families here who need a fighter. He's failing the 30,000 family farms that we've lost since he took office. He's failing union workers who need protections. He's failing the hundreds of thousands of Iowans who count on the health care that he's tried to take away time and time again.
**Taking on Sen. Grassley isn't about politics – it's about fighting for a better future for Iowa and the families like ours that call it home. It's about believing in our state and everything it has to offer.**
The GOP knows how powerful this campaign is. It's why they're actively and desperately trying to kick us off the ballot. It's why they've amassed a war chest of over $44 million to keep on attacking campaigns like ours. We need you with us to fight back and to keep on fighting for Iowa. **[Please, if you share our belief that Iowa deserves better – and that we must EXPAND our Senate majority by defeating vulnerable GOP senators like Chuck Grassley – will you donate $5 to help us flip this seat blue and fight for working families here in our cherished state?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44507040/341906911/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk827-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjUzMDJjOS0xZWM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J7HLOxXXT6-McefJygYFg_U47G1PM5Jf1kyc0V0Bngw=)**
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44507041/341906912/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk827-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjUzMDJjOS0xZWM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J7HLOxXXT6-McefJygYFg_U47G1PM5Jf1kyc0V0Bngw=)
---
We are so grateful to live together in the state that we love. Thank you for standing with us to fight for it.

– Abby and Daniel

clean_body: | | | = Peter – it's Abby and Daniel, writing to you from our home in Cedar Rapids. It turns out that if you marry your best friend like we did, you'll have a lot of things in common. For us, one of the biggest things that ties us together is our love for Iowa. One of us (Abby) was born and raised in Sherrill – a one-of-a-kind small rural town in Dubuque County, while the other (Daniel) is from Cedar Rapids and feels most at home in Kinnick Stadium, watching a Hawkeye game. Both of us spend our time fighting for a better life for working families here in Iowa – which is why we're determined to defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley (R) and expand Democrats' majority in the Senate. = When we decided we wanted to build a life together, we both knew we wanted to do that right here in our beautiful state. We even tied the knot in our backyard! While we were planting roots here, however, so many of our friends were leaving Iowa, looking for more opportunities and better-paying jobs. We love Iowa, but the thing is, leaders like Sen. Grassley are turning their backs on our incredible state. He's failing working families here who need a fighter. He's failing the 30,000 family farms that we've lost since he took office. He's failing union workers who need protections. He's failing the hundreds of thousands of Iowans who count on the health care that he's tried to take away time and time again. Taking on Sen. Grassley isn't about politics – it's about fighting for a better future for Iowa and the families like ours that call it home. It's about believing in our state and everything it has to offer. The GOP knows how powerful this campaign is. It's why they're actively and desperately trying to kick us off the ballot. It's why they've amassed a war chest of over $44 million to keep on attacking campaigns like ours. We need you with us to fight back and to keep on fighting for Iowa. = | | = We are so grateful to live together in the state that we love. Thank you for standing with us to fight for it. – Abby and Daniel | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. To receive fewer emails, please click #!. To unsubscribe from this email list, please click . Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa PO Box 1843 Cedar Rapids, IA 52406 United States |

name: =?utf-8?Q?Benda=20for=20Congress?=
subject: Thank you friends!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BENDA FOR CONGRESS](https://bendaforcongress
body:
| | | |
---
| | | Dear Peter, Yesterday, we met in Mankato to hear from first district congressional candidates on their vision for our country. The goal of this convention was for candidates to showcase their message and determine if there was enough support for a candidate to give them Republican “endorsement” status.

In the end, we ended the day the same way as we started, with no clear front runner and no endorsed candidate.

As the grassroots, outsider candidate in this race, I was proud to have the support of so many common-sense delegates that believed in my authentic message. My sincere thanks to those supporters who showed up to give their entire day to participate in this dynamic process. I was humbled by this strong support and especially those that were so vocal encouraging me to continue my efforts into the primary election on May 24th.

What we did learn in this process is that even the support of the St. Paul or Washington D.C. elites is not convincing enough to force a candidate on the good people of southern Minnesota.

As I like to say, “Common sense lives in the grass roots and on Main Street!”

I will continue to take my campaign directly to you and look forward to hearing from you on your ideas to put our Country on a course correction. I hope to see you all soon!

I would appreciate your vote and your help spreading the word to vote for Matt Benda in the special election primary on May 24th. Remember, early voting is now open. You can vote any day during business hours at the office of your [county elections official](https://bendaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ace2cfdb811af9316dec053d7&id=3d5d051c59&e=58a207e9d5). Vote local. Vote Benda!
---
| Sincerely,
---
|
---
| Matt Benda
507-383-4679
[matt@bendaforcongress.com](mailto:matt@bendaforcongress.com)
---
|

name: Kevin Kiley
subject: The Worst Remaining Bills
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Congress 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
body:
|
---
Hi Peter, I've just published a new blog post: [Calm Before the Storm](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQzioqBvpRHDEZD5LQGb3KyBmGDYTBFdZDZtruIeu29a4SW9A&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=apr24_final&n=1) This was an action-packed last week at the Capitol. Next week will be as well. I’m spending the weekend knocking on doors, talking to voters. Here's a [brief overvie](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQziooE4DA7aKyr9a-UEcOsX6I6lnT5WSjKZmmlF41al4KFqsRChNsAOpfUkFnmNNYs-VI&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=apr24_final&n=2)[w](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQziooE4DA7aKyr9a-UEcOsX6I6lnT5WSjKZmmlF41al4KFqsRChNsAOpfUkFnmNNYs-VI&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=apr24_final&n=3) of the legislative deadlines. And here are the worst remaining bills:
* AB 2223 is in the Appropriations Committee. Watch [my discussion with Charlie Kirk](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=w5XKTZ0h8dEcNEoc_HghfEk5CLyNgObMi3pNe7ANBDpZVAR0Wl6IKEVnt66v0NHDH1yBwLhFnZsGUAuHIW34MFbRSKJfNk7j44OLb70LGFrwQqxyFPAv3txwmHFrLucy5wKkRhJLygZUU6t-SOj92g&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=apr24_final&n=4) about the horror of this legislation.
* AB 2098 is also in Appropriations.
* AB 1479 is in Senate Education.
* AB 2932, mandating a 32-hour work week, is in the Labor Committee. I [discussed on Newsmax](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8Trwmtk_uyVQ0nz6QZoJharOUwTxAF3RwwhmUIXfwkSmQay2TveuAoZ64L0gjfScKTA&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=apr24_final&n=5) how this has again made California a national laughingstock.

Several awful bills are of course [already dead](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8Trwmtk_uyVQ0nz6QZoJharOQ4csgIuW0VEequVPOtLTTZIGG5nL6ynifRINe8dFcpA&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=apr24_final&n=6). This all comes at a moment of turmoil for the Supermajority: their botched attempt to butcher my gas tax bill, the implosion of the “Vaccine Work Group” bill package, Newsom backtracking on the student mandate, and the committee chair’s profanity-laden meltdown. It’s what happens when corrupt politicians lose their grip on power. What’s changing the game is citizens getting involved like never before. That was the topic of [my keynote address](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQzioqeJCr1XJsDNS-j-AWs55XuBu5M45TkQiLjfgvbp5Z7SpWgaImIsDwJC14amOTNYSm355cz5muBiKmvpiBSAuE5&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=apr24_final&n=7) to the Foundation Freedom, _A New Spark of Liberty._ Enjoy this beautiful Sunday. Our Capitol and campaign battles are both about to hit full throttle. [Support our campaign before April 30](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv-GOhHPWzgYbh54Gph7Pyuk3g2mp41Qa8XyLKk0CnWqFcPhfo-70bh2d9FGRmWv-G172QGsW76cwQP_qMTr_tK1&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=apr24_final&n=8) [Join our team of volunteers](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=46JphwgMS_nx4Jy_hVRltapZUD-lZMBHaJyoWz5Uu20S-IrbkxgjMUx0zKmdEMfF&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=apr24_final&n=9) Kevin Kiley
California Legislator
Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Congress 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=apr24_final&n=10).

[](https://www.marcusforgeorgia.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzsn0D366fuE1hyM8nYo_dxU7TRfY3YK_099-sv61zvREXDlIosldDnBpfLfsK3MZaU&e=3c0efca69a2e76c4868c82f23dff8b2a&utm_source=marcusflowers&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=220424_nytjudgefwd&n=1) [](https://www.marcusforgeorgia.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzsn0D366fuE1hyM8nYo_dxUO1JDN-S61Eld8RmnJuo0Q0AhG01hx_iUnMlIQGP6_4o&e=3c0efca69a2e76c4868c82f23dff8b2a&utm_source=marcusflowers&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=220424_nytjudgefwd&n=2)
_**Effort to Remove Marjorie Taylor Greene From Ballot Can Proceed, Judge Says**_ Hi, it’s Marcus Flowers, Democrat and Army Veteran running for Congress against Marjorie Taylor Greene. A federal judge has cleared the way for a lawsuit seeking to disqualify Marjorie Taylor Greene from running for re-election to Congress, citing her role in the Jan. 6, 2021, attack on the Capitol. **This is major news.** And while we don’t know what the outcome will be, we know that cracks are appearing in Marjorie Taylor Greene’s armor. We can win this thing. **Here’s the problem:** With less than 5 weeks to go until Election Day, we need to put every ounce of energy we have into keeping our ads on T.V. That’s where you come in.

[**Earlier today, we set a goal of getting 5,000 individual grassroots donation of our average contribution amount of $21.40. As of now, we’re 4,605 away. Can you donate now to help us reach our goal?**](https://www.marcusforgeorgia.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzsn0D366fuE1hyM8nYo_dxU7TRfY3YK_099-sv61zvREUQnSuTfW1SYjR9KIu3MLdE&e=3c0efca69a2e76c4868c82f23dff8b2a&utm_source=marcusflowers&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=220424_nytjudgefwd&n=3) | [](https://www.marcusforgeorgia.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzsn0D366fuE1hyM8nYo_dxU7TRfY3YK_099-sv61zvREUQnSuTfW1SYjR9KIu3MLdE&e=3c0efca69a2e76c4868c82f23dff8b2a&utm_source=marcusflowers&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=220424_nytjudgefwd&n=4 "DONATE NOW >>") [DONATE NOW >>](https://www.marcusforgeorgia.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzsn0D366fuE1hyM8nYo_dxU7TRfY3YK_099-sv61zvREUQnSuTfW1SYjR9KIu3MLdE&e=3c0efca69a2e76c4868c82f23dff8b2a&utm_source=marcusflowers&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=220424_nytjudgefwd&n=4)

From: Urgent Update <info@marcusforgeorgia.com>
Subject: NYT: Effort to Remove Marjorie Taylor Greene From Ballot Can Proceed, Judge Says
Sent on April 19, 2022 at 3:05 p.m.
A federal judge cleared the way for a group of Georgia voters to move forward with legal efforts seeking to disqualify Marjorie Taylor Greene from running for re-election to Congress, citing her role in the Jan. 6, 2021, attack on the Capitol.
_**This is major news, team.**_
Look, we don’t know what the outcome of this challenge will be. But we do know that cracks are appearing in Marjorie Taylor Greene’s armor. And with Republicans fleeing her campaign, Democrats feeling galvanized over Marcus Flowers’ grassroots movement, and changes made to Georgia’s 14th Congressional District, Marcus has a real chance to win this November.
[**We need your help. Will you donate $5 or more to support Marcus Flowers, a Democrat and U.S. Army Veteran, who is running to defeat Marjorie Taylor Green this November?**](https://www.marcusforgeorgia.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzsn0D366fuE1hyM8nYo_dxU7TRfY3YK_099-sv61zvREUQnSuTfW1SYjR9KIu3MLdE&e=3c0efca69a2e76c4868c82f23dff8b2a&utm_source=marcusflowers&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=220424_nytjudgefwd&n=5)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Scott=20Baugh?=
subject: I am the grassroots candidate…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Baugh for Congress
body:
|
---
| | [ ](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=e60b103dd7&e=8a657725d1)
---
| | Peter, Democrats in D.C. are trying to export the worst of California politics to the national stage: higher prices and higher taxes.

It’s probably not a coincidence that with Kamala Harris just a heartbeat away from the presidency inflation is through the roof and Democrats are proposing new taxes.

I’m running for Congress to stop that from happening, but [I can’t do it alone.](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=f1ab1f70a0&e=8a657725d1)

That’s because my opponent, Katie Porter, is running a race funded by Massachusetts liberals. She’s one of the best-funded and farthest-left candidates in the entire country!

On the other hand, I’m counting on grassroots support from patriots like you to fund my campaign. I’m committed to being a citizen legislator–for the people.

That’s why I’m asking you for a donation of [just $2](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=a263f03003&e=8a657725d1) today. I know that with inflation through the roof every dollar is important to your budget, so I don’t take this request lightly.

But, frankly, $2 is a small price to pay now to avoid huge tax increases in the future, and we won’t be able to stop those tax hikes unless we all band together now.

Thank you,
Scott Baugh

P.S. Peter, I’m a realist, so I know that not everybody who receives this email will have the financial ability to donate today. If you are able, would you please consider chipping in for a neighbor that simply can’t afford to make the commitment this month?

subject: We need to send a message to the GOP

body:

| | |

Hey team, Senator Hassan said I could reach out.
Our weekend fundraising deadline is tonight at midnight, and we’re just short of reaching it. If a few more supporters like you step up, I know we can get there in time.
**[Protecting this seat and defending our Senate majority is going to be a team effort. Will you join ours? Please split a $3 contribution now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44507636/341909426/580409235?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&amount=3&refcode=mh-jtk938-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOGZhNjFmYS0yMmM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Y6E7lemyez0GUk33sD88J-OneNK7-I-NvTfAiDExbo=)**

Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, we flipped the Senate last election. And with this razor-thin majority, I’ve been fighting every day in the other Washington to lower costs for families on child care, health care, and so much more.
We’re building a strong campaign that can defend this seat in November, but with the GOP setting their sights on defeating us, we can’t afford to miss meeting this $15,000 goal.

Patty

Josh delivered newspapers as a kid, graduated from high school, and worked his way through Stanford. Then he went to work helping small businesses grow and create jobs.
In 2018, he took the values he was raised with here in the Central Valley to Congress - that's why he voted to protect our healthcare, is fighting for comprehensive immigration reform and wrote bills to crack down on political corruption.
With the help of this people-powered campaign, Josh was able to beat a GOP extremist in 2020, and he knows with your grassroots support, we can do it again.
**[Can you please rush in a donation right now to help Josh WIN again in November and continue representing our communities in Congress?](https://act.myngp.com/el/U9dGpkvrE0koHhxJhG94JbNuLeXMXTsgzvQDKoebT3Q=/Qrkl_LXxiAy4Qlr880WiW1Pu5kNDUmyLNCZPQUov44A=?refcode=E15180-20220422-PhotoAsAKid-SL-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22)**

Camille

body:

It’s the second-highest amount of ad spending anywhere in the country — a clear indication of just how competitive and important McConnell and his allies see our race.
Please donate $15 or any amount you can to my campaign and Senator Kirsten Gillibrand right now to help us prepare for the dark money that’s about to flood North Carolina. body:
I know what it’s like...

|
---

| | I don't come from money.

My parents taught me to work hard for every dollar you earn.

They also taught me that there’s no shame in asking for help when you need it.

[**_So I’m reaching out to folks from Cresco to ask for your support. You see, my End of Month Deadline is coming up \-- but I’m still running $10,031 short. I’m going to explain why this deadline is so critical, but if you’re in a rush please chip in $14 now. >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44504671/341892234/1129282168?refcode=20220424_em_fr_b1_tony_30_rs&amount=14&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzhmMzA1Ny0wNmM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tjxZ3Wr6wOcbZ76RcWd2Vm-23Gn4prOWT3yLFYu6SZQ=)

Unlike a lot of people who run for office, I know what it’s like to struggle financially.

I grew up in poverty, but my parents never stopped fighting to create a better life for us.

I know the choices everyday Americans face.

I understand the pressures of living without a safety net.

So when Republican Congressman, Don Bacon, voted to cut taxes for billionaires and corporations, instead of supporting hardworking families: [**_I said, 'Enough.'_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44504672/341892235/1129282168?refcode=20220424_em_fr_b1_tony_30_rs&amount=14&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzhmMzA1Ny0wNmM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tjxZ3Wr6wOcbZ76RcWd2Vm-23Gn4prOWT3yLFYu6SZQ=) I know that if we want to see change, we need more everyday people like me in Congress.

[**But the truth is: running for office is incredibly expensive.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44504673/341892236/1129282168?refcode=20220424_em_fr_b1_tony_30_rs&amount=14&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzhmMzA1Ny0wNmM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tjxZ3Wr6wOcbZ76RcWd2Vm-23Gn4prOWT3yLFYu6SZQ=)

[**_Hitting my End of Month Goal will be the difference between funding a winning campaign, or struggling to keep up. So I’m personally asking: will you chip in $14 now? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44504674/341892237/1129282168?refcode=20220424_em_fr_b1_tony_30_rs&amount=14&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzhmMzA1Ny0wNmM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tjxZ3Wr6wOcbZ76RcWd2Vm-23Gn4prOWT3yLFYu6SZQ=)

DC Republicans are going to be watching to see if my campaign is strong enough to flip this seat blue. [**I’m behind right now. But I know that if we all band together, we can defy the odds and win this race for everyday folks across the country. Can I count on your $14 to help me get there?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44504675/341892238/1129282168?refcode=20220424_em_fr_b1_tony_30_rs&amount=14&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzhmMzA1Ny0wNmM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tjxZ3Wr6wOcbZ76RcWd2Vm-23Gn4prOWT3yLFYu6SZQ=) | | [Chip in $15 now >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44504676/341892239/1129282168?refcode=20220424_em_fr_b1_tony_30_rs&amount=15&amounts=25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzhmMzA1Ny0wNmM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tjxZ3Wr6wOcbZ76RcWd2Vm-23Gn4prOWT3yLFYu6SZQ=)

They also taught me that there’s no shame in asking for help when you need it. = Unlike a lot of people who run for office, I know what it’s like to struggle financially. I grew up in poverty, but my parents never stopped fighting to create a better life for us. I know the choices everyday Americans face. I understand the pressures of living without a safety net. We expect a lot of people -- including first-time primary voters -- to be voting by mail. ** Thankfully, because of your support, we have our TV ads up and running. But right now, we need to raise **$15,824 by the 30th **to keep them live through the primary. ---
**Right now, Montana is at a crossroads. **
We are all feeling the effects of massive growth, whether it’s rising housing prices, inflation, or our Main Streets and small businesses. Families are pulling up to gas stations and walking into grocery stores to find that _everything_ is more expensive.
**I’m running for Congress because I know we can do better for Montana families.**
We deserve a representative in Washington who knows what it’s like to struggle to make ends meet. Who’ll fight to make sure we have good jobs and wages and will work across the aisle to make sure that families who have been here for years or generations can afford to stay.
[**I know that together, we can create a Montana where all of our children, and future generations, can grow and thrive. body:
I know your time is valuable, especially on the weekend, so I'm going to keep this message brief. Thank you in advance for taking the time to read it. I’m about to ask you to make your first contribution to support my campaign for the U.S. Senate in Wisconsin. I know your time is valuable on the weekend, but I hope you will give me a moment to explain why this request is so important, especially today.

Here’s the truth:

This will be one of the closest, most expensive Senate races in the country, and the national GOP will stop at nothing to protect Ron Johnson. Mitch McConnell's super PAC has already reserved $15 million on TV to prop him up — and frankly, it’s not a question of if they will pour more money into this race but when.

Right now, I’m the only challenger beating Ron Johnson in the most recent head-to-head poll, and the pundits believe Wisconsin is the Democrats’ best chance to flip a Senate seat. This is our race to win, but the attacks we have yet to face will be unprecedented — and we need to be ready.

I'm not taking a dime from corporate PACs. Instead, I'm counting on people like you to help me keep up with the outside spending in this race. That’s why I’m respectfully asking you to make your first contribution to my campaign today. Democrats cannot hold and expand the Senate without flipping this seat blue.

**Here’s your personal link to contribute:[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/godlewski-april2022&refcode2=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44504766/341893211/-1761982453?refcode=em22_220424_eom4_fnd_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220424_eom4_fnd_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNmUxMjczNS0wOGM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5_RUy2DosrVo9mdW1azuV0KySjdu8uxvDs2ZVwC-B14=)**

I can see you haven’t made a donation to my campaign yet, and that’s okay. There's no better time than right now to make your first contribution. In fact, it's everyday supporters like you that are powering our campaign to defeat Ron Johnson, return this seat to the people of Wisconsin, and expand our Democratic Senate majority for years to come.

Thank you for everything you've done to help us get this far, and I look forward to working together in the critical weeks and months ahead.

Forward!

— Sarah Godlewski

subject: NEW: Hung Cao’s campaign store!
body:
Our team is so excited for the momentum we’ve built to support combat veteran Hung Cao for Congress. Peter, Our team is so excited for the momentum we’ve built to support combat veteran Hung Cao for Congress.

_Now, we’re launching a new way to show your support for this American hero: **our OFFICIAL campaign store!**_

[**Visit our BRAND NEW campaign store today and get our latest merchandise for Hung Cao!**](http://links.hungforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=f772e55c84b5477db2a10d1c2fff7b36&_e=8o0DhApToPozF7tUR436xCNVmGE-ALE-qDblvs7_sIBF-_em3e7UZj7WjZ11unWmrRbS98lyLo9geYAwICRo70qF0T0PgzUp9YrSS48H1gimzSGoAUEEsbb91EzyzBS6hYLhl60IOP8aleP-ixMZHV5fRPlz-kFxyG0zGYPGyuvXD_Lezj3O3rzAFf_RxVPXvArvzbx4U57zYBSLpMUXwwmW_la3gSMEWIgf6HMsn0QTNjzLb3_WG5JFNjdXQ-4Nb3yHQONcbGpznTgbCA890BKXeHS2LKSK1ZWuhkyi1ljVeV18VN5rakOSjVfILOwhhttY-peTYXZKRQMMQyD2m_jCDhc4kJmTmgxNmSa2VUp1Fe0Ay1YsnoUX6eOyyhihUocAPxigGleenqSCodL-OA%3D%3D) [**SHOP NOW**](http://links.hungforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=f772e55c84b5477db2a10d1c2fff7b36&_e=8o0DhApToPozF7tUR436xCNVmGE-ALE-qDblvs7_sIBF-_em3e7UZj7WjZ11unWmrRbS98lyLo9geYAwICRo70qF0T0PgzUp9YrSS48H1gimzSGoAUEEsbb91EzyzBS6hYLhl60IOP8aleP-ixMZHV5fRPlz-kFxyG0zGYPGyuvXD_Lezj3O3rzAFf_RxVPXdWPXuj6OPc9ycOB2_ydFFI9CzvFAYH2YKcyiU9x2gKOZ2679mNSP4Em2qMUU97Tk593A5rlTDSIzsL52yi9K8DfAcmYnc7Ip_3j4lfPZNeNjsc1DFoYkQF8u32f0awGXRyNkknUcKN1qD6eF30wL3LLwOcdhr-UV9NKqpn_S7zFemzbXXlm0JVu5wZUaDtp9zwpMUndIzqNGhXR4hlcwgQ%3D%3D) The key to winning any campaign is getting our candidate’s name out there as much as possible, Friend.

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: An update on Summer’s fundraising
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Q1 fundraising numbers were just released, and it looks like it’s going to
be a tough fight in PA-12, where Justice Democrat Summer Lee raised just
half of what corporate Democrat Steve Irwin brought in, despite her
polling way ahead of him.

While Summer Lee’s campaign is powered by grassroots small-dollar donors,
corporate Democrat Steve Irwin is backed by contributions from the oil and
gas industry, lobbyists, and Wall Street. Irwin also has the backing of a
right-wing Super PAC.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/103904?refcode=em20220424-22977&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=22977%2E1203867%2E-yuiuk ]Take a look at how Summer is being outraised, then rush a
$3 contribution directly to her campaign.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/103904?refcode=em20220424-22977&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=22977%2E1203867%2E-yuiuk ]graphic of two bar graphs. Labeled Q1 Fundraising in PA-12. Top bar
graph has a picture of Steve Irwin Democratic Primary opponent. He has
raised 615,322 dollars. Bottom bar graph has a picture of Summer Lee
Justice Democrat. He has raised $302.303

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/103904?refcode=em20220424-22977&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=22977%2E1203867%2E-yuiuk ]Contribute

And we just received news that AIPAC, the right-wing Super PAC that has
endorsed over 100 Republicans who voted to overturn the 2020 election
results and has smeared AOC, Ilhan, Rashida, and Ayanna since they’ve been
in Congress, is attacking Summer on TV.

There’s a lot of money trying to stop Summer right now. Here’s part of the
attack ad:

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/103904?refcode=em20220424-22977&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=22977%2E1203867%2E-yuiuk ]A still image from AIPAC's ad with a picture of Summer Lee and the
words 'Summer Lee, Fighting Democrats, Not Getting Results'

How much a candidate is able to spend in an election is a significant
indicator of that candidate's chance at winning. While Summer Lee had a
strong quarter of grassroots fundraising, she is up against a corporate
Democratic primary opponent and Republican-endorsing Super PACs spending
massive amounts of money.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/103904?refcode=em20220424-22977&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1005&akid=22977%2E1203867%2E-yuiuk ]Can you chip in directly to Summer’s campaign right now to help her
combat attacks from Super PACs and the corporate Democratic establishment?

It’s no surprise that Steve Irwin is outraising Summer Lee. Irwin got rich
overseeing investments in oil and gas companies and has received campaign
contributions from corporate lobbyists and fossil fuel CEOs.

Summer won’t accept a dime of corporate PAC money because she knows that
you can’t fight for the people while representing corporate interests.
She’s been endorsed by Bernie Sanders, Elizabeth Warren, and other
progressive leaders because she is the best candidate in this race, but in
order to win, she’ll need to overcome a huge fundraising gap.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/103904?refcode=em20220424-22977&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1024&akid=22977%2E1203867%2E-yuiuk ]Help Summer close the fundraising gap by making a direct contribution
to her campaign. Summer is relying on our movement to help power her
campaign in these final weeks.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/103904?refcode=em20220424-22977&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1025&akid=22977%2E1203867%2E-yuiuk ]Contribute

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1026&akid=22977%2E1203867%2E-yuiuk ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1027&akid=22977%2E1203867%2E-yuiuk ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220424-22977-footer&t=1028&refcode2=22977_1203867_-yuiuk&akid=22977%2E1203867%2E-yuiuk

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1029&akid=22977%2E1203867%2E-yuiuk

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226, Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Sign the Card
subject: Wish Jill Biden a happy birthday!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
Be one of the first to add your name!
| | | Team -- Jill Biden's birthday is **just weeks away** , and we've selected YOU to be one of the first to sign our official birthday card for the first lady!

**[Click here to wish Jill Biden a happy birthday and help us reach our 50,000 signature goal:](https://go.dscc.org/go/7311?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220424-SignTheCard-JillBidenBirthday-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220424-SignTheCard-JillBidenBirthday-Pros-sl1&akid=3906%2E9716520%2EMjbUD6)**

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/7311?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220424-SignTheCard-JillBidenBirthday-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220424-SignTheCard-JillBidenBirthday-Pros-sl1&akid=3906%2E9716520%2EMjbUD6)

We’re so grateful for Dr. Biden’s incredible work as first lady, from fighting for better educational opportunities for all Americans to working to end cancer -- and so much more.

We want to show our appreciation and help celebrate Dr. Biden's big day with a card signed by **thousands** of fellow Democrats, **so please add your name now:**

**From:[ dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://go.dscc.org/go/7311?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220424-SignTheCard-JillBidenBirthday-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220424-SignTheCard-JillBidenBirthday-Pros-sl1&akid=3906%2E9716520%2EMjbUD6)**
---

**Status: MISSING RESPONSE**

| [Sign the Card](https://go.dscc.org/go/7311?ask=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220424-SignTheCard-JillBidenBirthday-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220424-SignTheCard-JillBidenBirthday-Pros-sl1&akid=3906%2E9716520%2EMjbUD6)

Thank you,

Team DSCC

name: Josh Riley
subject: trying to reach you, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Riley for Congress

Did you see my team’s message on Friday? Reproductive rights are being attacked across the country.

| Peter,

Did you see my team’s message on Friday? Reproductive rights are being attacked across the country.

We are witnessing people’s right to bodily autonomy being rolled back in real time. We cannot stand idly by and watch.

[_**I urgently need your swift action today. Please, if you haven’t already, add your name to our petition and tell Congress to stand up for women’s right to choose by codifying _Roe v. \---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: JoshRileyForCongress.com
Date: Fri, April 22, 2022
Subject: sign on: protect the right to choose
Peter,

We have some disturbing news. **Around the country, we are witnessing coordinated attacks on reproductive freedom as more and more states pass draconian anti-choice legislation.**

And to make matters worse,_Roe v. Wade_ is at risk of being overturned by the Supreme Court this summer.

If _Roe_ is overturned, thousands of people across the country will lose their right to reproductive liberty. The stakes couldn’t be higher.

[_**That’s why we are reaching out today to kindly ask if you’d sign our petition to tell Congress to codify _Roe v. Wade_ into law and protect the right to choose.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44505178/341897844/-2008649947?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNGRjN2Y5Yy0wY2M0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UYji--GPwMlaLnP2a0uDSg9l_Pa4LeDuX4OpeLh2cvA=&emci=8845cdb0-6fc2-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=b4dc7f9c-0cc4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=4588596)

| [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/10143?t=6&akid=1931%2E878179%2EyeaEGj) Friend, did you see how tight the race for the runoff was last month?

Michelle won 3 counties in TX-15, but we need to make sure we have a resounding victory for the runoff -- **and in exactly 1 month, it will be just as difficult.**

[**Will you split a donation between our campaign and Voter Protection Project so that we will have everything it takes to turn out voters for Michelle on May 24th? We need to widen the gap between our opponents and us.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/10143?t=7&akid=1931%2E878179%2EyeaEGj) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $5 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/10144?t=8&akid=1931%2E878179%2EyeaEGj)

[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/10147?t=11&akid=1931%2E878179%2EyeaEGj)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/10148?t=12&akid=1931%2E878179%2EyeaEGj)
With the votes so incredibly close in the primary, all eyes are going to be on TX-15 in the coming months.

**This is no time to sit back.**

**Making sure that Michelle is our nominee will not be easy -- but it will be so worth it.**

In the primary, Monica De La Cruz easily swept the Republican nomination. That means that Trumpism is alive and well in our district and we need to make sure that whoever goes up against Monica is the best possible candidate to beat her.

There's no doubt that Michelle has what it takes to win in November. Now we just need to do the work and get through this runoff.

[**Make a contribution towards nominating the strongest candidate to represent the people of TX-15 -- both in the general election and in Washington. Splitting just $5 between our campaign and Voter Protection Project will be a massive help at this point in the race.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/10143?t=13&akid=1931%2E878179%2EyeaEGj)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=1931%2E878179%2EyeaEGj). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=1931%2E878179%2EyeaEGj).**

subject: Abbott's hurting the people of Texas

body:
[1]Beto O'Rourke

Greg
Abbott’s latest political stunt at the border cost Texans and the country.

By significantly delaying shipping across our border, Abbott directly
slowed down the supply chain, raised prices, and caused companies to
relocate jobs outside of Texas.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/55687?refcode=ema20220424-186456&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=186456%2E444211%2ElBJrIq ]Dallas Morning News Headline

That’s right — Abbott single-handedly cost Texas $4.2 billion and 36,000
jobs.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/55687?refcode=ema20220424-186456&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=186456%2E444211%2ElBJrIq ]Texas — and the country — quite literally can’t afford Greg Abbott.
Donate $3 right now to help us elect Beto and defeat Greg
Abbott in November. Every donation will send the message that you’re done
with Abbott’s political theater.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/55687?refcode=ema20220424-186456&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=186456%2E444211%2ElBJrIq ]Contribute $3

Abbott's border blockade killed jobs, increased the prices we pay at the
store, and worsened the supply chain. He hurt the people of Texas.

And this didn’t have to happen, it was the decision of one man and one man
alone — Greg Abbott. This was a political stunt that did nothing to
improve the safety or security of our border because the inspections were
for things like the tire pressure or the way the engine might be running
in an 18-wheeler. This policy was for show and did nothing but hurt the
economy of Texas and the United States.

Greg Abbott cares more about political stunts than what happens to Texans
and Americans. We need your help to defeat him in November and elect
Beto.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/55687?refcode=ema20220424-186456&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=186456%2E444211%2ElBJrIq ]Please, pitch in any amount that you can afford today to put an end to
Abbott’s harm in Texas.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/55687?refcode=ema20220424-186456&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1041&akid=186456%2E444211%2ElBJrIq ]Contribute $3

Thank you so much for your support,

Team Beto

name: Alek
subject: 23 days and counting
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alek For Oregon
body:
On Friday afternoon I sent out an email calling for 200 donors to make a contribution of any amount to our primary day election fund. We quite literally ran toward a terrorist armed with cans of gasoline on a suicide mission. | [](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=482c3b7fc9a247cb82cff5228be39ccc&_e=vMNkQ3g7Y6mPVaUTkWKV2A3xV7hGbKcoVYoNSFqFa2rxzmc3f6AZzg85vPmSoXJV60ZvJ2B88QB8Z-lU-gRs6XigCjzVm9AsTpVf7iZvLsrQwDuUzaEzpEufXP_w22gFkGafxFz2UeizcTB3JEp-SGEp-DWXmi_ksmHycYo4bv5i8qIHDk2Q1CKtPRw7RaULScpPUyz7zAT4372KwylS_byzzk3RFA3-rvme968VnHOJssIqyHu_KnLTd07h_JlL9zTde0r5P8-Px2s-o0kX8vAlsyy-eKkJYn0kM69DkMe29yPCIVpw4cT0PnP6Mn41Jb8JollsZ0p15gKRFOXY48XG4bj79iwSW1u5b9w_2Gr91VFWSlt8leTMSkGVfMwMfllr-HP2-I-oXrNqRJmF2ONpxNfRlzgSzyg_bSTgjNW1CEY4MZ0m-f60Sm1WMDEmqfUTogmQDx4-lNsqtCHMpA%3D%3D)
---
_
_ Peter,

Happy Sunday, I hope you’re getting some rest. My apologies for reaching out to you on the weekend, but truth be told we’re running out of time before our primary to raise the cash we need to win the nomination and turn our focus to winning the general election.

**On Friday afternoon I sent out an email calling for 200 donors to make a contribution of any amount to our primary day election fund.** Yet, we’re falling short. Yesterday just 56 conservatives on my email list answered the call.

I never want to shame anyone into doing ANYTHING, but if there were a moment, I might consider it, today would be it. **[I desperately want to reach our goal of raising $30,000 by our primary on May 17th,](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=482c3b7fc9a247cb82cff5228be39ccc&_e=vMNkQ3g7Y6mPVaUTkWKV2A3xV7hGbKcoVYoNSFqFa2rxzmc3f6AZzg85vPmSoXJV60ZvJ2B88QB8Z-lU-gRs6XigCjzVm9AsTpVf7iZvLsrQwDuUzaEzpEufXP_w22gFkGafxFz2UeizcTB3JEp-SGEp-DWXmi_ksmHycYo4bv5i8qIHDk2Q1CKtPRw7RaULScpPUyz7zAT4372KwylS_byzzk3RFA3-rvme968VnHOJssIqyHu_KnLTd07h_JlLJf_ELmfyhM-rguZbhh8nr38BcPiYHR70iEnj3HiEUamqnj2IiCoKvlWJvTBMnFq_7bJHG25lLJFJi15YmnWATHUzmaBVX2054vrKnuhQen_6znx3HwR67iTdMxnHGttk_ogiCbz_2a6VBhRpTvNiopc1KbEAZpOWwLwri62jA0q0Ys4vNzSVt9DnMQQxUK2UkcgO31JKyGAv_UO-an1xeQ%3D%3D) but we’re running out of time to do so...**

I consider every one of you an integral part of my campaign team and I’m so grateful that you’re reading this today.

clean_body: On Friday afternoon I sent out an email calling for 200 donors to make a contribution of any amount to our primary day election fund. We quite literally ran toward a terrorist armed with cans of gasoline on a suicide mission. | Peter, Happy Sunday, I hope you’re getting some rest. My apologies for reaching out to you on the weekend, but truth be told we’re running out of time before our primary to raise the cash we need to win the nomination and turn our focus to winning the general election. On Friday afternoon I sent out an email calling for 200 donors to make a contribution of any amount to our primary day election fund. Yet, we’re falling short. Yesterday just 56 conservatives on my email list answered the call. I never want to shame anyone into doing ANYTHING, but if there were a moment, I might consider it, today would be it. but we’re running out of time to do so... I consider every one of you an integral part of my campaign team and I’m so grateful that you’re reading this today. Thank you very much, Alek Skarlatos Republican for Congress HELP ME HIT MY GOAL | Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. Alek, along with four others, stopped an armed terrorist on a Paris-bound train traveling from Amsterdam to Paris in August 2015. His heroism earned him several awards and medals around the world. ---|--- | ---|--- | Paid For By Alek For Oregon Don't want to receive any more of our emails?

name: Charles Booker
subject: Kentuckians are ready to organize and transform our futures.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter, I wanted to
share this headline that I recently saw on the news with you:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220424?refcode=em20220424-1807&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&refcode2=1807_346206_BvwewR&akid=1807%2E346206%2EBvwewR ]Democrats question electability of Black candidates

The article talked about how Democrats rely heavily on Black voters to win
elections — yet when Black candidates run for office, even to this day,
they are plagued with questions around “electability”.

So whenever someone says Kentucky will never elect a Black person to U.S.
Senate — whenever I see headlines like the one I just shared — I know it’s
because they don’t see us.

They don’t hear us. They don’t know our truth. And whether or not my own
“electability” is put into question, I know this to be true:

Kentuckians from the hood to the holler will organize and be ready to
transform our future this year.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220424?refcode=em20220424-1807&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&refcode2=1807_346206_BvwewR&akid=1807%2E346206%2EBvwewR ]Peter, I’d
be honored if you could join us by chipping in $5 to our
campaign today — especially now that we’re only 23 days away from our
primary and need to reach as voters as possible with our volunteer
outreach programs and TV ads.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220424?refcode=em20220424-1807&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&refcode2=1807_346206_BvwewR&akid=1807%2E346206%2EBvwewR ]DONATE NOW →

Since we launched our campaign last July — and even long before that —
Kentuckians from urban and rural communities have been organizing. We
stand together, lean into love, mobilize around our common bonds, and do
this work, all so we can transform our future.

I know my neighbors in Kentucky deserve a Senator who won’t disrespect and
embarrass us. We deserve a Senator who will deliver results, not chase
conspiracies and stir up chaos. We deserve a Senator who actually cares.

Peter, I will
be that Senator. “Electability” be damned.

In order to get there, we need to build a widespread, diverse coalition of
voters. We need to organize in every corner of Kentucky and center our
conversations around the challenges too many families in Kentucky face
right now. And we need a powerful, grassroots funded movement fueling
these efforts to organize and mobilize enough folks to take back our
power.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220424?refcode=em20220424-1807&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&refcode2=1807_346206_BvwewR&akid=1807%2E346206%2EBvwewR ]We can do this. We have the opportunity to make history here in
Kentucky. But I need you to make this possible: Our campaign is 100%
powered by grassroots donations from emails like this one.

Thank you,
Peter. I can’t say it enough.

Charles

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220424-1807-footer&t=1023&refcode2=1807_346206_BvwewR&akid=1807%2E346206%2EBvwewR

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1807%2E346206%2EBvwewR

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: Dick Durbin
subject: Don’t let them roll back our progress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
We need to re-elect leaders like Kwame Raoul, Susana Mendoza, and Mike Frerichs.
#
Peter,
Illinois deserves elected officials who work tirelessly on behalf of our state. That is exactly what we have with Attorney General Kwame Raoul, Comptroller Susana Mendoza, and Treasurer Mike Frerichs.
But right now, Republicans are attacking these Democratic officials. All three are up for re-election this year, and the GOP are determined to defeat them and roll back their progress.
**[Protecting Democratic candidates in Illinois is a top priority for 2022. Will you split a $5 donation to their campaigns to help re-elect these hard-working officials?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44506261/341902969/-450977716?refcode=dd_em_220424_1_b&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjkxZDY5ZC0xN2M0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZoA_S2PHINwgf2QfgXOag_AFjO0kTuohKup_fzWSp8k=)**
As Attorney General, Kwame Raoul led the way on a national settlement against pharmaceutical companies for their roles in the opioid crisis, bringing $26 billion to towns around the country and $760 million to Illinois.
Comptroller Susana Mendoza has not only brought more transparency to Illinois’s finances, she’s saved taxpayers more than $4 billion while still helping small business owners.
Treasurer Mike Frerichs has done more than put money back into Illinoisans’ pockets, he’s been an advocate for people with disabilities and their families as well.
The progress made by these three officials has been crucial to making Illinois stronger, even throughout the COVID-19 pandemic. We must fight to keep them in office.
**[Will you stand with me and help re-elect Attorney General Kwame Raoul, Comptroller Susana Mendoza, and Treasurer Mike Frerichs? Split a contribution of any amount between their campaigns.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44506262/341902970/-450977716?refcode=dd_em_220424_1_b&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjkxZDY5ZC0xN2M0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZoA_S2PHINwgf2QfgXOag_AFjO0kTuohKup_fzWSp8k=)**
My best,
Dick Durbin

Peter, I need your help.
Last year, the Republican Attorney General Association (RAGA) raised record-breaking dollar amounts to help elect attorneys general who would support their extremist agenda. They raised over $5.3 million in the second quarter of 2021, breaking their own second-quarter fundraising records – **and now they are officially “on offense” in New York.**
**Peter, I can’t stand tall against RAGA’s multimillion-dollar attacks without the support of this powerful grassroots community. That’s why my team set a goal to raise $25,000 before MIDNIGHT, but we’re still $3,825 short.[Will you chip in $5 or more right now to help me continue my work as New York’s attorney general and defeat my Republican opponent?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44506727/341905454/379053316?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk437-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjhjZGQ5OC0xYWM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fQGnS25yCNRcp3cZJWywSauh6_8UoNLjOkojZ_iwc4g=)**

When I made history in 2018 by becoming the first Black woman _ever_ elected to a statewide office in New York, I vowed to spend every moment of my tenure fighting for the vulnerable and voiceless. This has meant withstanding attacks from some of the wealthiest, powerful, and most corrupt forces in the country – and RAGA is no exception.
Peter, for generations, families like my own were systematically ignored and exploited by New York’s powerful elites. Working with my grassroots community, we’ve made real and meaningful progress toward creating a New York that benefits _everyone_ , but I can’t keep up this fight without your support.
**With the Republican Attorney General Association breaking fundraising records, I need to raise at least $25,000 before midnight to stay in this race.[Please, will you rush whatever you can spare to my campaign for reelection right now so I can continue to fight for you and your loved ones for another four years?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44506732/341905459/379053316?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk437-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjhjZGQ5OC0xYWM0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fQGnS25yCNRcp3cZJWywSauh6_8UoNLjOkojZ_iwc4g=)**
Thank you for helping me in this critical moment.

Letitia James

clean_body: | | | = Peter, I need your help. Last year, the Republican Attorney General Association (RAGA) raised record-breaking dollar amounts to help elect attorneys general who would support their extremist agenda. They raised over $5.3 million in the second quarter of 2021, breaking their own second-quarter fundraising records – and now they are officially “on offense” in New York. Peter, I can’t stand tall against RAGA’s multimillion-dollar attacks without the support of this powerful grassroots community. That’s why my team set a goal to raise $25,000 before MIDNIGHT, but we’re still $3,825 short.= If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = When I made history in 2018 by becoming the first Black woman ever elected to a statewide office in New York, I vowed to spend every moment of my tenure fighting for the vulnerable and voiceless. This has meant withstanding attacks from some of the wealthiest, powerful, and most corrupt forces in the country – and RAGA is no exception. Peter, for generations, families like my own were systematically ignored and exploited by New York’s powerful elites. Working with my grassroots community, we’ve made real and meaningful progress toward creating a New York that benefits everyone , but I can’t keep up this fight without your support. With the Republican Attorney General Association breaking fundraising records, I need to raise at least $25,000 before midnight to stay in this race.= Thank you for helping me in this critical moment. Letitia James | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. James for NY P.O. Box 476 New York, NY 10034 United States | | Paid for by James for NY

Vicky is still leading in the polls, and the best-positioned candidate to send a Missouri CONSERVATIVE to the U.S. Senate. Check out some of the week's highlights. _**NEW ENDORSEMENT: Former U.S. Senator Pat Roberts**_ Senator Roberts had this to say about his endorsement of Vicky, “When elected, Vicky will be one of the only farmers in the U.S. Senate. Farm and ranch families in Missouri and across the country need a champion like Vicky. Her leadership in the U.S. Senate will ensure that America can continue to do the critical work of feeding the world. That’s why she has my full endorsement.” _**OPEN LETTER: Retired Colonel Scott McChrystal**_ This week, retired Army Colonel Scott McChrystal penned a letter on why his first public letter of support is for Vicky. The letter is inspiring, and 100% correct. Read it below! | |

_**New Ad: It's A Lie**_

clean_body: Friend, Another busy week on the trail, as this campaign continues to heat up! Vicky is still leading in the polls, and the best-positioned candidate to send a Missouri CONSERVATIVE to the U.S. Senate. Check out some of the week's highlights. NEW ENDORSEMENT: Former U.S. Senator Pat Roberts Senator Roberts had this to say about his endorsement of Vicky, “When elected, Vicky will be one of the only farmers in the U.S. Senate. Farm and ranch families in Missouri and across the country need a champion like Vicky. Her leadership in the U.S. Senate will ensure that America can continue to do the critical work of feeding the world. That’s why she has my full endorsement.” OPEN LETTER: Retired Colonel Scott McChrystal This week, retired Army Colonel Scott McChrystal penned a letter on why his first public letter of support is for Vicky. The letter is inspiring, and 100% correct. Read it below! | | New Ad: It's A Lie Unfortunately, Eric Greitens continues to lie about Vicky. This week he foolishly attacked her support of President Trump's legislative agenda. She released an ad to point out Greitens' attack on her and Trump - watch it here or below. | SOCIAL MEDIA UPDATE Vicky's Heartland Tour continued this week as Vicky met with Missourians all across the state! Check out some of the best social media posts from the week! | Be sure to follow Vicky on social media! | | | ---|---|--- Click to Unsubscribe Paid for by Vicky Hartzler for U.S. Senate

body:
Stand Against Critical Race Theory

| [](http://links.colinschmitt.com/u/click?_t=2efbf9f7f9b54008ada1569759c619c2&_m=0d0d711216e44b7c9032628f233ce417&_e=CU9PQLCEwKCFG_HvMzpFobxzCWGY1Pvfrr2_nQN0svuRlkL7SHnvqM03dfY4GA9zeP1ifnB2GPgODZkRcv4zYQYNcgJ4cnyFefbb8t7Mu0OaUWyO7lfbYrP7kkVvL3WoSyTv0d7uTusvfXlA79kebcndgSm0bBGcv8IxA0Rm1_kufqDc_LjEBrgTcoLK-2zDoYKwne9Mwz-srMpArGaIqxSgtFgfvdSW50VgfE7VeimigXH9zteobxpC_aPD_2zAG9V26JjhR56fgAOs61A1icefyh0iCjzMREjU0bu-_EwOkbubGCw-VuAAiwTecpA6zXY2OblEyxA2SoGj9W68BgwhhiV8qpevAkP1JyearNKMWlYeQUZjBSwDKbsdIY691kDvVUSwF3qKNkCqY4mVLrkUb4nVCWBtKEA5Y8uHJH1Zhmsvt5tEd_wREpBovJNftrTFAIKjpbT4d44x4nOmWdURbwYKQegpKoPMvYxcnmQ%3D)

| [**STAND AGAINST CRITICAL RACE THEORY**](http://links.colinschmitt.com/u/click?_t=2efbf9f7f9b54008ada1569759c619c2&_m=0d0d711216e44b7c9032628f233ce417&_e=CU9PQLCEwKCFG_HvMzpFobxzCWGY1Pvfrr2_nQN0svuRlkL7SHnvqM03dfY4GA9zeP1ifnB2GPgODZkRcv4zYQYNcgJ4cnyFefbb8t7Mu0OaUWyO7lfbYrP7kkVvL3WoSyTv0d7uTusvfXlA79kebcndgSm0bBGcv8IxA0Rm1_kufqDc_LjEBrgTcoLK-2zDoYKwne9Mwz-srMpArGaIqxSgtFgfvdSW50VgfE7VeimigXH9zteobxpC_aPD_2zAeCf_nHkO0oywtWrRKj6fby8usq-0Cq0VOomWaRvKn4TKig5knE-h5vMVxEVdVwZebj2KbUxaWSWx3Hvq-HsrHyuAEP8zMIEetEimJ1gluqxBq3k-P1V0KbrJqaym0RvE3eb9xC-XQJRVDjjFfZtVzFMnEuQUPZmp-ZltxurwS95Xkeosct-WLlzM0PSgvIE6aQlF-BBKZDA-p1FB5S6CQ3qFHUMfFmUodJcba3HqsFQ%3D)
---

Friends,

We live in a country where our Free Speech comes under attack each and every day.

Let’s be clear: **Critical Race Theory steals the American Dream away from children by teaching them that success or failure is solely based on skin color, not hard work, education, or character.**

Can you explain to me why anyone would want to teach this to kids? We are ranked 11th in Science and 30th in Math when compared to other countries around the world. We should be teaching Math and Science in our classrooms, not divisive, hateful rhetoric.

**[I am writing to you today to stand up for the parents fighting back against Critical Race Theory, and I hope you’ll join me.](http://links.colinschmitt.com/u/click?_t=2efbf9f7f9b54008ada1569759c619c2&_m=0d0d711216e44b7c9032628f233ce417&_e=CU9PQLCEwKCFG_HvMzpFobxzCWGY1Pvfrr2_nQN0svuRlkL7SHnvqM03dfY4GA9zeP1ifnB2GPgODZkRcv4zYQYNcgJ4cnyFefbb8t7Mu0OaUWyO7lfbYrP7kkVvL3WoSyTv0d7uTusvfXlA79kebcndgSm0bBGcv8IxA0Rm1_kufqDc_LjEBrgTcoLK-2zDoYKwne9Mwz-srMpArGaIqxSgtFgfvdSW50VgfE7VeimigXH9zteobxpC_aPD_2zAG9V26JjhR56fgAOs61A1ibf4pOQWR3TkphVYsqXE9p0A2TZeba4Fild5O6lKoFUb4Wd7XfL2hJFmrZxy59vezuf8Vhz5Uiztnu8T20xLSplHaOJqEMpH8LjPPwpsdh5ILPjPpKAOs-2DsKfmxGYDDivN5xXCq_McpgF37T5W_BvqmDK7xjYnpKhjcdbxDIHAHnLBKdfLjUAIWTECki0p0RxOSGDXqXnFTMkSRBwoF2w%3D)**

clean_body: Stand Against Critical Race Theory | | Friends, We live in a country where our Free Speech comes under attack each and every day. Let’s be clear: Critical Race Theory steals the American Dream away from children by teaching them that success or failure is solely based on skin color, not hard work, education, or character. Can you explain to me why anyone would want to teach this to kids? We are ranked 11th in Science and 30th in Math when compared to other countries around the world. We should be teaching Math and Science in our classrooms, not divisive, hateful rhetoric. We cannot fight back unless we Take Back the House and put people in power that fight back against hateful ideologies that are WRONG! Thank you for your support, Colin Schmitt Republican Candidate in New York’s 18th Congressional District Paid for by Schmitt for Congress Our mailing address is: Schmitt For Congress PO Box 67 South Salem, NY 10590

name: Fetterman for U.S. Senate
subject: Leans Republican
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
We really need all hands on deck.
#
Derek,
Last week, Politico released their 2022 election predictions, and it’s not looking great...
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47453?refcode=em20220424-5518&t=1&akid=5518%2E434096%2ExPMyJn)
If you weren’t already committed to doing everything you can to help flip this Senate seat blue, this is your sign.
If we’re going to pass any meaningful legislation to prevent gun violence, reverse climate change, or protect the right to access an abortion, we need to maintain a Democratic majority in the Senate.
We maintain a Democratic majority by flipping this Senate seat blue.
And we flip this Senate seat blue by electing John Fetterman, the best guy for the job _and_ the guy most likely to win.
**[So, Derek, can you show your support for John and make a donation of any amount? By making a donation today, you’re establishing yourself as a proud member of our people-powered campaign.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47453?amount=5&refcode=em20220424-5518&t=2&akid=5518%2E434096%2ExPMyJn)**
**[Contribute $5 »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47453?amount=5&refcode=em20220424-5518&t=21&akid=5518%2E434096%2ExPMyJn)**
Our power is all in our numbers. Your donation will add up with grassroots donations from all over to show that John can flip this seat and help defend a Democratic majority in the Senate.
Thank you for your support,
Fetterman for U.S. Senate
P.S. We can only win this thing with the help of supporters like you. **[Please, consider making a donation today to help us flip this seat and show Politico that they were wrong.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47453?refcode=em20220424-5518&t=22&akid=5518%2E434096%2ExPMyJn)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220424-5518-footer&t=23&refcode2=5518_434096_xPMyJn&akid=5518%2E434096%2ExPMyJn)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=24&akid=5518%2E434096%2ExPMyJn)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=5518%2E434096%2ExPMyJn)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

clean_body: America First Donors | Friends, Ted is in a fight for liberty. It’s a fight he’s willing to take on because he believes in YOUR FREEDOM! | With Mark Walker and Pat McCrory constantly smearing Ted and trying to drown out his message, it’s important we continue to have the resources to expand our movement. This is going to be one of the tightest races in the country. With that, it’ll also be one of the most expensive ones. Unfortunately, liberty can be costly, but we have never backed down from a fight! We know with your help we will win this fight. Friend,

As of right now, the public polls have me behind JD Vance, Josh Mandel, and Mike Gibbons, and let me tell you:
❌ **NONE of them are tough enough to stand up to the Radical Left.**

❌ **NONE of them will be able to beat Tim Ryan in the general election.** **_This is a fact._**
Without your support, there are a few things that are going to happen

● Democrats (Nancy Pelosi) are going to start pouring even MORE money into Ohio.

● The Socialist Left will have a Senate Majority and will take away our Second Amendment rights, destroy our borders, and create chaos in our communities.

● OHIO WILL FLIP BLUE, and there will be no one left in Washington to stand up and be TOUGH on the Radical Left.

| Please join Erik in Lakewood Monday evening
---
Hello Peter,
Erik Aadland cordially invites you to a Meet & Greet event in Lakewood on Monday April 25. Please come to Grace Covenant Church at the corner of Kipling and Mississippi in Lakewood at 6:00PM. Erik will talk one-on-one with you to and help you decide if he is the best person to represent you in the U.S. House of Representatives.
Bring your questions and issues to discuss with Erik Monday evening in Lakewood. Erik will be there at 6:00PM and hopes you will be too.

Grace Covenant Church is at 10101 W. Mississippi Ave in Lakewood

name: =?utf-8?Q?Brice=20Wiggins?=
subject: Brice Wiggins for Congress Campaign Update Week 16
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Brice Wiggins for Congress
body:
From the Pinebelt to the Coast, I invite you to keep up with us along the campaign trail. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/bricewiggins/campaign-updates?e=698f056321)
---
[](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=83fdbb68d7&e=698f056321)
Hello, I’m Brice Wiggins, and I am running for Congress in the Republican Primary Election on **June 7th** to represent the people of South Mississippi’s 4th Congressional District in Washington D.C.Our campaign to clean up D.C. won’t be easy, but I know how to win a tough fight. I’ve done it on the sports field, I’ve done it in the courtroom and I’ve done it in the Mississippi legislature. I’m ready for the next fight in the U.S. House of Representatives–and I am ready to show up for Mississippi, in person. You can learn more about me, my record, and my campaign [**HERE**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=2a43815794&e=698f056321). As we inch closer to election day, **June 7th,** I’m going to every corner of South Mississippi to earn your vote - building on the momentum of our accomplishments in the legislative session. Click[** HERE**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=831948ef74&e=698f056321) for details on my involvement in these accomplishments including my vote and activism for the Largest Tax Cut and Teacher Pay Raise in Mississippi history.
|
---
_**“Do not go where the path may lead, go instead where there is no path and leave a trail.”**_ _**—Ralph Waldo Emerson**_
|
---
# Campaign Trail Highlights
| | | | | | [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=7506b0c985&e=698f056321)
---
|
# Walkin’ with Wiggins
Coming to a neighborhood near you! From the Pinebelt to the Coast, I invite you to keep up with us along the campaign trail.**WATCH**[**#WalkinWithWiggins**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=4430d64c3b&e=698f056321) Below are some highlights from this past week.
---
## Superior Optical
| | | | | | [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=781ea7e6ca&e=698f056321)
---
|
---
|
---
Meet the latest veteran-owned and operated company to call Mississippi home. [**Superior Optical Lab**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=4159cce943&e=698f056321) now manufactures its high-quality eyewear and lenses for veterans across the U.S. from right here in Jackson Co. CEO Derek Bodart showed us around the new facilities while sharing their vision to continue investing in their growing team and technology to keep business and our local economy on the cutting-edge.
| | | | | | [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=3b1d19c484&e=698f056321)
---
|
## Immigration
U.S. Border Patrol stopped [**23 Terrorists**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=766ab9eaa0&e=698f056321) from entering our country in 2021 (that we know of). Yet, the Biden Admin and current members of Congress continue to sit back and do nothing. The tireless vigilant efforts of our agents who are battling this ungodly border crisis do not go unnoticed. As your next Congressman, I will push to fix this problem once and for all**.**[**WATCH to learn more.**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=1d92410a52&e=698f056321)
---
| | | | | |
## OS Area Council
It was a great morning speaking at the [**Ocean Springs Area Council Meeting**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=63125973f3&e=698f056321) , relaying the highlights of the legislative session and how the progress we made relates to our local business community. I pledge to bring the same love and advocacy for South Mississippi that I take to Jackson to Washington D.C.
---
| [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=7742bad4ac&e=698f056321)
---
| | | | | | [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=1e7f55fc02&e=698f056321)
---
|
## Happy Earth Day!
Happy Earth Day! As a State Senator, I worked hard to protect these assets while allowing environmentally conscious development to grow. [**WATCH**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=d506bb381e&e=698f056321) to learn how I will ensure that we continue to preserve and sustain the value of our resources as your future Congressman.
---
| | | | | |
## CYP Walking on Water
It was great to support [**Coast Young Professionals**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=db02ea2c41&e=698f056321) on Saturday. They have a heart for service, something I strongly identify with. The future is bright here in South Mississippi.
---
| [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=7d314fbc81&e=698f056321)
---
| | | | | | [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=1616ee66d5&e=698f056321)
---
|
## Laurel Kiwanis Club
I had the honor of speaking at the Laurel Kiwanis club meeting this week. Thank you all for having me!
---
| | | | | | [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=9cee02af2b&e=698f056321)
---
# Celebrating 23 Years
23 years later, and we’re still two crazy kids in love. [**Happy Anniversary**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=09e3701bac&e=698f056321) , **Heather!**
| [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=4df1f96dab&e=698f056321)
---
# Grace Goes to Prom!
Our daughter Grace attended Pascagoula High School Prom this weekend.
|
---
## Final note...
As a leader, serving others and taking action to create real change that positively impacts the people I am elected to represent is my mission. Mississippi, I’m ready to work for you and with you to build a nation we can once again be proud of.I hope you will consider my passion and strong record of getting things as I ask for your vote and support on June 7.Join us in Biloxi this Thursday, April 28 - Brice Wiggins For Congress Fundraiser [**info here.**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=7bdb1ed95f&e=698f056321)
|
---
## Primary Election Voting Information
### The Primary Election is on June 7.
Click [**HERE**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=f097c1b5cb&e=698f056321) for the Secretary of State Voter Information Guide for Details.
### Are you registered to vote? Find out [HERE](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=0fd66dcd0b&e=698f056321).
If not, no worries. You have until May 9th to register to vote either in person or by mail. Click [**HERE**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=4041d5439d&e=698f056321) to download a voter registration application. If you choose to mail in your voter registration application to the Circuit Clerk’s Office located in the county of your residence, be sure it is postmarked before May 9th (30 days before the election).
### Out of town on June 7th?
IN-PERSON ABSENTEE VOTING - Visit your [**County Circuit Clerk’s Office**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=cb09a72ad6&e=698f056321) to absentee vote in person from April 23 to June 4.MAIL-IN ABSENTEE VOTING - Contact the Circuit Clerk’s Office located in the county of your residence and request an Official Application for Absentee Elector’s Ballot be mailed to you. The Application and Ballot may be mailed together depending on how close to the election date is when the ballot is requested.*Mail-in absentee ballots must be postmarked on or before Election Day and received on or within five (5) business days of the election, June 14th, for them to count.[**Click HERE for a step-by-step guide for Absentee Voting.**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=e74d162105&e=698f056321)
|
---
Our campaign is in full swing and as you know, getting our message out takes funding. If you would like to provide financial support, please click the button below.

Sincerely,
| [DONATE TO OUR CAMPAIGN](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=bc616d45d5&e=698f056321)
---
|
---
|
---
### Keep Up With Us!
